items.title: Deploying Lightweight Input-Aware Selective Instruction Duplication in HPC Applications.
items.abstract: Modern high-performance computing (HPC) applications are increasingly vulnerable to silent data corruptions (SDCs) caused by transient hardware faults. While selective instruction duplication (SID) offers an efficient software-level protection strategy, existing SID methods rely on SDC vulnerability profile derived from only the default reference input often found in application suites. However, they overlook the input-dependent nature of SDC propagation. This leads to significant SDC coverage loss when inputs vary. We present Protego, a novel input-aware SID protection framework that efficiently adapts protection to runtime inputs. Protego performs a one-time vulnerability-guided input exploration to identify a small number of input groups with distinct SID protection patterns. At runtime, Protego uses lightweight features derived from input arguments to select and deploy the appropriate SID protection. Our evaluation across 10 HPC applications demonstrates the effectiveness and efficiency of Protego in mitigating SDC coverage loss across diverse inputs, compared to existing SID techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序越来越容易受到暂时性硬件故障引起的静默数据损坏 (SDC) 的影响。虽然选择性指令复制 (SID) 提供了有效的软件级保护策略，但现有的 SID 方法依赖于仅源自应用程序套件中常见的默认参考输入的 SDC 漏洞配置文件。然而，他们忽视了 SDC 传播的输入依赖性。当输入变化时，这会导致 SDC 覆盖范围显着损失。我们推出了 Protego，一种新颖的输入感知 SID 保护框架，可有效地根据运行时输入调整保护。 Protego 执行一次性漏洞引导输入探索，以识别具有不同 SID 保护模式的少量输入组。在运行时，Protego 使用从输入参数派生的轻量级功能来选择和部署适当的 SID 保护。我们对 10 个 HPC 应用程序进行的评估表明，与现有的 SID 技术相比，Protego 在减轻不同输入的 SDC 覆盖损失方面的有效性和效率。

items.title: Insights from Optimizing HPL Performance on Exascale Systems: A Comparative Analysis of Panel Factorization.
items.abstract: High performance LINPACK (HPL) remains the primary benchmark for evaluating supercomputing performance. It includes many parts with substantial internal complexity, and its performance is affected by a large number of parameters that interact in ways that are difficult to predict on large-scale heterogeneous supercomputer systems. We present a comprehensive performance analysis of HPL on Frontier, the world’s first exascale supercomputer, which achieved HPL performance of 1.35 exaflops. Through empirical parameter tuning, detailed modeling, and comparative evaluation, we uncover critical performance insights, share lessons learned, and outline best practices for effective parameter tuning on exascale systems. We introduce and evaluate two novel PDFACT strategies: a dedicated-thread (DT) variant and a GPU-based variant (GPUPDFACT) implementation using HIP cooperative groups, demonstrating that GPU-based factorization outperforms conventional CPU-based PDFACT on Frontier’s architecture. Our findings establish key performance factors for HPL on exascale systems and offer valuable guidance for future high-performance computing and benchmarking efforts.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能 LINPACK (HPL) 仍然是评估超级计算性能的主要基准。它包括许多内部复杂性很高的部分，其性能受到大量参数的影响，这些参数以在大规模异构超级计算机系统上难以预测的方式相互作用。我们对世界上第一台百亿亿次超级计算机 Frontier 上的 HPL 进行了全面的性能分析，该计算机实现了 1.35 exaflops 的 HPL 性能。通过经验参数调整、详细建模和比较评估，我们揭示了关键的性能见解，分享经验教训，并概述了在百亿亿级系统上进行有效参数调整的最佳实践。我们介绍并评估了两种新颖的 PDFACT 策略：专用线程 (DT) 变体和使用 HIP 协作组的基于 GPU 的变体 (GPUPDFACT) 实现，证明基于 GPU 的分解在 Frontier 架构上优于传统的基于 CPU 的 PDFACT。我们的研究结果确定了百亿亿次系统上 HPL 的关键性能因素，并为未来的高性能计算和基准测试工作提供了宝贵的指导。

items.title: TraceFlow: Efficient Trace Analysis for Large-Scale Parallel Applications via Interaction Pattern-Aware Trace Distribution.
items.abstract: Trace analysis of large-scale parallel applications is crucial for understanding and optimizing performance. It primarily focuses on the interaction behaviors between different parallel processes, such as synchronization waits and asynchronous overlaps. The trace size explodes as the parallel scale of applications, thus current methods analyze traces in parallel to ensure analysis speed. However, due to the interaction pattern-agnostic trace distribution, they often introduce inter-process communications to fetch non-local event data during interaction analysis, leading to excessively long trace analysis time.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模并行应用程序的跟踪分析对于理解和优化性能至关重要。它主要关注不同并行进程之间的交互行为，例如同步等待和异步重叠。迹线大小随着应用程序的并行规模而爆炸，因此当前的方法并行分析迹线以确保分析速度。然而，由于与交互模式无关的跟踪分布，它们经常在交互分析过程中引入进程间通信来获取非本地事件数据，导致跟踪分析时间过长。

items.title: A Sample-Free Compilation Framework for Efficient Dynamic Tensor Computation.
items.abstract: Dynamic-shape tensor computation poses challenges for shape-specific compilation due to variable input dimensions. Existing compilers rely on shape samples, incurring high tuning costs and performance degradation on unseen inputs. We present Helix, a dynamic tensor compilation framework with sample-free compilation and architecture-guided optimization to achieve both compilation efficiency and shape-general performance. To avoid shape sampling, Helix constructs shape-agnostic compilation by decomposing computations across architectural layers. A bidirectional strategy combines top-down abstraction to align tensor computations with architectural hierarchies, and bottom-up kernel construction to build efficient execution strategies from reusable, architecture-aligned micro-kernels. A hybrid analyzer ensures accuracy through profiling at lower architectural levels, and achieves scalability through architecture-informed modeling at higher levels and runtime. This hierarchical design eliminates shape-specific tuning and enables shape-adaptive execution. Evaluations conducted on x86 CPUs, ARM CPUs, and NVIDIA GPUs demonstrate that Helix reduces compilation time by 174 × over the existing compilers and delivers 2.26 × and 3.29 × execution speedups over vendor libraries and dynamic-shape compilers, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于输入维度可变，动态形状张量计算对特定形状的编译提出了挑战。现有的编译器依赖于形状样本，这会导致高昂的调优成本和看不见的输入的性能下降。我们推出了 Helix，一种动态张量编译框架，具有无样本编译和架构引导优化功能，可同时实现编译效率和形状通用性能。为了避免形状采样，Helix 通过跨架构层分解计算来构建与形状无关的编译。双向策略结合了自上而下的抽象，使张量计算与架构层次结构保持一致，并结合自下而上的内核构造，从可重用、架构一致的微内核构建高效的执行策略。混合分析器通过在较低架构级别进行分析来确保准确性，并通过在较高级别和运行时进行基于架构的建模来实现可扩展性。这种分层设计消除了特定于形状的调整，并实现了形状自适应执行。对 x86 CPU、ARM CPU 和 NVIDIA GPU 进行的评估表明，与现有编译器相比，Helix 将编译时间缩短了 174 倍，并且与供应商库和动态形状编译器相比，执行速度分别提高了 2.26 倍和 3.29 倍。

items.title: Hypertron: Efficiently Scaling Large Models by Exploring High-Dimensional Parallelization Space.
items.abstract: Large models are evolving towards massive scale, diverse model architectures (dense and sparse) and long-context processing, which makes it very challenging to efficiently scale large models on parallel machines. The current widely-used parallelization strategies are often sub-optimal due to their limited parallelization strategy space. To this end, we propose Hypertron, a scalable parallel large-model training framework which incorporates an unprecedented high-dimensional (up to 7D) parallelization space, a holistic scheme for efficient dimension fusion, and a comprehensive performance model to guide the high-dimensional exploration. By exploiting the high-dimensional space to discover the optimal strategy which is not supported by existing frameworks, Hypertron significantly reduces memory and communication cost while improving parallel scalability. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that Hypertron achieves up to 56.7% Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) on 2,048 new-generation Ascend NPU accelerators (scaling with supernodes) for different large models (such as sparse 141B and dense 310B), with 1.33x speedup over the best configuration of the state-of-the-art frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 大型模型正在朝着大规模、多样化模型架构（密集和稀疏）和长上下文处理的方向发展，这使得在并行机器上有效扩展大型模型变得非常具有挑战性。当前广泛使用的并行化策略由于并行化策略空间有限，往往不是最优的。为此，我们提出了Hypertron，一个可扩展的并行大模型训练框架，它结合了前所未有的高维（高达7D）并行化空间、高效维度融合的整体方案以及指导高维探索的综合性能模型。通过利用高维空间来发现现有框架不支持的最优策略，Hypertron 显着降低了内存和通信成本，同时提高了并行可扩展性。广泛的评估表明，Hypertron 在 2,048 个新一代 Ascend NPU 加速器（通过超级节点扩展）上针对不同的大型模型（例如稀疏 141B 和密集 310B）实现了高达 56.7% 的模型 FLOP 利用率（MFU），与最先进框架的最佳配置相比加速了 1.33 倍。

items.title: Exploring and Mitigating Failure Behavior of Large Language Model Training Workloads in HPC Systems.
items.abstract: The exponential growth of Large Language Model (LLM) training demands in HPC systems has exposed critical reliability challenges, particularly from transient faults. Unlike resilience studies in conventional DNN inference, the massive parameter scale and iterative updates in LLM training trigger more complex failure patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce LLMFI, a new fault injection tool, and reveal six distinct failure behaviors through 300K+ fault injection experiments (exceeding 5K GPU node-hours). Our key insight is that, while most injected faults are eventually masked by the training iteration mechanism, a critical subset leads to catastrophic failures or performance degradation. Further, we propose LLMFT, a novel machine-learning-based fault tolerance framework that implements closed-loop error control via heuristic feature extraction, fault detector, and dual recovery mechanisms. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that LLMFT achieves an average of 97.61% F1-score in fault detection with only 0.01%–0.05% additional GPU memory overhead, effectively mitigating LLM training failures.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 系统中大型语言模型 (LLM) 培训需求的指数级增长暴露了关键的可靠性挑战，特别是来自瞬态故障的挑战。与传统 DNN 推理中的弹性研究不同，LLM 训练中的大量参数规模和迭代更新会引发更复杂的故障模式。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了新的故障注入工具 LLMFI，并通过 300K+ 故障注入实验（超过 5K GPU 节点时）揭示了六种不同的故障行为。我们的主要见解是，虽然大多数注入的故障最终被训练迭代机制掩盖，但关键子集会导致灾难性故障或性能下降。此外，我们提出了 LLMFT，一种基于机器学习的新型容错框架，通过启发式特征提取、故障检测器和双恢复机制实现闭环错误控制。广泛的评估表明，LLMFT 在故障检测方面平均达到 97.61% 的 F1 分数，而仅增加 0.01%–0.05% 的 GPU 内存开销，有效缓解了 LLM 训练失败。

items.title: gParaKV: A GPGPU-accelerated Key-Value Separation-based KV Store with Optimized Compaction and Garbage Collection.
items.abstract: LSM-tree-based key-value stores or KV stores are widely deployed in modern cloud storage systems thanks to high data storage efficiency and retrieval capabilities. The compaction process in the LSM-tree, however, results in severe performance bottlenecks, especially in scenarios involving large volumes of data. While key-value separation methods mitigate the performance bottlenecks caused by compaction, the existing methods do not fully address merge-sorting during compaction and expensive garbage collection (GC). We propose gParaKV, a GPGPU-empowered KV store with a KV separation mechanism, leveraging the GPGPU parallel technology to accelerate merge-sorting in compaction and GC. gParaKV embraces unique features like a GPGPU bitmap structure, parallel data marking, and a parallel GC mechanism. These critical components effectively curtail the overhead of merge-sorting and GC operations by virtue of parallel computing. We compare it with state-of-the-art KV stores (e.g., RocksDB, BlobDB, Wisckey, DiffKV, UniKV, and HPDK) under various workloads. The experimental results show that gParaKV can improve the write performance and GC efficiency compared to the existing key-value separation-based KV stores.
items.abstract_zh: 基于LSM树的键值存储或KV存储由于高数据存储效率和检索能力而广泛部署在现代云存储系统中。然而，LSM-tree中的压缩过程会导致严重的性能瓶颈，尤其是在涉及大量数据的场景中。虽然键值分离方法减轻了压缩造成的性能瓶颈，但现有方法并没有完全解决压缩期间的合并排序和昂贵的垃圾收集（GC）问题。我们提出了 gParaKV，一种具有 KV 分离机制的 GPGPU 驱动的 KV 存储，利用 GPGPU 并行技术来加速压缩和 GC 中的合并排序。 gParaKV 拥有 GPGPU 位图结构、并行数据标记和并行 GC 机制等独特功能。这些关键组件通过并行计算有效地减少了合并排序和 GC 操作的开销。我们将其与各种工作负载下最先进的 KV 存储（例如 RocksDB、BlobDB、Wisckey、DiffKV、UniKV 和 HPDK）进行比较。实验结果表明，与现有基于键值分离的KV存储相比，gParaKV可以提高写入性能和GC效率。

items.title: ThirstyFLOPS: Water Footprint Modeling and Analysis Toward Sustainable HPC Systems.
items.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) systems are becoming increasingly water-intensive due to their reliance on water-based cooling and the energy used in power generation. However, the water footprint of HPC remains relatively underexplored—especially in contrast to the growing focus on carbon emissions. In this paper, we present ThirstyFLOPS - a comprehensive water footprint analysis framework for HPC systems. Our approach incorporates region-specific metrics, including Water Usage Effectiveness, Power Usage Effectiveness, and Energy Water Factor, to quantify water consumption using real-world data. Using four representative HPC systems – Marconi, Fugaku, Polaris, and Frontier – as examples, we provide implications for HPC system planning and management. We explore the impact of regional water scarcity and nuclear-based energy strategies on HPC sustainability. Our findings aim to advance the development of water-aware, environmentally responsible computing infrastructures.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统由于依赖水冷却和发电所用能源，耗水量越来越大。然而，高性能计算的水足迹仍然相对未被充分研究——尤其是与人们日益关注碳排放相比。在本文中，我们提出了 ThirstyFLOPS——一个用于 HPC 系统的综合水足迹分析框架。我们的方法结合了特定于区域的指标，包括用水效率、用电效率和能源水系数，以使用真实数据来量化用水量。我们以四种具有代表性的 HPC 系统（Marconi、Fugaku、Polaris 和 Frontier）为例，提供对 HPC 系统规划和管理的启示。我们探讨了区域水资源短缺和核能源战略对 HPC 可持续性的影响。我们的研究结果旨在推动具有水意识、对环境负责的计算基础设施的发展。

items.title: ORBIT-2: Scaling Exascale Vision Foundation Models for Weather and Climate Downscaling.
items.abstract: Sparse observations and coarse-resolution climate models limit effective regional decision-making, underscoring the need for robust downscaling. However, existing AI methods struggle with generalization across variables and geographies and are constrained by the quadratic complexity of Vision Transformer (ViT) self-attention. We introduce ORBIT-2, a scalable foundation model for global, hyper-resolution climate downscaling. ORBIT-2 incorporates two key innovations: (1) Residual Slim ViT (Reslim), a lightweight architecture with residual learning and Bayesian regularization for efficient, robust prediction; and (2) TILES, a tile-wise sequence scaling algorithm that reduces self-attention complexity from quadratic to linear, enabling long-sequence processing and massive parallelism. ORBIT-2 scales to 10 billion parameters across 65,536 GPUs, achieving up to 4.1 ExaFLOPS sustained throughput and 74–98% strong scaling efficiency. It supports downscaling to 0.9 km global resolution and processes sequences up to 4.2 billion tokens. On 7 km resolution benchmarks, ORBIT-2 achieves high accuracy with R2 scores in range of 0.98–0.99 against observation data.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏的观测和粗分辨率的气候模型限制了有效的区域决策，凸显了强有力的缩小尺度的必要性。然而，现有的人工智能方法难以实现跨变量和地域的泛化，并且受到视觉变换器（ViT）自注意力的二次复杂性的限制。我们推出了 ORBIT-2，这是一种用于全球超分辨率气候降尺度的可扩展基础模型。 ORBIT-2 融合了两项关键创新：(1) Residual Slim ViT (Reslim)，一种轻量级架构，具有残差学习和贝叶斯正则化功能，可实现高效、鲁棒的预测； (2) TILES，一种分块序列缩放算法，可将自注意力复杂度从二次降低到线性，从而实现长序列处理和大规模并行性。 ORBIT-2 可在 65,536 个 GPU 上扩展到 100 亿个参数，实现高达 4.1 ExaFLOPS 的持续吞吐量和 74-98% 的强大扩展效率。它支持缩小至 0.9 公里的全局分辨率，并处理多达 42 亿个令牌的序列。在 7 公里分辨率基准上，ORBIT-2 实现了高精度，相对于观测数据，R2 分数在 0.98-0.99 范围内。

items.title: EDDE: Container Deployment Framework Beyond the Cloud.
items.abstract: Containers, renowned for their lightweight nature and flexibility, have seen growing adoption for deploying edge services such as web applications. However, existing cloud-oriented container deployment frameworks fail to address the unique challenges of edge environments, including geographical distribution, device heterogeneity, and resource constraints. This oversight leads to suboptimal performance for latency-sensitive edge services like HPC/AI-powered autonomous driving and edge gaming, which demand rapid startup and immediate responsiveness.
items.abstract_zh: 容器以其轻量级和灵活性而闻名，越来越多地用于部署 Web 应用程序等边缘服务。然而，现有的面向云的容器部署框架无法解决边缘环境的独特挑战，包括地理分布、设​​备异构性和资源限制。这种疏忽导致对延迟敏感的边缘服务（例如 HPC/AI 支持的自动驾驶和边缘游戏）性能不佳，这些服务需要快速启动和即时响应。

items.title: gLLM: Global Balanced Pipeline Parallelism Systems for Distributed LLMs Serving with Token Throttling.
items.abstract: Pipeline parallelism has emerged as a predominant approach for deploying large language models (LLMs) across distributed nodes, owing to its lower communication overhead compared to tensor parallelism. While demonstrating high throughput in request serving, pipeline parallelism often faces performance limitations caused by pipeline bubbles, which are primarily resulted from imbalanced computation delays across batches. Existing methods like Sarathi-Serve attempt to address this through hybrid scheduling of chunked prefill and decode tokens with a fixed token budget. However, such methods may still experience significant fluctuations, arising either from insufficient prefill tokens or uneven distribution of decode tokens, ultimately leading to computational imbalance.
items.abstract_zh: 管道并行性已成为跨分布式节点部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 的主要方法，因为与张量并行性相比，其通信开销较低。在请求服务中展示高吞吐量的同时，管道并行性通常面临管道气泡引起的性能限制，这主要是由于批次之间的计算延迟不平衡造成的。 Sarathi-Serve 等现有方法尝试通过混合调度分块预填充和具有固定令牌预算的解码令牌来解决此问题。然而，由于预填充令牌不足或解码令牌分布不均匀，此类方法仍然可能会经历显着波动，最终导致计算不平衡。

items.title: Benchmark-driven Models for Energy Analysis and Attribution of GPU-Accelerated Supercomputing.
items.abstract: As advances in energy-efficiency become the primary limiter to increases in power-constrained supercomputing and machine learning performance, it is imperative developers, architects, and practitioners understand how modern GPUs consume energy when running HPC and ML applications. Rather than opaque coarse-grained metrics, in this paper, we develop an extensible, microbenchmark-parameterized energy model capable of attributing application energy not only by functional unit (FPU, tensor core, integer ALU) and memory level (L1, L2, HBM), but can also differentiate control energy from datapath energy. We examine trends in energy per operation among four generations of GPUs and validate our results using supercomputing and ML/AI procurement workloads. Our insights and extrapolations can be used to drive the future of CMOS and memory technologies, computer architecture research, algorithmic innovation, optimizations for power-constrained and mobile environments, and data center operations.
items.abstract_zh: 随着能源效率的进步成为功率有限的超级计算和机器学习性能提高的主要限制因素，开发人员、架构师和从业人员必须了解现代 GPU 在运行 HPC 和 ML 应用程序时如何消耗能源。在本文中，我们开发了一种可扩展的、微基准参数化的能量模型，而不是不透明的粗粒度指标，该模型不仅能够通过功能单元（FPU、张量核心、整数 ALU）和内存级别（L1、L2、HBM）来分配应用程序能量，而且还可以区分控制能量和数据路径能量。我们研究了四代 GPU 的每次操作能耗趋势，并使用超级计算和 ML/AI 采购工作负载验证我们的结果。我们的见解和推断可用于推动 CMOS 和内存技术、计算机架构研究、算法创新、功耗受限和移动环境的优化以及数据中心运营的未来。

items.title: Uno: A One-Stop Solution for Inter- and Intra-Data Center Congestion Control and Reliable Connectivity.
items.abstract: Cloud computing and AI workloads are driving unprecedented demand for efficient communication within and across datacenters. However, the coexistence of intra- and inter-datacenter traffic within datacenters plus the disparity between the RTTs of intra- and inter-datacenter networks complicates congestion management and traffic routing. Particularly, faster congestion responses of intra-datacenter traffic causes rate unfairness when competing with slower inter-datacenter flows. Additionally, inter-datacenter messages suffer from slow loss recovery and, thus, require reliability. Existing solutions overlook these challenges and handle inter- and intra-datacenter congestion with separate control loops or at different granularities. We propose Uno, a unified system for both inter- and intra-DC environments that integrates a transport protocol for rapid congestion reaction and fair rate control with a load balancing scheme that combines erasure coding and adaptive routing. Our findings show that Uno significantly improves the completion times of both inter- and intra-DC flows compared to state-of-the-art methods such as Gemini.
items.abstract_zh: 云计算和人工智能工作负载正在推动对数据中心内部和跨数据中心的高效通信的前所未有的需求。然而，数据中心内数据中心内和数据中心间流量的共存，加上数据中心内和数据中心间网络的 RTT 之间的差异，使拥塞管理和流量路由变得复杂。特别是，数据中心内流量的较快拥塞响应在与较慢的数据中心间流量竞争时会导致速率不公平。此外，数据中心间消息的丢失恢复速度较慢，因此需要可靠性。现有的解决方案忽视了这些挑战，并通过单独的控制循环或不同的粒度来处理数据中心间和数据中心内的拥塞。我们提出了 Uno，一个适用于 DC 间和 DC 内环境的统一系统，它将用于快速拥塞反应和公平速率控制的传输协议与结合纠删​​码和自适应路由的负载平衡方案集成在一起。我们的研究结果表明，与 Gemini 等最先进的方法相比，Uno 显着提高了 DC 间和 DC 内流的完成时间。

items.title: Fringe-SGC: Counting Subgraphs with Fringe Vertices.
items.abstract: Subgraph Counting (SGC) is a fundamental component of many important applications, including cybersecurity, drug discovery, social network analysis, and natural language processing. However, current SGC approaches can only handle very small patterns (aka subgraphs) because the computational load increases exponentially with the size of the pattern. To overcome this limitation for certain patterns, we introduce a new technique and algorithm called Fringe-SGC for counting the exact number of times a subgraph occurs in a larger graph. Our approach conventionally searches only for the “core” of the subgraph and then uses set-based methods to compute the number of occurrences that the “fringes” add. Our evaluation shows that Fringe-SGC is able to count the instances of many subgraphs that are too large for state-of-the-art SGC frameworks. Furthermore, Fringe-SGC running on a GPU outperforms the state-of-the-art GPU-based SGC frameworks by up to 20 × on average, especially on patterns with many fringes.
items.abstract_zh: 子图计数 (SGC) 是许多重要应用的基本组成部分，包括网络安全、药物发现、社交网络分析和自然语言处理。然而，当前的 SGC 方法只能处理非常小的模式（也称为子图），因为计算负载随着模式的大小呈指数级增加。为了克服某些模式的这一限制，我们引入了一种称为 Fringe-SGC 的新技术和算法，用于计算子图在较大图中出现的确切次数。我们的方法通常只搜索子图的“核心”，然后使用基于集合的方法来计算“边缘”添加的出现次数。我们的评估表明，Fringe-SGC 能够计算许多对于最先进的 SGC 框架来说太大的子图的实例。此外，在 GPU 上运行的 Fringe-SGC 平均性能比最先进的基于 GPU 的 SGC 框架高出 20 倍，特别是在具有许多条纹的图案上。

items.title: What to Support When You're Compressing: The State of Practice Gaps and Opportunities for Scientific Data Compression.
SIGMo: High-Throughput Batched Subgraph Isomorphism on GPUs for Molecular Matching.
items.abstract: Subgraph isomorphism is a fundamental graph problem with applications in diverse domains from biology to social network analysis. Of particular interest is molecular matching, which uses a subgraph isomorphism formulation for the drug discovery process. While subgraph isomorphism is known to be NP-complete and computationally expensive, in the molecular matching formulation a number of domain constraints allow for efficient implementations. This paper presents SIGMo, a high-throughput, portable subgraph isomorphism framework for GPUs, specifically designed for batch molecular matching. SIGMo takes advantage of the specific domain formulation to provide a more efficient filter-and-join strategy: the framework introduces a novel multi-level iterative filtering technique based on neighborhood signature encoding to efficiently prune candidates prior to a GPU-optimized join phase using a stack-based DFS traversal. The GPU implementation is written in SYCL, allowing portable execution on AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA GPUs. Our experimental evaluation on a large dataset from ZINC demonstrates up to 1470 × speedup over state-of-the-art subgraph isomorphism frameworks, and achieves a throughput of 7.7 billion matches per second on a cluster with 256 GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 子图同构是一个基本的图问题，在从生物学到社交网络分析的各个领域都有应用。特别令人感兴趣的是分子匹配，它在药物发现过程中使用子图同构公式。虽然子图同构已知是 NP 完全的且计算成本昂贵，但在分子匹配公式中，许多域约束允许有效的实现。本文介绍了 SIGMo，一种用于 GPU 的高通量、便携式子图同构框架，专为批量分子匹配而设计。 SIGMo 利用特定的域公式来提供更有效的过滤和连接策略：该框架引入了一种基于邻域签名编码的新颖的多级迭代过滤技术，以使用基于堆栈的 DFS 遍历在 GPU 优化的连接阶段之前有效地修剪候选者。 GPU 实现是用 SYCL 编写的，允许在 AMD、Intel 和 NVIDIA GPU 上移植执行。我们对 ZINC 的大型数据集进行的实验评估表明，与最先进的子图同构框架相比，速度提高了 1470 倍，并在具有 256 个 GPU 的集群上实现了每秒 77 亿个匹配的吞吐量。

items.title: DRIM-ANN: An Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search Engine based on Commercial DRAM-PIMs.
items.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) is essential for applications like recommendation systems and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) but is highly I/O-intensive and memory-demanding. CPUs face I/O bottlenecks, while GPUs are constrained by limited memory. DRAM-based Processing-in-Memory (DRAM-PIM) offers a promising alternative by providing high bandwidth, large memory capacity, and near-data computation. This work introduces DRIM-ANN, the first optimized ANNS engine leveraging UPMEM’s DRAM-PIM. While UPMEM scales memory bandwidth and capacity, it suffers from low computing power because of the limited processor embedded in each DRAM bank. To address this, we systematically optimize ANNS approximation configurations and replace expensive squaring operations with lookup tables to align the computing requirements with UPMEM’s architecture. Additionally, we propose load-balancing and I/O optimization strategies to maximize parallel processing efficiency. Experimental results show that DRIM-ANN achieves a 2.46× speedup over a 32-thread CPU and up to 2.67× over a GPU when deployed on computationally enhanced PIM platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 对于推荐系统和检索增强生成 (RAG) 等应用至关重要，但 I/O 密集型且内存要求高。 CPU 面临 I/O 瓶颈，而 GPU 则受到有限内存的限制。基于 DRAM 的内存处理 (DRAM-PIM) 通过提供高带宽、大内存容量和近数据计算，提供了一种有前景的替代方案。这项工作介绍了 DRIM-ANN，这是第一个利用 UPMEM 的 DRAM-PIM 进行优化的 ANNS 引擎。虽然 UPMEM 可扩展内存带宽和容量，但由于每个 DRAM 组中嵌入的处理器有限，它的计算能力较低。为了解决这个问题，我们系统地优化了 ANNS 近似配置，并用查找表取代了昂贵的平方运算，以使计算要求与 UPMEM 的架构保持一致。此外，我们还提出了负载均衡和 I/O 优化策略，以最大限度地提高并行处理效率。实验结果表明，当部署在计算增强型 PIM 平台上时，DRIM-ANN 比 32 线程 CPU 实现了 2.46 倍的加速，比 GPU 实现了 2.67 倍的加速。

items.title: UpANNS: Enhancing Billion-Scale ANNS Efficiency with Real-World PIM Architecture.
items.abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) is a critical component of modern AI systems, such as recommendation engines and retrieval-augmented large language models (RAG-LLMs). However, scaling ANNS to billion-entry datasets exposes critical inefficiencies: CPU-based solutions are bottlenecked by memory bandwidth limitations, while GPU implementations underutilize hardware resources, leading to suboptimal performance and energy consumption. To address these challenges, we introduce UpANNS, a novel framework leveraging Processing-in-Memory (PIM) architecture to accelerate billion-scale ANNS. UpANNS integrates four key innovations, including 1) architecture-aware data placement to minimize latency through workload balancing, 2) dynamic resource management for optimal PIM utilization, 3) co-occurrence optimized encoding to reduce redundant computations, and 4) an early-pruning strategy for efficient top-k selection. Evaluation on commercial UPMEM hardware demonstrates that UpANNS achieves 4.3x higher QPS than CPU-based Faiss, while matching GPU performance with 2.3x greater energy efficiency. Its near-linear scalability ensures practicality for growing datasets, making it ideal for applications like real-time LLM serving and large-scale retrieval systems.
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 是现代人工智能系统的关键组成部分，例如推荐引擎和检索增强大型语言模型 (RAG-LLM)。然而，将 ANNS 扩展到数十亿个条目的数据集会暴露出严重的低效率问题：基于 CPU 的解决方案受到内存带宽限制的瓶颈，而 GPU 实现则未充分利用硬件资源，导致性能和能耗不理想。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 UpANNS，这是一种利用内存处理 (PIM) 架构来加速十亿级 ANNS 的新型框架。 UpANNS 集成了四项关键创新，包括 1) 架构感知数据放置，通过工作负载平衡最大限度地减少延迟；2) 动态资源管理，实现最佳 PIM 利用率；3) 共现优化编码，减少冗余计算；4) 早期剪枝策略，实现高效的 top-k 选择。对商用 UPMEM 硬件的评估表明，UpANNS 的 QPS 比基于 CPU 的 Faiss 高 4.3 倍，同时 GPU 性能与高 2.3 倍的能效相匹配。其近线性的可扩展性确保了不断增长的数据集的实用性，使其成为实时 LLM 服务和大规模检索系统等应用程序的理想选择。

items.title: A Streaming Collectives Interface Targeting Dataflow Acceleration and HPC Workloads.
items.abstract: Dataflow accelerators can provide energy efficient and high-performance alternatives to current popular architectures. However, little work has been done to enable accelerator-initiated, scalable collective communication for these architectures. We develop a High Level Synthesis (HLS) interface to bridge this gap through software-hardware co-design. Given the tendency of dataflow applications to use reads and writes to streams to express data transfer, we develop a streaming interface implementing fine-grained transfers to the host processor. Data can then be communicated through MPI and transferred to the receiving accelerator. As a result, the interface uses few hardware resources for communication. As a case study, we enhance the HPL benchmark from HPCC_FPGA with our contributions. We evaluate our final design on up to 16 FPGAs, achieving up to 18% improvement in application throughput and 36% reduced latency in kernel execution. Additionally, we design a stencil benchmark that showcases superlinear speedup in a strong scaling scenario.
items.abstract_zh: 数据流加速器可以为当前流行的架构提供节能和高性能的替代方案。然而，在为这些架构启用加速器发起的、可扩展的集体通信方面，几乎没有做任何工作。我们开发了一个高级综合（HLS）接口，通过软件-硬件协同设计来弥补这一差距。鉴于数据流应用程序使用对流的读取和写入来表达数据传输的趋势，我们开发了一个流接口，实现到主机处理器的细粒度传输。然后数据可以通过 MPI 进行通信并传输到接收加速器。因此，该接口使用很少的硬件资源进行通信。作为案例研究，我们通过我们的贡献增强了 HPCC_FPGA 的 HPL 基准。我们在多达 16 个 FPGA 上评估了我们的最终设计，实现了应用吞吐量高达 18% 的提升以及内核执行延迟降低了 36%。此外，我们设计了一个模板基准，展示了在强大的缩放场景中的超线性加速。

items.title: XaaS Containers: Performance-Portable Representation With Source and IR Containers.
items.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) systems and cloud data centers are converging, and containers are becoming the default method of portable software deployment. Yet, while containers simplify software management, they face significant performance challenges in HPC environments as they must sacrifice hardware-specific optimizations to achieve portability. Although HPC containers can use runtime hooks to access optimized MPI libraries and GPU devices, they are limited by application binary interface (ABI) compatibility and cannot overcome the effects of early-stage compilation decisions. Acceleration as a Service (XaaS) proposes a vision of performance-portable containers, where a containerized application should achieve peak performance across all HPC systems. We present a practical realization of this vision through Source and Intermediate Representation (IR) containers, where we delay performance-critical decisions until the target system specification is known. We analyze specialization mechanisms in HPC software and propose a new LLM-assisted method for automatic discovery of specializations. By examining the compilation pipeline, we develop a methodology to build containers optimized for target architectures at deployment time. Our prototype demonstrates that new XaaS containers combine the convenience of containerization with the performance benefits of system-specialized builds.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算（HPC）系统和云数据中心正在融合，容器正在成为便携式软件部署的默认方法。然而，虽然容器简化了软件管理，但它们在 HPC 环境中面临着巨大的性能挑战，因为它们必须牺牲特定于硬件的优化来实现可移植性。尽管 HPC 容器可以使用运行时挂钩来访问优化的 MPI 库和 GPU 设备，但它们受到应用程序二进制接口 (ABI) 兼容性的限制，并且无法克服早期编译决策的影响。加速即服务 (XaaS) 提出了性能可移植容器的愿景，其中容器化应用程序应在所有 HPC 系统中实现峰值性能。我们通过源和中间表示 (IR) 容器来实际实现这一愿景，其中我们延迟性能关键决策，直到知道目标系统规范。我们分析了 HPC 软件中的专业化机制，并提出了一种新的 LLM 辅助方法来自动发现专业化。通过检查编译管道，我们开发了一种在部署时构建针对目标架构优化的容器的方法。我们的原型展示了新的 XaaS 容器将容器化的便利性与系统专用构建的性能优势结合在一起。

items.title: Story of Two GPUs: Characterizing the Resilience of Hopper H100 and Ampere A100 GPUs.
items.abstract: This study characterizes GPU resilience in Delta, a large-scale AI system that consists of 1,056 A100 and H100 GPUs, with over 1,300 petaflops of peak throughput. We used 2.5 years of operational data (11.7 million GPU hours) on GPU errors. Our major findings include: (i) H100 GPU memory resilience is worse than A100 GPU memory, with 3.2x lower per-GPU MTBE for memory errors, (ii) The GPU memory error-recovery mechanisms on H100 GPUs are insufficient to handle the increased memory capacity, (iii) H100 GPUs demonstrate significantly improved GPU hardware resilience over A100 GPUs with respect to critical hardware components, (iv) GPU errors on both A100 and H100 GPUs frequently result in job failures due to the lack of robust recovery mechanisms at the application level, and (v) We project the impact of GPU node availability on larger-scales and find that significant overprovisioning of 5% is necessary to handle GPU failures.
items.abstract_zh: 这项研究描述了 Delta 中 GPU 弹性的特征，Delta 是一个大型人工智能系统，由 1,056 个 A100 和 H100 GPU 组成，峰值吞吐量超过 1,300 petaflops。我们使用了 2.5 年的运行数据（1170 万个 GPU 小时）来分析 GPU 错误。我们的主要发现包括：(i) H100 GPU 内存弹性比 A100 GPU 内存差，每个 GPU MTBE 的内存错误降低了 3.2 倍，(ii) H100 GPU 上的 GPU 内存错误恢复机制不足以处理增加的内存容量，(iii) H100 GPU 在关键硬件组件方面比 A100 GPU 表现出显着提高的 GPU 硬件弹性，(iv) A100 和 H100 GPU 上的 GPU 错误由于应用程序级别缺乏强大的恢复机制，经常导致作业失败；(v) 我们预测了 GPU 节点可用性对更大规模的影响，发现需要显着过度配置 5% 来处理 GPU 故障。

items.title: Wasp: Efficient Asynchronous Single-Source Shortest Path on Multicore Systems via Work Stealing.
items.abstract: The Single-Source Shortest Path (SSSP) problem is a fundamental graph problem with an extensive set of real-world applications. State-of-the-art parallel algorithms for SSSP, such as the Δ -stepping algorithm, create parallelism through priority coarsening. Priority coarsening results in redundant computations that diminish the benefits of parallelization and limit parallel scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 单源最短路径（SSSP）问题是一个基本的图问题，具有广泛的实际应用。最先进的 SSSP 并行算法（例如 Δ 步进算法）通过优先级粗化创建并行性。优先级粗化会导致冗余计算，从而削弱并行化的优势并限制并行可扩展性。

items.title: FT-Transformer: Resilient and Reliable Transformer with End-to-End Fault Tolerant Attention.
items.abstract: Transformer models rely on High-Performance Computing (HPC) resources for inference, where soft errors are inevitable in large-scale systems, making the reliability of the model particularly critical. Existing fault tolerance frameworks for Transformers are designed at the operation level without architectural optimization, leading to significant computational and memory overhead, which in turn reduces protection efficiency and limits scalability to larger models. In this paper, we implement module-level protection for Transformers by treating the operations within the attention module as a single kernel and applying end-to-end fault tolerance. This method provides unified protection across multi-step computations, while achieving comprehensive coverage of potential errors in the nonlinear computations. For linear modules, we design a strided algorithm-based fault tolerance (ABFT) that avoids inter-thread communication. Experimental results show that our end-to-end fault tolerance achieves up to 7.56 × speedup over traditional methods with an average fault tolerance overhead of 13.9%.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型依赖高性能计算 (HPC) 资源进行推理，在大规模系统中软错误不可避免，因此模型的可靠性尤为关键。现有的 Transformers 容错框架是在操作层面设计的，没有进行架构优化，导致大量的计算和内存开销，进而降低了保护效率并限制了更大模型的可扩展性。在本文中，我们通过将注意力模块内的操作视为单个内核并应用端到端容错来实现 Transformer 的模块级保护。该方法提供了跨多步计算的统一保护，同时实现了非线性计算中潜在错误的全面覆盖。对于线性模块，我们设计了一种基于跨步算法的容错（ABFT），可以避免线程间通信。实验结果表明，我们的端到端容错能力比传统方法实现了高达 7.56 倍的加速，平均容错开销为 13.9%。

items.title: Reproducibility Report for SC25 Paper MANS: Efficient and Portable ANS Encoding for Multi-Byte Integer Data on CPUs and GPUs.
items.abstract: This reproducibility report provides details about the artifact evaluation done with regards to the Artifact Description and Evaluation appendix of SC25 paper "MANS: Efficient and Portable ANS Encoding for Multi-Byte Integer Data on CPUs and GPUs" by Jinwu Yang et al. The work was done as part of the Reproducibility Initiative of SC25. The author is a member of the SC25 Reproducibilty Committee.
items.abstract_zh: 该再现性报告提供了有关根据 Jinwu Yang 等人撰写的 SC25 论文“MANS：CPU 和 GPU 上多字节整数数据的高效和可移植 ANS 编码”的工件描述和评估附录进行的工件评估的详细信息。这项工作是作为 SC25 再现性倡议的一部分完成的。作者是 SC25 重现性委员会成员。

items.title: Bubble: Towards Scalable Evolving Graph Processing via Mini-Batch Sorting.
items.abstract: Evolving graph processing has become a critical component in various applications and is gaining increasing attention. However, existing evolving graph systems suffer from cache contention and workload imbalance between threads, which leads to poor scalability and performance degradation on modern multi-core computers.
items.abstract_zh: 不断发展的图形处理已成为各种应用程序中的关键组成部分，并受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的不断发展的图系统面临着缓存争用和线程之间的工作负载不平衡的问题，这导致现代多核计算机上的可扩展性差和性能下降。

items.title: Bridging the Gap between Unstructured SpMM and Structured Sparse Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: The acceleration of Sparse-dense Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) using Tensor Cores (TCs) in GPUs has recently garnered significant attention. TCs are designed for block-wise matrix multiplication, however, block partitioning of general unstructured sparse matrices often results in low-level density, causing a substantial waste of computational resources. Sparse Tensor Cores (SpTCs) can mitigate this issue by skipping 50% of zero values, however, SpTCs are limited to strict 2:4 or 1:2 structured sparsity. To bridge this gap, we propose MP-SpMM, a novel Matching and Padding approach that transforms general sparse matrices into structured sparsity, drawing inspiration from the maximum matching problem in graph theory. Moreover, we introduce a novel storage format and a highly optimized GPU kernel that fully exploits the capabilities of SpTCs. Extensive experiments on modern GPUs demonstrate that MP-SpMM outperforms state-of-the-art SpMM libraries, DTC-SpMM and RoDe, with an average speedup of 2.42 × (up to 7.65 ×) and 1.92 × (up to 8.60 ×).
items.abstract_zh: 在 GPU 中使用张量核心 (TC) 加速稀疏密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 最近引起了广泛关注。 TC是为逐块矩阵乘法而设计的，然而，一般非结构化稀疏矩阵的块划分通常会导致低密度，导致计算资源的大量浪费。稀疏张量核心 (SpTC) 可以通过跳过 50% 的零值来缓解此问题，但是，SpTC 仅限于严格的 2:4 或 1:2 结构化稀疏性。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 MP-SpMM，这是一种新颖的匹配和填充方法，它将一般稀疏矩阵转换为结构化稀疏矩阵，从图论中的最大匹配问题中汲取灵感。此外，我们还引入了一种新颖的存储格式和高度优化的 GPU 内核，充分利用 SpTC 的功能。现代 GPU 上的大量实验表明，MP-SpMM 的性能优于最先进的 SpMM 库、DTC-SpMM 和 RoDe，平均加速比为 2.42 ×（高达 7.65 ×）和 1.92 ×（高达 8.60 ×）。

items.title: Zero-Value Code Specialization via Profile-Guided Control Data Flow Analysis.
items.abstract: Zero-value propagation is a common phenomenon in modern programs, where redundant operations caused by zero-values can severely impact performance. Since zero-values are often generated dynamically at runtime, eliminating such redundancies through static analysis alone is challenging. In this paper, we propose an efficient static control data flow analysis algorithm to identify redundancies resulting from zero-value propagation. Based on this algorithm, we design and implement ZeroSpec, a fully automated profile-guided code optimizer that detects zero-values at runtime and specializes fast paths for them. To maximize performance gains, ZeroSpec also employs a fine-grained cost model that evaluates the optimization potential of individual zero-value instructions to guide the construction of targeted optimization regions. Evaluation on SPEC CPU2017, NPB and real-world applications demonstrates the effectiveness of ZeroSpec, achieving a maximum performance speedup of 1.31 ×.
items.abstract_zh: 零值传播是现代程序中的常见现象，零值引起的冗余操作会严重影响性能。由于零值通常是在运行时动态生成的，因此仅通过静态分析消除此类冗余具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的静态控制数据流分析算法来识别零值传播产生的冗余。基于该算法，我们设计并实现了 ZeroSpec，这是一种完全自动化的配置文件引导代码优化器，可以在运行时检测零值并为其专门提供快速路径。为了最大限度地提高性能，ZeroSpec 还采用了细粒度成本模型，该模型评估各个零值指令的优化潜力，以指导目标优化区域的构建。对 SPEC CPU2017、NPB 和实际应用的评估证明了 ZeroSpec 的有效性，实现了 1.31 倍的最大性能加速。

items.title: Trillion Ligands per Day: Performance-Portable Virtual Screening via Compound Database Optimization and Multi-Target Docking.
items.abstract: Structure-based virtual screening confronts a grand challenge in scaling to trillion-ligand libraries for drug discovery. We present SWDOCKP2, a performance-portable virtual screening framework achieving 1.9 trillion ligand-receptor pairs daily across eight targets on the Sunway OceanLight supercomputer with 39-million cores — 10× faster than prior state-of-the-art. Key innovations combine (1) a ligand database optimizer with conformational sorting and merging, (2) multi-receptor grid alignment enabling parallel target screening and SIMD-accelerated trilinear interpolation, and (3) a Sunway architecture emulator for cross-platform efficiency. These advancements bridge computational scalability with novel drug discovery demands, offering a blueprint for next-generation supercomputing in structure-based drug design. Additionally, SWDOCKP2 will generate an unprecedented dataset of predicted protein-ligand interactions, creating a transformative resource for machine learning applications. By addressing experimental data scarcity, this dataset empowers accurate ligand prediction, generative chemistry, and AI-driven drug discovery.
items.abstract_zh: 基于结构的虚拟筛选面临着扩展到万亿配体库以进行药物发现的巨大挑战。我们推出了 SWDOCKP2，这是一种高性能便携式虚拟筛选框架，在拥有 3900 万个核心的 Sunway OceanLight 超级计算机上每天可在 8 个目标上实现 1.9 万亿个配体-受体对，比之前最先进的技术快 10 倍。关键创新结合了 (1) 具有构象排序和合并功能的配体数据库优化器，(2) 多受体网格对齐，可实现并行目标筛选和 SIMD 加速三线性插值，以及 (3) 可实现跨平台效率的 Sunway 架构模拟器。这些进步将计算可扩展性与新药物发现需求联系起来，为基于结构的药物设计中的下一代超级计算提供了蓝图。此外，SWDOCKP2 将生成前所未有的预测蛋白质-配体相互作用数据集，为机器学习应用创建变革性资源。通过解决实验数据稀缺的问题，该数据集支持准确的配体预测、生成化学和人工智能驱动的药物发现。

items.title: AMRaCut: Scalable Partitioning for Adaptive Mesh Refinement.
items.abstract: Mesh partitioning is critical for scalable distributed PDE solvers. Traditional methods like spatial ordering and multi-level graph partitioning have significant tradeoffs between partition quality and parallel scalability. We present AMRaCut, a distributed-parallel mesh partitioner that bridges this gap using parallel label propagation and graph diffusion. It operates mostly locally on initial partitions, limiting inter-process communications to neighboring processes. This locality is especially effective in AMR, where mesh evolves dynamically with mostly local changes.
items.abstract_zh: 网格划分对于可扩展的分布式 PDE 求解器至关重要。空间排序和多级图分区等传统方法在分区质量和并行可扩展性之间存在显着的权衡。我们提出了 AMRaCut，一种分布式并行网格划分器，它使用并行标签传播和图扩散来弥补这一差距。它主要在初始分区上本地运行，限制与相邻进程的进程间通信。这种局部性在 AMR 中尤其有效，其中网格随着大部分局部变化而动态演化。

items.title: STELLAR: Storage Tuning Engine Leveraging LLM Autonomous Reasoning for High Performance Parallel File Systems.
items.abstract: I/O performance is crucial to efficiency in data-intensive scientific computing; but tuning large-scale storage systems is complex, costly, and notoriously manpower-intensive, making it inaccessible for most domain scientists. To address this problem, we propose STELLAR, an autonomous tuner for high-performance parallel file systems. Our evaluations show that STELLAR almost always selects near-optimal configurations for the parallel file systems within the first five attempts, even for previously unseen applications. STELLAR’s human-like efficiency is fundamentally different from existing autotuning methods, which often require hundreds of thousands of iterations to converge. STELLAR achieves this through autonomous end-to-end agentic tuning. Powered by large language models (LLMs), STELLAR is capable of (1) accurately extracting tunable parameters from software manuals, (2) analyzing I/O trace logs generated by applications, (3) selecting initial tuning strategies, (4) rerunning applications on real systems and collecting I/O performance feedback, (5) adjusting tuning strategies and repeating the tuning cycle, and (6) reflecting on and summarizing tuning experiences into reusable knowledge for future optimizations. STELLAR integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), external tool execution, LLM-based reasoning, and a multiagent design to stabilize reasoning and combat hallucinations. We evaluate how each of these components impacts optimization outcomes, thus providing insight into the design of similar systems for other optimization problems. STELLAR’s architecture and empirical validation open new avenues for tackling complex system optimization challenges, especially those characterized by vast search spaces and high exploration costs. Its highly efficient autonomous tuning will broaden access to I/O performance optimizations for domain scientists with minimal additional resource investment.
items.abstract_zh: I/O 性能对于数据密集型科学计算的效率至关重要；但调整大规模存储系统非常复杂、成本高昂，而且需要大量人力，这使得大多数领域科学家无法实现。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 STELLAR，一种用于高性能并行文件系统的自主调优器。我们的评估表明，STELLAR 在前五次尝试中几乎总是为并行文件系统选择接近最佳的配置，即使对于以前未见过的应用程序也是如此。 STELLAR 的类人效率与现有的自动调整方法有根本的不同，后者通常需要数十万次迭代才能收敛。 STELLAR 通过自主的端到端代理调整来实现这一目标。在大型语言模型 (LLM) 的支持下，STELLAR 能够 (1) 从软件手册中准确提取可调参数，(2) 分析应用程序生成的 I/O 跟踪日志，(3) 选择初始调优策略，(4) 在真实系统上重新运行应用程序并收集 I/O 性能反馈，(5) 调整调优策略并重复调优周期，(6) 反思调优经验并将其总结为可重用的知识，以供未来优化。 STELLAR 集成了检索增强生成 (RAG)、外部工具执行、基于 LLM 的推理和多智能体设计，以稳定推理并对抗幻觉。我们评估每个组件如何影响优化结果，从而为其他优化问题的类似系统的设计提供见解。 STELLAR 的架构和实证验证为解决复杂系统优化挑战开辟了新途径，特别是那些以巨大搜索空间和高探索成本为特征的系统优化挑战。其高效的自主调优将以最少的额外资源投资拓宽领域科学家对 I/O 性能优化的访问范围。

items.title: Reproducibility Report for SC25 Paper MXBLAS: Accelerating 8-bit Deep Learning with a Unified Micro-Scaled GEMM Library.
items.abstract: This reproducibility report provides details about the artifact evaluation done with regards to the Artifact Description and Evaluation appendix of SC25 paper MXBLAS: Accelerating 8-bit Deep Learning with a Unified Micro-Scaled GEMM Library by Weihu Wang et al. The work was done as part of the Reproducibility Initiative of SC25. The author is a member of the SC25 Reproducibilty Committee.
items.abstract_zh: 该再现性报告提供了有关根据 SC25 论文 MXBLAS 的工件描述和评估附录进行的工件评估的详细信息：使用统一微尺度 GEMM 库加速 8 位深度学习（作者为 Weihu Wang 等人）。这项工作是作为 SC25 再现性倡议的一部分完成的。作者是 SC25 重现性委员会成员。

items.title: Million-Atom Ab Initio Electron Dynamics: Discontinuous Galerkin Real-Time Time-Dependent Density Functional Theory.
items.abstract: Over the past decades, first-principles real-time time dependent density functional theory(rt-TDDFT) simulations have been limited to systems with only thousands of atoms. We propose a novel method based on the discontinuous Galerkin adaptive local basis, significantly reducing global communication in rt-TDDFT. We further introduce a tensor compression technique that leverages basis locality to avoid repeated evaluation of multi-center integrals in hybrid functionals, greatly reducing computational cost. To overcome the projection bottleneck in our basis sets, we design a fused Gemm-Reduce operation that achieves several times higher floating-point efficiency than standard BLAS combination. Our implementation reaches 34.8% of theoretical peak performance on 524,288 CGs of the New Sunway supercomputer and simulates electronic dynamics of systems with over one million atoms for both local-semi-local and hybrid functionals. This work improves computational scale by two orders of magnitude, opening new possibilities for exploring ultrafast dynamics in large-scale materials and nanophotonic devices.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，第一原理实时依赖密度泛函理论（rt-TDDFT）模拟仅限于只有数千个原子的系统。我们提出了一种基于不连续伽辽金自适应局部基础的新方法，显着减少了 rt-TDDFT 中的全局通信。我们进一步引入了一种张量压缩技术，利用基局部性来避免混合泛函中多中心积分的重复计算，从而大大降低了计算成本。为了克服基组中的投影瓶颈，我们设计了一种融合的 Gemm-Reduce 运算，其浮点效率比标准 BLAS 组合高出数倍。我们的实现在 New Sunway 超级计算机的 524,288 个 CG 上达到了理论峰值性能的 34.8%，并模拟了具有超过 100 万个原子的系统的电子动力学，包括局部-半局部和混合泛函。这项工作将计算规模提高了两个数量级，为探索大规模材料和纳米光子器件中的超快动力学开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Cosmological Hydrodynamics at Exascale: A Trillion-Particle Leap in Capability.
items.abstract: Resolving the most fundamental questions in cosmology requires simulations that match the scale, fidelity, and physical complexity demanded by next-generation sky surveys. To achieve the realism needed for this critical scientific partnership, detailed gas dynamics must be treated self-consistently with gravity for end-to-end modeling of structure formation. Exascale computing enables simulations that span survey-scale volumes while incorporating key astrophysical processes that shape complex cosmic structures. We present results from CRK-HACC, a cosmological hydrodynamics code built for extreme scalability. Using separation-of-scale techniques, GPU-resident tree solvers, in situ analysis pipelines, and multi-tiered I/O, CRK-HACCexecuted Frontier-E: a four trillion particle full-sky simulation, over an order of magnitude larger than previous efforts. The run achieved 513.1 PFLOPs peak performance, processing 46.6 billion particles per second and writing more than 100 PB of data in just over one week of runtime. Frontier-E marks a significant advance in predictive modeling for next-generation cosmological science.
items.abstract_zh: 解决宇宙学中最基本的问题需要进行与下一代天空勘测所需的规模、保真度和物理复杂性相匹配的模拟。为了实现这一关键科学伙伴关系所需的真实性，必须将详细的气体动力学与重力进行自洽处理，以进行结构形成的端到端建模。百亿亿次计算可以实现跨越勘测规模体积的模拟，同时结合塑造复杂宇宙结构的关键天体物理过程。我们展示了 CRK-HACC 的结果，这是一种专为极端可扩展性而构建的宇宙流体动力学代码。使用尺度分离技术、GPU 驻留树求解器、原位分析管道和多层 I/O，CRK-HACC 执行了 Frontier-E：4 万亿粒子全天空模拟，比之前的工作大了一个数量级。该运行实现了 513.1 PFLOPs 峰值性能，每秒处理 466 亿个粒子，并在一周多一点的运行时间内写入超过 100 PB 的数据。 Frontier-E 标志着下一代宇宙学科学预测模型的重大进步。

items.title: T2-RELION: Task Parallelism, Tensor Core Accelerated RELION for Cryo-EM 3D Reconstruction.
items.abstract: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is a key technique for structural biology, but its computational efficiency, particularly during 3D reconstruction, remains a bottleneck. We introduce T2-RELION, a highly optimized version of RELION for cryo-EM 3D reconstruction on CPU-GPU platforms. RELION is a widely used open-source package in the cryo-EM community. We identify and resolve key inefficiencies in RELION’s parallelization strategy and memory management by proposing task parallelism and a three-phase GPU memory management strategy. Furthermore, we leverage Tensor Cores to accelerate the hot-spot kernel for difference calculation, employing an advanced pipelining strategy to hide latency and enable thread-block-level data reuse. On a quad-A100 GPU machine, performance evaluations demonstrate that T2-RELION outperforms RELION 4.0. For the hot-spot kernel, our optimizations achieve 1.90-23.7 times speedup. For the whole application using CNG and Trpv1 datasets, we observe 3.86 times and 2.68 times speedups, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 是结构生物学的一项关键技术，但其计算效率，特别是在 3D 重建过程中，仍然是一个瓶颈。我们推出 T2-RELION，这是 RELION 的高度优化版本，用于 CPU-GPU 平台上的冷冻电镜 3D 重建。 RELION 是冷冻电镜社区中广泛使用的开源软件包。我们通过提出任务并行性和三相 GPU 内存管理策略来识别并解决 RELION 并行化策略和内存管理中的关键低效问题。此外，我们利用 Tensor Core 来加速差异计算的热点内核，采用先进的流水线策略来隐藏延迟并实现线程块级数据重用。在四核 A100 GPU 机器上，性能评估表明 T2-RELION 优于 RELION 4.0。对于热点内核，我们的优化实现了 1.90-23.7 倍的加速。对于使用 CNG 和 Trpv1 数据集的整个应用程序，我们分别观察到 3.86 倍和 2.68 倍的加速。

items.title: Accelerated Spatio-Temporal Bayesian Modeling for Multivariate Gaussian Processes.
items.abstract: Multivariate Gaussian processes (GPs) offer a powerful probabilistic framework to represent complex interdependent phenomena. They pose, however, significant computational challenges in high-dimensional settings, which frequently arise in spatio-temporal applications. We present DALIA, a highly scalable framework for performing Bayesian inference tasks on spatio-temporal multivariate GPs, based on the methodology of integrated nested Laplace approximations. Our approach relies on a sparse inverse covariance matrix formulation of the GP, puts forward a GPU-accelerated block-dense approach, and introduces a hierarchical, triple-layer, distributed-memory parallel scheme. We showcase weak-scaling performance surpassing the state of the art by two orders of magnitude on a model whose parameter space is 8 × larger and measure strong-scaling speedups of three orders of magnitude when running on 496 GH200 superchips on the Alps supercomputer. Applying DALIA to an air pollution study over northern Italy spanning 48 days, we showcase refined spatial resolutions over the aggregated pollutant measurements.
items.abstract_zh: 多元高斯过程 (GP) 提供了强大的概率框架来表示复杂的相互依赖的现象。然而，它们在高维设置中提出了重大的计算挑战，这在时空应用中经常出现。我们提出了 DALIA，一个高度可扩展的框架，用于基于集成嵌套拉普拉斯近似的方法在时空多元 GP 上执行贝叶斯推理任务。我们的方法依赖于 GP 的稀疏逆协方差矩阵公式，提出了 GPU 加速的块密集方法，并引入了分层、三层、分布式内存并行方案。我们在参数空间大 8 倍的模型上展示了超越现有技术两个数量级的弱扩展性能，并在 Alps 超级计算机上的 496 个 GH200 超级芯片上运行时测量了三个数量级的强扩展加速。我们将 DALIA 应用于意大利北部为期 48 天的空气污染研究，展示了聚合污染物测量结果的精细空间分辨率。

items.title: TianheEngine: Hierarchy-aware Adaptive Partitioning System for Trillion-scale Graph Processing.
items.abstract: Graph partitioning is essential for effectively managing multi-trillion-edge graphs in distributed computing systems, particularly those spanning hierarchical architectures with thousands of computing nodes. Traditional partitioning strategies neglect hierarchical communication variances across modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems, leading to prohibitive cross overhead when processing trillion-scale graphs. We propose TianheEngine, a hierarchy-aware adaptive partitioning system that takes advantage of the communication hierarchy of the underlying distributed computing system and the sparsity characteristics of the input graphs to improve communication efficiency. We evaluated TianheEngine on fundamental graph operations using both synthetic and real-world datasets. Our extensive experiments use up to 79,024 computing nodes and over 1.2 million processor cores. Experimental results show that TianheEngine is superior to state-of-the-art graph partitioning methods and parallel graph systems and outperforms top-ranked systems on the latest Graph 500 list.
items.abstract_zh: 图分区对于有效管理分布式计算系统中的数万亿边图至关重要，特别是那些跨越具有数千个计算节点的分层架构的系统。传统的分区策略忽略了现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的分层通信差异，导致在处理万亿级图形时出现过高的交叉开销。我们提出了TianheEngine，一种层次结构感知的自适应分区系统，它利用底层分布式计算系统的通信层次结构和输入图的稀疏特性来提高通信效率。我们使用合成数据集和真实数据集评估了 TianheEngine 的基本图操作。我们的广泛实验使用了多达 79,024 个计算节点和超过 120 万个处理器内核。实验结果表明，TianheEngine 优于最先进的图划分方法和并行图系统，并且优于最新 Graph 500 排行榜上排名靠前的系统。

items.title: Qonductor: A Cloud Orchestrator for Quantum Computing.
items.abstract: We describe Qonductor, a cloud orchestrator for hybrid quantum-classical applications that run on heterogeneous hybrid resources. Qonductor abstracts away the complexity of hybrid programming and resource management by exposing the Qonductor API, a high-level and hardware-agnostic API. The resource estimator strategically balances quantum and classical resources to mitigate resource contention and the effects of hardware noise. The hybrid scheduler automates job scheduling on hybrid resources and balances the tradeoff between users’ objectives of QoS and the cloud operator’s objective of resource efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 我们描述了 Qonductor，一个用于在异构混合资源上运行的混合量子经典应用程序的云编排器。 Qonductor 通过公开 Qonductor API（一种与硬件无关的高级 API），抽象化了混合编程和资源管理的复杂性。资源估计器策略性地平衡量子资源和经典资源，以减轻资源争用和硬件噪声的影响。混合调度器自动执行混合资源上的作业调度，并平衡用户的 QoS 目标和云运营商的资源效率目标之间的权衡。

items.title: Stability-preserving Lossy Compression for Large-scale Partial Differential Equations.
items.abstract: Checkpoint/Restart (C/R) strategies are vital for fault tolerance in PDE-based scientific simulations, yet traditional checkpointing incurs significant I/O overhead. Lossy compression offers a scalable solution by reducing checkpoint data size, but conventional methods often lack control over physical invariants (e.g., energy), leading to instability such as oscillations or divergence in Partial Differential Equations (PDE) systems. This paper introduces a stability-preserving compression approach tailored for PDE simulations by explicitly controlling kinetic and potential energy perturbations to ensure stable restarts. Extensive experiments conducted across diverse PDE configurations demonstrate that our method maintains numerical stability with minimal error magnification—even across multiple checkpoint-restart cycles—outperforming state-of-the-art lossy compressors. Parallel evaluations on the Frontier supercomputer show up to 8.4× improvement in checkpoint write performance and 6.3× in read performance, while maintaining relative L2 errors ∼ 2e-6 throughout continued simulation. These results provide practical guidance for balancing compression accuracy, stability, and computational efficiency in large-scale PDE applications.
items.abstract_zh: 检查点/重启 (C/R) 策略对于基于偏微分方程的科学模拟中的容错至关重要，但传统的检查点会产生大量 I/O 开销。有损压缩通过减少检查点数据大小提供了可扩展的解决方案，但传统方法通常缺乏对物理不变量（例如能量）的控制，导致偏微分方程（PDE）系统中出现振荡或发散等不稳定问题。本文介绍了一种为 PDE 模拟量身定制的保持稳定性的压缩方法，通过显式控制动能和势能扰动来确保稳定重启。在不同的偏微分方程配置上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法即使在多个检查点重启周期中也能以最小的误差放大保持数值稳定性，优于最先进的有损压缩器。 Frontier 超级计算机上的并行评估显示，检查点写入性能提高了 8.4 倍，读取性能提高了 6.3 倍，同时在整个持续模拟过程中保持相对 L2 错误 ∼ 2e-6。这些结果为平衡大规模偏微分方程应用中的压缩精度、稳定性和计算效率提供了实用指导。

items.title: Bridging the Gap Between Binary and Source Based Package Management in Spack.
items.abstract: Binary package managers install software quickly but they limit configurability due to rigid ABI requirements that ensure compatibility between binaries. Source package managers provide flexibility in building software, but compilation can be slow. For example, installing an HPC code with a new MPI implementation may result in a full rebuild. Spack, a widely deployed, HPC-focused package manager, can use source and pre-compiled binaries, but lacks a binary compatibility model, so it cannot mix binaries not built together. We present splicing, an extension to Spack that models binary compatibility between packages and allows seamless mixing of source and binary distributions. Splicing augments Spack’s packaging language and dependency resolution engine to reuse compatible binaries but maintains the flexibility of source builds. It incurs minimal installation-time overhead and allows rapid installation from binaries, even for ABI-sensitive dependencies like MPI that would otherwise require many rebuilds.
items.abstract_zh: 二进制包管理器可以快速安装软件，但由于严格的 ABI 要求（确保二进制文件之间的兼容性），它们限制了可配置性。源包管理器为构建软件提供了灵活性，但编译速度可能很慢。例如，安装具有新 MPI 实现的 HPC 代码可能会导致完全重建。 Spack 是一种广泛部署的、以 HPC 为中心的包管理器，可以使用源代码和预编译的二进制文件，但缺乏二进制兼容性模型，因此它无法混合未构建在一起的二进制文件。我们提出了拼接，它是 Spack 的一个扩展，它可以模拟包之间的二进制兼容性，并允许源代码和二进制发行版的无缝混合。拼接增强了 Spack 的打包语言和依赖解析引擎以重用兼容的二进制文件，但保持了源代码构建的灵活性。它会产生最小的安装时间开销，并允许从二进制文件快速安装，甚至对于像 MPI 这样的 ABI 敏感依赖项也是如此，否则需要多次重建。

items.title: coMtainer: Compilation-assisted HPC Container Images with Enhanced Adaptability.
items.abstract: The increasing interconnectivity of HPC systems has highlighted the need for efficient application migration across different environments. Containers, widely adopted for this purpose, simplify deployment but often fail to deliver optimal performance due to the separated build and execution container workflow. This leads to generic container images that miss out on system-specific software stack advantages, a challenge we define as the adaptability issue.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 系统日益增强的互连性凸显了跨不同环境高效应用程序迁移的需求。为此目的而广泛采用的容器可以简化部署，但由于构建和执行容器工作流程是分开的，因此通常无法提供最佳性能。这导致通用容器镜像错过了特定于系统的软件堆栈优势，我们将这一挑战定义为适应性问题。

items.title: Reproducibility Report for SC25 Paper Zero-Value Code Specialization via Profile-Guided Control Data Flow Analysis.
items.abstract: This reproducibility report provides details about the artifact evaluation done with regards to the Artifact Description and Evaluation appendix of SC25 paper Zero-Value Code Specialization via Profile-Guided Control Data Flow Analysis by Xin You, Yi Liu, Yufan Xu, kelun Lei, Depei Qian, Shaokang Du, Hailong Yang, and Zhongzhi Luan. The work was done as part of the Reproducibility Initiative of SC25. The author is a member of the SC25 Reproducibility Committee.
items.abstract_zh: 该再现性报告提供了有关 SC25 论文《通过配置文件引导控制数据流分析实现零值代码专业化》的工件描述和评估附录的工件评估的详细信息，作者为 Xin You、Yi Liu、Yufan Xu、kelun Lei、Depei qian、Shaokang Du、Hailong Yang 和zhongzhi Luan。这项工作是作为 SC25 再现性倡议的一部分完成的。作者是 SC25 再现性委员会成员。

items.title: BLAZE: Exploiting Hybrid Parallelism and Size-customized Kernels to Accelerate BLASTP on GPUs.
items.abstract: Basic Local Alignment Search Tool (BLAST/BLASTP) [3], often referred to as the Google of biological research [9], is widely used to query a large database to find homologous gene/protein sequences. Though there have been attempts to accelerate BLASTP, the protein sequence alignment tool, on GPUs, they remain slower than CPU/multicore-based multi-threaded implementations. In this paper, we introduce BLAZE, a GPU-accelerated drop-in replacement for BLASTP that produces identical results while achieving speedups over both multithreaded and GPU-accelerated implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 基本局部比对搜索工具（BLAST/BLASTP）[3]，通常被称为生物研究的谷歌[9]，被广泛用于查询大型数据库以查找同源基因/蛋白质序列。尽管已经尝试在 GPU 上加速 BLASTP（蛋白质序列比对工具），但它们仍然比基于 CPU/多核的多线程实现慢。在本文中，我们介绍了 BLAZE，它是 BLASTP 的 GPU 加速直接替代品，可产生相同的结果，同时比多线程和 GPU 加速实现实现加速。

items.title: Deep Learning-Enabled Supercritical Flame Simulation at Detailed Chemistry and Real-Fluid Accuracy Towards Trillion-Cell Scale.
items.abstract: For decades, supercritical flame simulations incorporating detailed chemistry and real-fluid transport have been limited to millions of cells, constraining the resolved spatial and temporal scales of the physical system. We optimize the supercritical flame simulation software DeepFlame—which incorporates deep neural networks while retaining the real-fluid mechanical and chemical accuracy—from three perspectives: parallel computing, computational efficiency, and I/O performance. Our highly optimized DeepFlame achieves supercritical liquid oxygen/methane (LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\)) turbulent combustion simulation of up to 618 and 154 billion cells with unprecedented time-to-solution, attaining 439/1186 and 187/316 PFlop/s (32.3%/21.8% and 37.4%/31.8% of the peak) in FP32/mixed-FP16 precision on Sunway (98,304 nodes) and Fugaku (73,728 nodes) supercomputers, respectively. This computational capability surpasses existing capacities by three orders of magnitude, enabling the first practical simulation of rocket engine combustion with >100 LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\) injectors. This breakthrough establishes high-fidelity supercritical flame modeling as a critical design tool for next-generation rocket propulsion and ultra-high energy density systems.
items.abstract_zh: 几十年来，结合详细化学和真实流体传输的超临界火焰模拟仅限于数百万个细胞，限制了物理系统的解析空间和时间尺度。我们从并行计算、计算效率和I/O性能三个角度对超临界火焰模拟软件DeepFlame进行了优化，该软件结合了深度神经网络，同时保留了真实流体的力学和化学精度。我们高度优化的 DeepFlame 实现了多达 618 和 1540 亿个细胞的超临界液氧/甲烷 (LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\)) 湍流燃烧模拟，求解速度前所未有，在分别在 Sunway（98,304 个节点）和 Fugaku（73,728 个节点）超级计算机上实现 FP32/混合 FP16 精度。这种计算能力超出现有能力三个数量级，首次实现了使用 >100 个 LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\) 喷射器的火箭发动机燃烧的实际模拟。这一突破将高保真超临界火焰建模确立为下一代火箭推进和超高能量密度系统的关键设计工具。

items.title: Destination Earth: The Climate Change Adaptation Digital Twin.
items.abstract: We present the first digital twin framework that operationalizes the production of multi-decadal, global climate projections at kilometre-scale resolution, developed within the European Union’s Destination Earth initiative. Using three coupled Earth system models and selected impact-sector applications, we have built end-to-end workflows for both regular and on-demand climate projections on two EuroHPC supercomputers, LUMI and MareNostrum5. These workflows produced the first-ever multi-decadal simulations at 5 km resolution across all major Earth system components, using the same output parameters and grid, and achieving a production throughput of 0.6 simulated years per day and a climate data portfolio of 6.6 petabytes. We demonstrate the scalability of two of these Earth system models across both CPU and GPU-based systems at global resolutions up to 1 km, across atmosphere, ocean, land, and sea-ice, and report record-breaking full-machine performance on LUMI and MareNostrum5 of up to 97 simulated days per day at 1 km resolution.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个数字孪生框架，该框架可在欧盟“目的地地球”倡议中开发，以千米级分辨率实现多十年全球气候预测的生成。使用三个耦合的地球系统模型和选定的影响部门应用程序，我们在两台 EuroHPC 超级计算机 LUMI 和 MareNostrum5 上构建了定期和按需气候预测的端到端工作流程。这些工作流程使用相同的输出参数和网格，在所有主要地球系统组件中首次以 5 公里分辨率进行了多年代际模拟，并实现了每天 0.6 年模拟的生产吞吐量和 6.6 PB 的气候数据组合。我们展示了其中两个地球系统模型在基于 CPU 和 GPU 的系统上的可扩展性，全局分辨率高达 1 公里，跨越大气层、海洋、陆地和海冰，并报告了 LUMI 和 MareNostrum5 上破纪录的全机性能，在 1 公里分辨率下每天模拟多达 97 天。

items.title: Matrix Is All You Need: Rearchitecting Quantum Chemistry to Scale on AI Accelerators.
Characterizing Performance, Power, and Energy of AMD CDNA3 GPU Family.
items.abstract: While historically used for graphics applications, Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) have become the most prominent hardware for accelerating parallel workloads, including HPC and AI/ML. As the demand for GPUs skyrockets, AMD released the CDNA3 architecture to accelerate HPC and generative AI. This paper serves as a comprehensive third-party evaluation of the AMD CDNA3 GPU, specifically the MI300X and MI325X, by characterizing their performance, power, and energy efficiency using microbenchmark and real-world applications.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然图形处理单元 (GPU) 历史上用于图形应用程序，但它已成为加速并行工作负载（包括 HPC 和 AI/ML）的最重要的硬件。随着 GPU 需求的飙升，AMD 发布了 CDNA3 架构来加速 HPC 和生成式 AI。本文通过使用微基准测试和实际应用来表征 AMD CDNA3 GPU（特别是 MI300X 和 MI325X）的性能、功耗和能效，对 AMD CDNA3 GPU（特别是 MI300X 和 MI325X）进行了全面的第三方评估。

items.title: AERIS: Argonne Earth Systems Model for Reliable and Skillful Predictions.
items.abstract: Generative machine learning offers new opportunities to better understand complex Earth system dynamics. Recent diffusion-based methods address spectral biases and improve ensemble calibration in weather forecasting compared to deterministic methods, yet have so far proven difficult to scale stably at high resolutions. We introduce AERIS, a 1.3 to 80B parameter pixel-level Swin diffusion transformer to address this gap, and SWiPe, a generalizable technique that composes window parallelism with sequence and pipeline parallelism to shard window-based transformers without added communication cost or increased global batch size. On Aurora (10,080 nodes), AERIS sustains 10.21 ExaFLOPS (mixed precision) and a peak performance of 11.21 ExaFLOPS with 1 × 1 patch size on the 0.25° ERA5 dataset, achieving 95.5% weak scaling efficiency, and 81.6% strong scaling efficiency. AERIS outperforms the IFS ENS and remains stable on seasonal scales to 90 days, highlighting the potential of billion-parameter diffusion models for weather and climate prediction.
items.abstract_zh: 生成机器学习为更好地理解复杂的地球系统动力学提供了新的机会。与确定性方法相比，最近基于扩散的方法解决了光谱偏差并改进了天气预报中的集合校准，但迄今为止已证明难以在高分辨率下稳定扩展。我们引入了 AERIS（一种 1.3 至 80B 参数的像素级 Swin 扩散变压器）来解决这一差距，以及 SWiPe（一种通用技术），它将窗口并行性与序列和管道并行性组合到基于分片窗口的变压器中，而无需增加通信成本或增加全局批量大小。在 Aurora（10,080 个节点）上，AERIS 在 0.25° ERA5 数据集上维持了 10.21 ExaFLOPS（混合精度）和 1 × 1 patch 大小的 11.21 ExaFLOPS 峰值性能，实现了 95.5% 的弱扩展效率和 81.6% 的强扩展效率。 AERIS 的性能优于 IFS ENS，并且在 90 天的季节性尺度上保持稳定，凸显了十亿参数扩散模型在天气和气候预测方面的潜力。

items.title: Addressing Reproducibility Challenges in HPC with Continuous Integration.
items.abstract: The high-performance computing (HPC) community has adopted incentive structures to motivate reproducible research, with major conferences awarding badges to papers that meet reproducibility requirements. Yet, many papers do not meet such requirements. The uniqueness of HPC infrastructure and software, coupled with strict access requirements, may limit opportunities for reproducibility. In the absence of resource access, we believe that regular documented testing, through continuous integration (CI), coupled with complete provenance information, can be used as a substitute. Here, we argue that better HPC-compliant CI solutions will improve reproducibility of applications. We present a survey of reproducibility initiatives and describe the barriers to reproducibility in HPC. To address existing limitations, we present a GitHub Action, CORRECT, that enables secure execution of tests on remote HPC resources. We evaluate CORRECT’s usability across three different types of HPC applications, demonstrating the effectiveness of using CORRECT for automating and documenting reproducibility evaluations.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 社区已采用激励结构来激励可重复性研究，大型会议会向满足可重复性要求的论文颁发徽章。然而，许多论文不符合这些要求。 HPC 基础设施和软件的独特性，加上严格的访问要求，可能会限制再现性的机会。在无法访问资源的情况下，我们相信通过持续集成 (CI) 进行的定期记录测试以及完整的来源信息可以作为替代方案。在这里，我们认为更好的符​​合 HPC 的 CI 解决方案将提高应用程序的可重复性。我们对可重复性计划进行了调查，并描述了 HPC 中可重复性的障碍。为了解决现有的限制，我们提出了一个 GitHub 操作 CORRECT，它可以在远程 HPC 资源上安全执行测试。我们评估了 CORRECT 在三种不同类型的 HPC 应用程序中的可用性，证明了使用 CORRECT 来自动化和记录再现性评估的有效性。

items.title: StraGCN: GPU-Accelerated Strassen's Sparse-Dense Matrix Multiplication for Graph Convolutional Network Training.
Real-Time Bayesian Inference at Extreme Scale: A Digital Twin for Tsunami Early Warning Applied to the Cascadia Subduction Zone.
items.abstract: We present a Bayesian inversion-based digital twin that employs acoustic pressure data from seafloor sensors, along with 3D coupled acoustic–gravity wave equations, to infer earthquake-induced spatiotemporal seafloor motion in real time and forecast tsunami propagation toward coastlines for early warning with quantified uncertainties. Our target is the Cascadia subduction zone, with one billion parameters. Computing the posterior mean alone would require 50 years on a 512 GPU machine. Instead, exploiting the shift invariance of the parameter-to-observable map and devising novel parallel algorithms, we induce a fast offline–online decomposition. The offline component requires just one adjoint wave propagation per sensor; using MFEM, we scale this part of the computation to the full El Capitan system (43,520 GPUs) with 92% weak parallel efficiency. Moreover, given real-time data, the online component exactly solves the Bayesian inverse and forecasting problems in 0.2 seconds on a modest GPU system, a ten-billion-fold speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于贝叶斯反演的数字孪生，它利用海底传感器的声压数据以及 3D 耦合声重力波方程来实时推断地震引起的时空海底运动，并预测海啸向海岸线的传播，以进行具有量化不确定性的早期预警。我们的目标是卡斯卡迪亚俯冲带，有十亿个参数。在 512 个 GPU 的机器上，仅计算后验平均值就需要 50 年。相反，利用参数到可观察映射的平移不变性并设计新颖的并行算法，我们引入了快速的离线-在线分解。离线组件只需要每个传感器进行一次伴随波传播；使用 MFEM，我们将这部分计算扩展到完整的 El Capitan 系统（43,520 个 GPU），弱并行效率为 92%。此外，在给定实时数据的情况下，在线组件可以在普通 GPU 系统上在 0.2 秒内准确解决贝叶斯逆和预测问题，加速了 100 亿倍。

items.title: The First Star-by-star $N$-body/Hydrodynamics Simulation of Our Galaxy Coupling with a Surrogate Model.
items.abstract: A major goal of computational astrophysics is to simulate the Milky Way Galaxy with sufficient resolution down to individual stars. However, the scaling fails due to some small-scale, short-timescale phenomena, such as supernova explosions. We have developed a novel integration scheme of N-body/hydrodynamics simulations working with machine learning. This approach bypasses the short timesteps caused by supernova explosions using a surrogate model, thereby improving scalability. With this method, we reached 300 billion particles using 148,900 nodes, equivalent to 7,147,200 CPU cores, breaking through the billion-particle barrier currently faced by state-of-the-art simulations. This resolution allows us to perform the first star-by-star galaxy simulation, which resolves individual stars in the Milky Way Galaxy. The performance scales over 104 CPU cores, an upper limit in the current state-of-the-art simulations using both A64FX and X86-64 processors and NVIDIA CUDA GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 计算天体物理学的一个主要目标是以足够的分辨率模拟银河系，直至单个恒星。然而，由于一些小尺度、短时间尺度的现象，例如超新星爆炸，缩放会失败。我们开发了一种新颖的 N 体/流体动力学模拟与机器学习的集成方案。这种方法使用代理模型绕过了超新星爆炸引起的短时间步长，从而提高了可扩展性。通过这种方法，我们使用 148,900 个节点（相当于 7,147,200 个 CPU 核心）达到了 3000 亿个粒子，突破了当前最先进的模拟所面临的十亿个粒子的障碍。这一分辨率使我们能够执行第一次逐星星系模拟，解析银河系中的单个恒星。性能扩展到超过 104 个 CPU 核心，这是使用 A64FX 和 X86-64 处理器以及 NVIDIA CUDA GPU 的当前最先进模拟的上限。

items.title: RAPTOR: Practical Numerical Profiling of Scientific Applications.
items.abstract: The proliferation of low-precision units in modern high-performance architectures increasingly burdens domain scientists. Historically, the choice in HPC was easy: can we get away with 32 bit floating-point operations and lower bandwidth requirements, or is FP64 necessary? Driven by Artificial Intelligence, vendors introduce novel low-precision units for vector and tensor operations, and FP64 capabilities stagnate or are reduced. This forces scientists to re-evaluate their codes, but a trivial search-and-replace approach to go from FP64 to FP16 will not suffice.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能架构中低精度单元的激增日益增加了领域科学家的负担。从历史上看，HPC 的选择很简单：我们可以摆脱 32 位浮点运算和较低的带宽要求，还是需要 FP64？在人工智能的推动下，供应商推出了用于矢量和张量运算的新型低精度单元，FP64 功能停滞或减少。这迫使科学家重新评估他们的代码，但从 FP64 到 FP16 的简单搜索和替换方法是不够的。

items.title: Utilizing Sparsity in the GPU-accelerated Assembly of Schur Complement Matrices in Domain Decomposition Methods.
items.abstract: Schur complement matrices emerge in many domain decomposition methods that can utilize supercomputers to solve complex engineering problems. As most of today’s high-performance clusters’ performance lies in GPUs, these methods should also be accelerated.
items.abstract_zh: Schur 补矩阵出现在许多领域分解方法中，可以利用超级计算机来解决复杂的工程问题。由于当今大多数高性能集群的性能都在于GPU，因此这些方法也应该得到加速。

items.title: Compile-Time QoS Scheme for Deep Learning Inferences.
items.abstract: With the proliferation of deep learning technologies across various service domains, the sharing of accelerators such as GPUs, TPUs, and NPUs for inference processing has become increasingly common. These accelerators must efficiently handle multiple deep learning services operating concurrently. However, inference requests, characterized by sequences of short-duration kernels, create significant challenges for online schedulers attempting to maintain Quality of Service (QoS) guarantees. This paper presents QoSlicer, a novel compile-time QoS management framework that employs kernel slicing to relieve the burden on schedulers. By generating multiple pre-determined slicing plans, QoSlicer enables more efficient, lightweight QoS scheduling while ensuring target latency requirements are met. Our approach incorporates a heuristic search algorithm to identify optimal slicing plans and implements robust performance estimation models to validate these plans. Our experimental evaluation across 75 diverse workload combinations demonstrates that QoSlicer improves throughput by an average of 20.2% compared to state-of-the-art scheduling techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习技术在各个服务领域的普及，用于推理处理的 GPU、TPU 和 NPU 等加速器的共享变得越来越普遍。这些加速器必须有效地处理同时运行的多个深度学习服务。然而，以短持续时间内核序列为特征的推理请求给试图维持服务质量 (QoS) 保证的在线调度程序带来了重大挑战。本文提出了 QoSlicer，这是一种新颖的编译时 QoS 管理框架，它采用内核切片来减轻调度程序的负担。通过生成多个预先确定的切片计划，QoSlicer 可以实现更高效、轻量级的 QoS 调度，同时确保满足目标延迟要求。我们的方法采用启发式搜索算法来识别最佳切片计划，并实施稳健的性能估计模型来验证这些计划。我们对 75 种不同的工作负载组合进行的实验评估表明，与最先进的调度技术相比，QoSlicer 的吞吐量平均提高了 20.2%。

items.title: LiquidGEMM: Hardware-Efficient W4A8 GEMM Kernel for High-Performance LLM Serving.
items.abstract: Quantization is a critical technique for accelerating LLM inference by reducing memory footprint and improving computational efficiency. Among various schemes, 4-bit weight and 8-bit activation quantization (W4A8) offers a strong balance between accuracy and performance. However, existing W4A8 GEMM kernels fall short in practice due to inefficient dequantization on CUDA Cores, which cannot keep pace with the high throughput of Tensor Cores. In this paper, we present LiquidGEMM, a hardware-efficient W4A8 GEMM kernel for efficient LLM serving. LiquidGEMM designs two key techniques: LiquidQuant, a hardware-efficient quantization method that enables fast, overflow-safe dequantization using just two arithmetic instructions per four elements; and an implicit fine-grained pipeline that fully overlaps weight loading, dequantization, and MMA across warp groups without software synchronization or redundant memory traffic. Experimental results show that LiquidGEMM achieves up to 2.90x speedup over state-of-the-art W4A8 kernels and up to 4.94x end-to-end system-level speedup. Compared to various quantized GEMM kernels in NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, LiquidGEMM delivers 1.12-1.63x performance gains, and achieves up to 1.63x system-level speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 量化是通过减少内存占用和提高计算效率来加速 LLM 推理的关键技术。在各种方案中，4 位权重和 8 位激活量化 (W4A8) 在精度和性能之间提供了强有力的平衡。然而，由于 CUDA 核心上的反量化效率低下，现有的 W4A8 GEMM 内核在实践中存在不足，无法跟上 Tensor 核心的高吞吐量。在本文中，我们提出了 LiquidGEMM，这是一种硬件高效的 W4A8 GEMM 内核，用于高效的 LLM 服务。 LiquidGEMM 设计了两项关键技术：LiquidQuant，一种硬件高效的量化方法，每四个元素仅使用两个算术指令即可实现快速、溢出安全的反量化；隐式细粒度管道可跨扭曲组完全重叠权重加载、反量化和 MMA，无需软件同步或冗余内存流量。实验结果表明，LiquidGEMM 比最先进的 W4A8 内核实现高达 2.90 倍的加速，以及高达 4.94 倍的端到端系统级加速。与 NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM 中的各种量化 GEMM 内核相比，LiquidGEMM 提供 1.12-1.63 倍的性能提升，并实现高达 1.63 倍的系统级加速。

items.title: GPU Lossy Compression for HPC Can Be Versatile and Ultra-Fast.
items.abstract: This work proposes VGC, a versatile and ultra-fast GPU lossy compression framework designed to address the growing data challenges in high-performance computing (HPC). VGC captures dimension information in scientific data and supports three compression algorithms, achieving high compression ratios across diverse HPC domains. Built with a highly optimized GPU kernel, VGC delivers state-of-the-art throughput with error control. In addition to compression ratio and speed, VGC supports two distinctive modes that enhance its versatility. Memory-efficient Compression uses a kernel fission design to compute compressed size, allocate only the required GPU memory, and compress data without waste, effectively reducing memory footprint. Selective Decompression introduces an early stopping mechanism that enables direct access to regions of interest without decompressing the entire dataset.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 VGC，这是一种多功能且超快速的 GPU 有损压缩框架，旨在解决高性能计算 (HPC) 中日益增长的数据挑战。 VGC捕获科学数据中的维度信息并支持三种压缩算法，在不同的HPC领域实现高压缩比。 VGC 采用高度优化的 GPU 内核构建，可提供最先进的吞吐量和错误控制。除了压缩比和速度之外，VGC 还支持两种独特的模式，增强了其多功能性。内存高效压缩采用内核裂变设计计算压缩大小，仅分配所需的GPU内存，压缩数据不浪费，有效减少内存占用。选择性解压缩引入了一种早期停止机制，可以直接访问感兴趣的区域，而无需解压缩整个数据集。

items.title: lsCOMP: Efficient Light Source Compression.
items.abstract: Light source facilities, which generate X-rays for probing microstructures and dynamic processes, produce intense data streams, reaching up to 250 GB/s and projected to exceed 1 TB/s by the end of this decade. Managing such massive data poses critical challenges due to limited local processing capacity and bandwidth constraints when offloading data to HPC systems. To address these challenges, we propose lsCOMP, a GPU compressor that operates within a single kernel. lsCOMP supports both lossless and configurable lossy compression, ensuring high compression ratios and preserved data quality across diverse light source applications. On a single NVIDIA A100 GPU, lsCOMP achieves compression throughputs of 380.89 to 509.21 GB/s in lossless mode, delivering up to 20 times higher performance than industry-leading GPU compressors while achieving superior compression ratios. In lossy modes, lsCOMP further improves throughput and ratios significantly. Additionally, lsCOMP demonstrates versatile performance across various integer datasets and supports TB/s-level random access throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 光源设施产生 X 射线以探测微观结构和动态过程，产生密集的数据流，速度高达 250 GB/s，预计到本十年末将超过 1 TB/s。在将数据卸载到 HPC 系统时，由于本地处理能力有限和带宽限制，管理如此海量的数据面临着严峻的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 lsCOMP，一种在单个内核中运行的 GPU 压缩器。 lsCOMP 支持无损和可配置的有损压缩，确保高压缩比并在不同光源应用中保持数据质量。在单个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上，lsCOMP 在无损模式下可实现 380.89 至 509.21 GB/s 的压缩吞吐量，其性能比业界领先的 GPU 压缩器高出 20 倍，同时实现卓越的压缩比。在有损模式下，lsCOMP 进一步显着提高吞吐量和比率。此外，lsCOMP 展示了跨各种整数数据集的通用性能，并支持 TB/s 级别的随机访问吞吐量。

items.title: Workload Intelligence: Workload-Aware IaaS abstraction for Cloud Efficiency.
items.abstract: Today, cloud workloads are largely opaque to the cloud platform. Typically, the only information the platform receives is the virtual machine (VM) type and possibly a decoration to the type (e.g., the VM is evictable). Similarly, workloads receive minimal information from the platform; generally, only telemetry from their VMs or occasional signals (e.g., just before a VM is evicted). The narrow interface between workloads and platforms has several drawbacks: (1) a surge in VM types and decorations in public cloud platforms complicates customer selection; (2) key workload characteristics (e.g., low availability requirements) are often unspecified, hindering platform customization for optimized resource usage and cost savings; and (3) workloads may be unaware of potential optimizations or lack sufficient time to react to platform events. To resolve these issues and improve cloud efficiency, we propose Workload Intelligence (WI), a framework for enabling dynamic bi-directional communication between cloud workloads and cloud platform.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，云工作负载对于云平台来说基本上是不透明的。通常，平台接收的唯一信息是虚拟机 (VM) 类型以及可能对该类型的修饰（例如，VM 是可驱逐的）。同样，工作负载从平台接收的信息最少；通常，仅从其虚拟机或偶尔的信号（例如，就在虚拟机被驱逐之前）进行遥测。工作负载和平台之间的狭窄接口有几个缺点：（1）公共云平台中虚拟机类型和装饰的激增使客户选择变得复杂； (2) 关键工作负载特征（例如，低可用性要求）通常未指定，阻碍了平台定制以优化资源使用和节省成本； (3) 工作负载可能不知道潜在的优化或缺乏足够的时间对平台事件做出反应。为了解决这些问题并提高云效率，我们提出了工作负载智能（WI），这是一个用于在云工作负载和云平台之间实现动态双向通信的框架。

items.title: HStencil: Matrix-Vector Stencil Computation with Interleaved Outer Product and MLA.
items.abstract: Stencil computations are fundamental to various HPC and intelligent computing applications, often consuming significant execution time. The emergence of specialized matrix units presents new opportunities to accelerate stencil computations. While scalable matrix compute units provide substantial computing horsepower, prior efforts fail to fully utilize the computing capabilities for stencils due to suboptimal matrix-unit utilization, limited instruction-level parallelism, and low cache hit rates. This paper introduces HStencil, a novel stencil computing framework utilizing matrix and vector units. HStencil addresses these challenges through three contributions: 1) microkernels that jointly leverage matrix and vector units to enhance hardware utilization; 2) fine-grained instruction scheduling with interleaved execution to enhance instruction-level parallelism; and 3) spatial prefetch to sustain high performance when working sets exceed cache capacity. Evaluations on representative benchmarks demonstrate that HStencil achieves maximum speedups of 1.81x – 5.76x over auto-vectorization across different CPU platforms, delivers 31% - 91% higher performance versus state-of-the-art methods.
