items.title: LABMATE: Language Model Based Multi-Agent System to Accelerate Catalysis Experiments.
items.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly commonplace, they have been shown to be useful to domains far beyond just linguistic tasks. However, they are still unreliable to make decisions due to their potential to hallucinate, and unable to perform complex tasks like running simulations that are essential to a field like Material Science. To solve this, we introduce LABMATE (LAnguage model Based Multi-agent system to Accelerate caTalysis Experiments), a human-in-the-loop copilot framework that utilizes LLM agents to make catalysis research faster. LABMATE allows the human experts to submit simulation runs, track particle sizes, run data analysis, perform literature review, and generate potential hypothesis all in one framework, thereby expediting the research process. When evaluated on the Chemistry and Material Science segments of major benchmarks, LABMATE performs comparable to or better than most frontier LLMs, showing that in addition to accelerating the experimental process, our framework is also on par in domain knowledge compared to using a simple LLM. These results show that the system is able to significantly aid and improve the research process for human scientists. Furthermore, since the core architecture of the system is domain-agnostic, it can easily be adapted to other domains.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 变得越来越普遍，它们已被证明适用于远远超出语言任务的领域。然而，由于它们可能产生幻觉，它们做出的决策仍然不可靠，并且无法执行复杂的任务，例如运行模拟，这对于材料科学等领域至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 LABMATE（基于语言模型的多代理系统来加速催化实验），这是一种人机交互副驾驶框架，利用 LLM 代理来加快催化研究速度。 LABMATE 允许人类专家在一个框架中提交模拟运行、跟踪颗粒大小、运行数据分析、进行文献综述并生成潜在的假设，从而加快研究过程。当对主要基准的化学和材料科学部分进行评估时，LABMATE 的表现与大多数前沿法学硕士相当或更好，这表明除了加速实验过程之外，与使用简单的法学硕士相比，我们的框架在领域知识方面也达到了同等水平。这些结果表明该系统能够显着帮助和改进人类科学家的研究过程。此外，由于系统的核心架构与领域无关，因此可以轻松适应其他领域。

items.title: Accelerating Advanced Light Source Science Through Multi-Facility HPC Workflows.
items.abstract: Synchrotron light sources support a wide array of techniques to investigate materials, often producing complex, high-volume data that challenge traditional workflows. At the Advanced Light Source (ALS), we developed infrastructure to move microtomography data over ESnet to ALCF and NERSC, where CPU- and GPU-based algorithms generate 3D reconstructed volumes of experimental samples. We employ two data movement and reconstruction models: real-time processing as data streams directly to NERSC compute nodes, and automated file transfer to NERSC and ALCF file systems. The streaming pipeline provides users with feedback in under ten seconds, while the file-based workflow produces high-quality reconstructions suitable for deeper analysis in 20-30 minutes. This infrastructure enables users to utilize HPC resources without direct access to backend systems. We plan to extend this architecture to more endstations, supporting our beamline scientists and users.
items.abstract_zh: 同步加速器光源支持多种材料研究技术，通常会产生挑战传统工作流程的复杂、大量数据。在高级光源 (ALS)，我们开发了基础设施，可通过 ESnet 将显微断层扫描数据移动到 ALCF 和 NERSC，其中基于 CPU 和 GPU 的算法生成实验样本的 3D 重建体积。我们采用两种数据移动和重建模型：实时处理数据流直接传输到 NERSC 计算节点，以及自动将文件传输到 NERSC 和 ALCF 文件系统。流式传输管道在 10 秒内为用户提供反馈，而基于文件的工作流程可在 20-30 分钟内生成适合更深入分析的高质量重建。该基础设施使用户能够利用 HPC 资源，而无需直接访问后端系统。我们计划将此架构扩展到更多终端站，为我们的光束线科学家和用户提供支持。

items.title: Implementing OpenMP Offload Support in the AMD Next Generation Fortran Compiler.
items.abstract: Modern-day supercomputers are massively parallel, heterogeneous systems, many of which employ graphics processing units (GPUs) to accelerate applications. While C/C++, and also Python, gain traction in the high-performance computing (HPC) domain, Fortran continues to have a large developer base with new high-performance code written every day. The OpenMP application programming interface (API) is a key ingredient to provide multithreading and support for offloading execution to GPUs for HPC applications. To meet this need, AMD is developing the AMD Next Generation Fortran compiler (“AMD Flang”) to replace the existing “Classic Flang” compiler in the ROCm™ 7.0 release. This paper describes the general compilation pipeline of the AMD Next Generation Fortran Compiler. It shows how the compiler generates code for OpenMP target directives and their map clauses. The paper closes with a discussion of transformations in intermediate representation, such as implementing DO CONCURRENT using OpenMP intermediate code.
items.abstract_zh: 现代超级计算机是大规模并行、异构系统，其中许多采用图形处理单元 (GPU) 来加速应用程序。虽然 C/C++ 以及 Python 在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域获得了关注，但 Fortran 仍然拥有庞大的开发人员基础，每天都会编写新的高性能代码。 OpenMP 应用程序编程接口 (API) 是为 HPC 应用程序提供多线程和支持将执行任务卸载到 GPU 的关键要素。为了满足这一需求，AMD 正在开发 AMD 下一代 Fortran 编译器（“AMD Flang”），以取代 ROCm™ 7.0 版本中现有的“Classic Flang”编译器。本文介绍了 AMD 下一代 Fortran 编译器的通用编译管道。它显示了编译器如何为 OpenMP 目标指令及其映射子句生成代码。本文最后讨论了中间表示的转换，例如使用 OpenMP 中间代码实现 DO CONCURRENT。

items.title: Differential Testing for Sequential to Parallel Transformations.
items.abstract: Many high-performance programs can benefit from parallelism creating orders of magnitude speedups in their performance. However, translating code into its parallel equivalent is challenging, time-consuming, and error-prone. In recent years there has been a move to automate this process, creating algorithms to perform translations. While automation removes the manual effort, it needs to be accompanied by strong validation to ensure the parallel program has the same behavior as the sequential one. Incorrect translation can lead to data races, poor performance, rounding problems, or unexpected behavior. In this paper, we present a dynamic validation approach called Seq2ParDiff that uses differential testing to check conformance of the parallel program to the original sequential program version. We evaluate Seq2ParDiff on two sets of benchmarks for OpenMP programs. In the first, we find 20 new faults, outperforming state of the art static techniques. In the second, we find many faults that other tools miss, however we are not as effective in finding some types of data races.
items.abstract_zh: 许多高性能程序可以从并行性中受益，从而使性能提高几个数量级。然而，将代码转换为并行代码具有挑战性、耗时且容易出错。近年来，人们开始采取自动化这一过程的举措，创建算法来执行翻译。虽然自动化消除了手动工作，但它需要伴随强大的验证，以确保并行程序具有与顺序程序相同的行为。不正确的转换可能会导致数据争用、性能不佳、舍入问题或意外行为。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Seq2ParDiff 的动态验证方法，该方法使用差异测试来检查并行程序与原始顺序程序版本的一致性。我们在 OpenMP 程序的两组基准上评估 Seq2ParDiff。在第一个中，我们发现了 20 个新故障，其性能优于最先进的静态技术。在第二种情况下，我们发现了其他工具遗漏的许多错误，但是我们在发现某些类型的数据竞争方面并不那么有效。

items.title: A Model for Teaching Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Research Computing to Domain Scientists on HPC Resources.
items.abstract: This paper presents outcomes and insights from a one-week workshop designed to teach biologists essential skills in high-performance computing (HPC), machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL). Participants with little or no prior experience with HPC learned how to navigate file systems via a command-line interface, launch jobs with SLURM, and apply ML and DL techniques to real-world biological datasets. Hands-on activities were delivered with accessible technologies such as Jupyter Notebooks, graphical desktop interfaces (DCV), and software containers, all deployed on HPC systems with minimal user setup required. We propose this workshop model as an adaptable framework for training domain scientists how to effectively use HPC resources to advance scientific discovery, and we present survey data demonstrating its effectiveness in improving participant skills.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了为期一周的研讨会的成果和见解，该研讨会旨在向生物学家传授高性能计算 (HPC)、机器学习 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 方面的基本技能。之前很少或没有 HPC 经验的参与者学习如何通过命令行界面导航文件系统、使用 SLURM 启动作业以及将 ML 和 DL 技术应用于现实世界的生物数据集。实践活动是通过 Jupyter Notebooks、图形桌面界面 (DCV) 和软件容器等易于访问的技术进行的，所有这些都部署在 HPC 系统上，只需最少的用户设置。我们建议将此研讨会模型作为一个适应性框架，用于培训领域科学家如何有效地利用 HPC 资源来推进科学发现，并且我们提供的调查数据证明了其在提高参与者技能方面的有效性。

items.title: Peachy Parallel Assignments (EduHPC 2025).
items.abstract: Peachy Parallel Assignments are high-quality assignments that require students to practice concepts in parallel and distributed computing. They are selected competitively and published in the Edu* workshops to provide instructors with inspiration and easy-to-adopt assignments. The assignments must have been successfully tested with real students, easy to adopt by other instructors in a variety of contexts, and “cool and inspirational” for students completing them.
items.abstract_zh: Peachy 并行作业是高质量的作业，要求学生练习并行和分布式计算中的概念。它们经过竞争选出并在 Edu* 研讨会上发布，为教师提供灵感和易于采用的作业。这些作业必须经过真实学生的成功测试，易于其他教师在各种情况下采用，并且对于完成作业的学生来说“很酷且鼓舞人心”。

items.title: Accelerating Gravitational N-Body Simulations Using the RISC-V-Based Tenstorrent Wormhole.
items.abstract: Although originally developed primarily for artificial intelligence workloads, RISC-V-based accelerators are also emerging as attractive platforms for high-performance scientific computing. In this work, we present our approach to accelerating an astrophysical N-body code on the RISC-V-based Wormhole n300 card developed by Tenstorrent. Our results show that this platform can be highly competitive for astrophysical simulations employing this class of algorithms, delivering more than a 2 × speedup and approximately 2 × energy savings compared to a highly optimized CPU implementation of the same code.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管最初主要是为人工智能工作负载而开发的，但基于 RISC-V 的加速器也正在成为高性能科学计算的有吸引力的平台。在这项工作中，我们提出了在 Tenstorrent 开发的基于 RISC-V 的 Wormhole n300 卡上加速天体物理 N 体代码的方法。我们的结果表明，该平台对于采用此类算法的天体物理模拟具有很强的竞争力，与相同代码的高度优化的 CPU 实现相比，可提供超过 2 倍的加速和大约 2 倍的节能。

items.title: ROSE: RADICAL Orchestrator for Surrogate Exploration.
items.abstract: Scientific computing increasingly relies on surrogate models to accelerate high-fidelity simulations, enable real-time predictions, and facilitate exploration of the design space. However, building effective surrogates at scale presents several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, data generation must be carefully managed, and surrogate learning requires handling large, heterogeneous, and dynamically evolving workflows. These challenges are amplified in active learning contexts, where surrogate models guide further data acquisition, resulting in a tight coupling between simulation, inference, and model training. This paper introduces the ROSE (RADICAL Orchestrator for Surrogate Exploration) framework, a flexible, portable, and scalable software system designed to support the end-to-end lifecycle of surrogate modeling in high-performance computing environments. ROSE integrates active learning algorithms with scalable orchestration, managing asynchronous execution across diverse computing resources while minimizing user burden. It supports both in-situ and ex-situ workflows, online and offline training, and accommodates the dynamic structure of adaptive sampling and surrogate refinement. ROSE is used for three scientific use cases: electrolyte structure extraction, neutron diffraction structure recovery, and colloid phase classification. Across Polaris, Perlmutter, and Delta, ROSE sustains high throughput with low orchestration overhead, and delivers 4–8 × end-to-end speedups in our three use cases by exploiting parallel, pilot-based execution, where asynchronous orchestration typically yields 1.5–3 × versus synchronous baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 科学计算越来越依赖代理模型来加速高保真模拟、实现实时预测并促进设计空间的探索。然而，大规模构建有效的代理面临着一些挑战：模拟的计算成本很高，数据生成必须仔细管理，代理学习需要处理大型、异构和动态发展的工作流程。这些挑战在主动学习环境中被放大，其中代理模型指导进一步的数据采集，导致模拟、推理和模型训练之间的紧密耦合。本文介绍了 ROSE（用于代理探索的 RADICAL Orchestrator）框架，这是一个灵活、可移植且可扩展的软件系统，旨在支持高性能计算环境中代理建模的端到端生命周期。 ROSE 将主动学习算法与可扩展的编排集成在一起，管理跨不同计算资源的异步执行，同时最大限度地减少用户负担。它支持原位和异位工作流程、在线和离线训练，并适应自适应采样和替代细化的动态结构。 ROSE 用于三个科学用例：电解质结构提取、中子衍射结构恢复和胶体相分类。在 Polaris、Perlmutter 和 Delta 中，ROSE 以低编排开销维持高吞吐量，并通过利用并行、基于试点的执行，在我们的三个用例中提供 4-8 倍的端到端加速，其中异步编排通常比同步基线产生 1.5-3 倍的加速。

items.title: Molten Chloride Small Modular Reactor Performance Characteristics for Data Center Operation.
items.abstract: Small modular reactors (SMRs) require a smaller physical footprint than conventional large nuclear reactors while still providing high reliability in power generation and they are frequently discussed in the context of providing power for data centers. Molten chloride reactors represent a new type of SMR where a mixture of molten chloride and uranium serves as both reactor fuel and coolant. The approach is key to molten chloride fast reactor technologies being marketed commercially in SMRs for end users like data centers. This work leverages the open-source Multiphysics Object Oriented Simulation Environment (MOOSE) framework to simulate the behavior of a molten salt SMR with the control rods at 60% open exploring steady state behavior of an SMR while operating below maximum capacity to power a data center with a mismatched power rating.
items.abstract_zh: 小型模块化反应堆 (SMR) 需要比传统大型核反应堆更小的物理占地面积，同时仍能提供较高的发电可靠性，并且在为数据中心供电的背景下经常讨论它们。熔融氯化物反应堆代表了一种新型小型堆反应堆，其中熔融氯化物和铀的混合物既充当反应堆燃料又充当冷却剂。该方法是熔融氯化物快堆技术在小型反应堆中面向数据中心等最终用户进行商业化销售的关键。这项工作利用开源多物理场面向对象仿真环境 (MOOSE) 框架来模拟熔盐 SMR 的行为，控制棒处于 60% 开放状态，探索 SMR 在低于最大容量运行时的稳态行为，为额定功率不匹配的数据中心供电。

items.title: Enabling the syscall_intercept library for RISC-V.
items.abstract: System call interception is a technique used to alter system call behavior, enable sandboxing, perform dynamic analysis, inject errors for testing, profile performance, and other similar use cases. The syscall_intercept library provides high-performance interception available on various architectures, including x86, PowerPC, and ARM. However, it was not available on RISC-V. In this paper, we describe the design decisions, implementation, and evaluation of a fully functional syscall_intercept port for RISC-V Linux systems, enabling interception from user space without requiring superuser privileges. This work fills a gap in RISC-V tooling, supporting broader adoption in research and system development.
items.abstract_zh: 系统调用拦截是一种用于改变系统调用行为、启用沙箱、执行动态分析、注入测试错误、分析性能和其他类似用例的技术。 syscall_intercept 库提供可用于各种体系结构（包括 x86、PowerPC 和 ARM）的高性能拦截。然而，它在 RISC-V 上不可用。在本文中，我们描述了 RISC-V Linux 系统的全功能 syscall_intercept 端口的设计决策、实现和评估，无需超级用户权限即可从用户空间进行拦截。这项工作填补了 RISC-V 工具的空白，支持在研究和系统开发中更广泛的采用。

items.title: Roofline Analysis of Tightly-Coupled CPU-GPU Superchips: A Study on MI300A and GH200.
items.abstract: The introduction of tightly-coupled heterogeneous architectures, such as AMD’s MI300A and NVIDIA’s Grace-Hopper (GH200), address a long-standing bottleneck in accelerated computing, namely the CPU-GPU interface. Whereas the GH200 can be seen as a technological leap in CPU-GPU connectivity greatly exceeding PCIe cadence, the unified memory architecture of the MI300A APU enables seamless communication through coherent caches. When the CPU and GPU execute concurrently, they contend not only for finite bandwidth on their shared memory interfaces, but they also contend for power in a power-constrained environment. Whereas the serialized producer-consumer, overlapped/pipelined producer-consumer, and multi-tenancy (i.e., shared virtualized hardware) execution models offer clear avenues for exploiting these architectures to increase HPC and ML/AI throughput, they come with clear risks associated with non-linear performance degradation arising from this contention. In this paper, we extend the well-established Roofline model to capture the performance implications of contention in concurrent execution modalities on the MI300A and GH200 architectures. We enhance this by quantifying the portability of different memory allocators using standard performance portability metrics, noting the impact of randomness of data as well as host and device arithmetic (compute) intensity. We conclude with a discussion on the evolution of GPU architectures and the impact in terms of performance, portability, and programmability that emerging tightly-coupled GPUs bring to the HPC landscape.
items.abstract_zh: 紧耦合异构架构的引入，例如 AMD 的 MI300A 和 NVIDIA 的 Grace-Hopper (GH200)，解决了加速计算中长期存在的瓶颈，即 CPU-GPU 接口。 GH200 可以被视为 CPU-GPU 连接方面的技术飞跃，大大超过 PCIe 节奏，而 MI300A APU 的统一内存架构可通过一致缓存实现无缝通信。当 CPU 和 GPU 并发执行时，它们不仅会争夺共享内存接口上的有限带宽，还会争夺功率受限环境中的功率。尽管序列化生产者-消费者、重叠/流水线生产者-消费者和多租户（即共享虚拟化硬件）执行模型为利用这些架构来提高 HPC 和 ML/AI 吞吐量提供了明确的途径，但它们也带来了与这种争用引起的非线性性能下降相关的明显风险。在本文中，我们扩展了完善的 Roofline 模型，以捕获 MI300A 和 GH200 架构上并发执行模式中的争用对性能的影响。我们通过使用标准性能可移植性指标量化不同内存分配器的可移植性来增强这一点，并注意数据随机性以及主机和设备算术（计算）强度的影响。最后，我们讨论了 GPU 架构的演变以及新兴的紧耦合 GPU 给 HPC 领域带来的性能、可移植性和可编程性方面的影响。

items.title: Development of a performance portable distributed FFT interface on top of the Kokkos ecosystem.
items.abstract: This paper presents the development of a performance portable distributed FFT implementation on top of the Kokkos ecosystem. Thanks to kokkos and kokkos-fft, we largely simplify the implementation details of distributed FFT with performance portability. We newly develop unique features like batched-distributed FFT and interfaces to vendor distributed FFT libraries. We demonstrate that our distributed-FFT works efficiently on NVIDIA A100 and AMD MI250X GPUs, while keeping a reasonable performance on CPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Kokkos 生态系统之上的高性能便携式分布式 FFT 实现的开发。感谢 kokkos 和 kokkos-fft，我们极大地简化了具有性能可移植性的分布式 FFT 的实现细节。我们新开发了独特的功能，例如批量分布式 FFT 以及与供应商分布式 FFT 库的接口。我们证明了我们的分布式 FFT 在 NVIDIA A100 和 AMD MI250X GPU 上高效工作，同时在 CPU 上保持合理的性能。

items.title: How effective is matrix reordering for improving performance of sparse matrix-vector multiplication?
items.abstract: This work evaluates the impact of matrix reordering on the performance of sparse matrix-vector multiplication across different multicore CPU platforms. Reordering can enhance performance by optimizing the non-zero element patterns to reduce total data movement and improve the load-balancing. We examine how these gains vary over different CPUs for different reordering strategies, focusing on both sequential and parallel execution. We address multiple aspects, including appropriate measurement methodology, comparison across different kinds of reordering strategies, consistency across machines, and impact of load imbalance.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作评估了矩阵重新排序对不同多核 CPU 平台上稀疏矩阵向量乘法性能的影响。重新排序可以通过优化非零元素模式来减少总数据移动并改善负载平衡，从而提高性能。我们研究了这些增益在不同 CPU 上针对不同重新排序策略的变化情况，重点关注顺序执行和并行执行。我们解决了多个方面的问题，包括适当的测量方法、不同类型的重新排序策略之间的比较、机器之间的一致性以及负载不平衡的影响。

items.title: SmartIO: A Lightweight End-to-End Workflow for Runtime I/O Optimization of HPC Systems.
items.abstract: The I/O subsystem is often a critical bottleneck in HPC systems, making its optimization crucial for performance. Existing efforts to optimize the I/O performance of HPC applications either rely on offline tuning, exhaustive parameter searches, or extensive training of machine learning models-approaches that are time consuming and resource intensive. This work introduces SmartIO, an end-to-end workflow to optimize the I/O performance of HPC systems at runtime without requiring prior model training, profiling, or parameter searches. SmartIO leverages context-free grammars to predict future I/O calls during the application runtime, learns key I/O characteristics from predicted calls, and proactively optimizes performance before those calls occur using a rules-based mapping engine. The rules-based mapping engine, constructed through literature review and empirical evaluation, serves as a translation mechanism for insights into optimizations at runtime. Our evaluation shows that SmartIO achieves up to ∼ 13 × and ∼ 12 × improvements in IOR read and write bandwidth, respectively, and delivers a ∼ 4 × speedup in overall I/O bandwidth for Flash-X—all with negligible runtime overhead. Compared to the state-of-the-art I/O optimization tools, SmartIO delivers comparable or better performance while drastically reducing the tuning cost.
items.abstract_zh: I/O 子系统通常是 HPC 系统的关键瓶颈，因此其优化对于性能至关重要。现有的优化 HPC 应用程序 I/O 性能的努力要么依赖于离线调优、详尽的参数搜索，要么依赖于机器学习模型的广泛训练，这些方法既耗时又占用资源。这项工作引入了 SmartIO，这是一种端到端工作流程，可在运行时优化 HPC 系统的 I/O 性能，而无需事先进行模型训练、分析或参数搜索。 SmartIO 利用上下文无关语法来预测应用程序运行时期间的未来 I/O 调用，从预测的调用中学习关键 I/O 特征，并使用基于规则的映射引擎在这些调用发生之前主动优化性能。通过文献综述和实证评估构建的基于规则的映射引擎，可作为运行时优化洞察的转换机制。我们的评估表明，SmartIO 在 IOR 读取和写入带宽方面分别实现了约 13 倍和约 12 倍的改进，并为 Flash-X 的整体 I/O 带宽提供了约 4 倍的加速 - 所有这些都可以忽略不计的运行时开销。与最先进的 I/O 优化工具相比，SmartIO 可提供相当或更好的性能，同时大幅降低调整成本。

items.title: Evaluation of Test-Time Compute Constraints on Safety and Skill Large Reasoning Models.
items.abstract: Test-time compute scaling has demonstrated the ability to improve the performance of reasoning language models by generating longer chain-of-thought (CoT) sequences. However, this increase in performance comes with a significant increase in computation cost. In this work, we investigate two compute constraint strategies: (1) reasoning length constraint and (2) model quantization, and study their impact on the safety performance of reasoning models. Specifically, we explore two approaches to apply compute constraints to reasoning models: (1) fine-tuning reasoning models using a length-controlled policy optimization (LCPO) based reinforcement learning method to satisfy a user-defined CoT reasoning length, and (2) applying quantization to maximize the generation of CoT sequences within a user-defined compute constraint. Furthermore, we study the trade-off between the computational efficiency and the safety of the model.
items.abstract_zh: 测试时计算扩展已证明能够通过生成更长的思想链 (CoT) 序列来提高推理语言模型的性能。然而，性能的提高伴随着计算成本的显着增加。在这项工作中，我们研究了两种计算约束策略：（1）推理长度约束和（2）模型量化，并研究它们对推理模型安全性能的影响。具体来说，我们探索了两种将计算约束应用于推理模型的方法：（1）使用基于长度控制策略优化（LCPO）的强化学习方法微调推理模型以满足用户定义的CoT推理长度，以及（2）应用量化以在用户定义的计算约束内最大化CoT序列的生成。此外，我们研究了模型的计算效率和安全性之间的权衡。

items.title: Bridging Simulation and Silicon: A Study of RISC-V Hardware and FireSim Simulation.
items.abstract: RISC-V ISA-based processors have recently emerged as both powerful and energy-efficient computing platforms. The release of the MILK-V Pioneer marked a significant milestone as the first desktop-grade RISC-V system. With increasing engagement from both academia and industry, such platforms exhibit strong potential for adoption in high-performance computing (HPC) environments.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 RISC-V ISA 的处理器最近已成为功能强大且节能的计算平台。 MILK-V Pioneer 的发布标志着作为首款桌面级 RISC-V 系统的一个重要里程碑。随着学术界和工业界的参与不断增加，此类平台在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中展现出巨大的采用潜力。

items.title: OpenSHMEM MLIR: A Dialect for Compile-Time Optimization of One-Sided Communications.
items.abstract: Communication increasingly limits performance in high-performance computing (HPC), yet mainstream compilers focus on computation because communication intent is lost early in compilation. OpenSHMEM offers a one-sided Partitioned Global Address Space (PGAS) model with symmetric memory and explicit synchronization, but lowering to opaque runtime calls hides these semantics from analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 通信日益限制高性能计算 (HPC) 的性能，但主流编译器专注于计算，因为通信意图在编译早期就丢失了。 OpenSHMEM 提供了一种单侧分区全局地址空间 (PGAS) 模型，具有对称内存和显式同步，但降低到不透明运行时调用会隐藏这些语义，使其无法分析。

items.title: Umpire: Portable Memory Management for High-Performance Computing Applications.
items.abstract: Modern high-performance computing (HPC) systems present application developers with increasingly complex memory hierarchies that include multiple types of memory with varying access patterns, capacities, and performance characteristics. Managing these resources efficiently while maintaining code portability across different architectures remains a significant challenge. To address these challenges, Umpire was developed at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) as an open-source library that provides a unified, portable memory management API for modern HPC platforms with multiple memory devices like NUMA and GPUs. This paper explores Umpire’s design principles, outlines Umpire’s primary performance advantages, and examines how its memory pools can provide speedups of 15x or greater. Next, it demonstrates how its integration with the RAJA Portability Suite enables the development of portable and performant HPC applications. With real-world examples from LLNL’s production codes, Umpire provides a comprehensive solution for managing the challenges of performance portability in modern HPC environments.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统为应用程序开发人员提供了日益复杂的内存层次结构，其中包括具有不同访问模式、容量和性能特征的多种类型的内存。有效管理这些资源，同时保持不同架构之间的代码可移植性仍然是一个重大挑战。为了应对这些挑战，劳伦斯利弗莫尔国家实验室 (LLNL) 开发了 Umpire，作为一个开源库，为具有 NUMA 和 GPU 等多个内存设备的现代 HPC 平台提供统一、可移植的内存管理 API。本文探讨了 Umpire 的设计原则，概述了 Umpire 的主要性能优势，并研究了其内存池如何提供 15 倍或更高的加速。接下来，它演示了它与 RAJA Portability Suite 的集成如何支持便携式和高性能 HPC 应用程序的开发。通过 LLNL 生产代码中的实际示例，Umpire 提供了一个全面的解决方案，用于应对现代 HPC 环境中性能可移植性的挑战。

items.title: Experience Deploying Containerized GenAI Services at an HPC Center.
items.abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) applications are built from specialized components—inference servers, object storage, vector and graph databases, and user interfaces—interconnected via web-based APIs. While these components are often containerized and deployed in cloud environments, such capabilities are still emerging at High-Performance Computing (HPC) centers. In this paper, we share our experience deploying GenAI workloads within an established HPC center, discussing the integration of HPC and cloud computing environments. We describe our converged computing architecture that integrates HPC and Kubernetes platforms running containerized GenAI workloads, helping with reproducibility. A case study illustrates the deployment of the Llama Large Language Model (LLM) using a containerized inference server (vLLM) across both Kubernetes and HPC platforms using multiple container runtimes. Our experience highlights practical considerations and opportunities for the HPC container community, guiding future research and tool development.
items.abstract_zh: 生成人工智能 (GenAI) 应用程序由专用组件构建，这些组件包括推理服务器、对象存储、向量和图形数据库以及用户界面，这些组件通过基于 Web 的 API 互连。虽然这些组件通常被容器化并部署在云环境中，但此类功能仍在高性能计算 (HPC) 中心不断涌现。在本文中，我们分享了在已建立的 HPC 中心内部署 GenAI 工作负载的经验，讨论了 HPC 和云计算环境的集成。我们描述了我们的融合计算架构，该架构集成了运行容器化 GenAI 工作负载的 HPC 和 Kubernetes 平台，有助于提高可重复性。案例研究说明了如何使用容器化推理服务器 (vLLM) 在 Kubernetes 和 HPC 平台上使用多个容器运行时部署 Llama 大型语言模型 (LLM)。我们的经验强调了 HPC 容器社区的实际考虑因素和机遇，指导未来的研究和工具开发。

items.title: An elastic job scheduler for HPC applications on the cloud.
items.abstract: The last few years have seen an increase in adoption of the cloud for running HPC applications. The pay-as-you-go cost model of these cloud resources has necessitated the development of specialized programming models and schedulers for HPC jobs for efficient utilization of cloud resources. A key aspect of efficient utilization is the ability to rescale applications on the fly to maximize the utilization of cloud resources. Most commonly used parallel programming models like MPI have traditionally not supported autoscaling either in a cloud environment or on supercomputers. While more recent work has been done to implement this functionality in MPI, it is still nascent and requires additional programmer effort. Charm++ is a parallel programming model that natively supports dynamic rescaling through its migratable objects paradigm. In this paper, we present a Kubernetes operator to run Charm++ applications on a Kubernetes cluster. We then present a priority-based elastic job scheduler that can dynamically rescale jobs based on the state of a Kubernetes cluster to maximize cluster utilization while minimizing response time for high-priority jobs. We show that our elastic scheduler, with the ability to rescale HPC jobs with minimal overhead, demonstrates significant performance improvements over traditional static schedulers.
items.abstract_zh: 过去几年，越来越多地采用云来运行 HPC 应用程序。这些云资源的即用即付成本模型需要为 HPC 作业开发专门的编程模型和调度程序，以高效利用云资源。高效利用的一个关键方面是能够动态调整应用程序以最大限度地利用云资源。最常用的并行编程模型（例如 MPI）传统上不支持云环境或超级计算机上的自动缩放。虽然最近已经完成了在 MPI 中实现此功能的工作，但它仍处于初级阶段，需要程序员付出额外的努力。 Charm++ 是一种并行编程模型，通过其可迁移对象范例原生支持动态重新缩放。在本文中，我们提出了一个 Kubernetes 运算符，用于在 Kubernetes 集群上运行 Charm++ 应用程序。然后，我们提出了一个基于优先级的弹性作业调度程序，它可以根据 Kubernetes 集群的状态动态重新调整作业，以最大限度地提高集群利用率，同时最大限度地减少高优先级作业的响应时间。我们证明，我们的弹性调度程序能够以最小的开销重新调整 HPC 作业的规模，与传统静态调度程序相比，性能显着提高。

items.title: On the integration of lightweight tasks with MPI using the C++26 std: : execution 'Senders' API.
items.abstract: Integrating asynchronous MPI messaging with tasking runtimes requires careful handling of request polling and dispatching of associated completions to participating threads. The new C++26 Senders (std::execution) library offers a flexible collection of interfaces and templates for schedulers, algorithms and adaptors to work with asynchronous functions—and it makes explicit the mechanism to transfer execution from one context to another—essential for high performance. We have implemented the major features of the Senders API in the pika tasking runtime and used them to wrap asynchronous MPI calls such that messaging operations become nodes in the execution graph with the same calling semantics as other operations. The API allows us to easily experiment with different methods of message scheduling and dispatching completions. We present insights from our implementation on how application performance is affected by design choices surrounding the placement, scheduling and execution of polling and completion tasks using Senders.
items.abstract_zh: 将异步 MPI 消息传递与任务运行时集成需要仔细处理请求轮询并将相关完成分派给参与线程。新的 C++26 Senders (std::execution) 库为调度程序、算法和适配器提供了一组灵活的接口和模板，以便与异步函数配合使用，并且它明确了将执行从一个上下文转移到另一个上下文的机制，这对于高性能至关重要。我们在 pika 任务运行时实现了 Senders API 的主要功能，并使用它们来包装异步 MPI 调用，以便消息传递操作成为执行图中的节点，具有与其他操作相同的调用语义。该 API 使我们能够轻松尝试不同的消息调度和分派完成方法。我们展示了我们的实施中关于应用程序性能如何受到围绕使用发送器的轮询和完成任务的放置、调度和执行的设计选择的影响的见解。

items.title: Improving Supercomputer Usage with Aging Awareness.
items.abstract: Lifetime of electronic devices has a critical impact on their environmental footprint. In addition, the high-demand by AI companies of GPU has reduced tremendously their availability for supercomputing centers. Consequently, improving the duration of CPUs and GPUs is becoming a major issue in High Performance Computing (HPC) domain.
items.abstract_zh: 电子设备的使用寿命对其环境足迹有着至关重要的影响。此外，人工智能公司对GPU的高需求也大大降低了超级计算中心的可用性。因此，提高CPU和GPU的持续时间正在成为高性能计算（HPC）领域的一个主要问题。

items.title: Design and Implementation of a Custom Hardware Accelerator for SZx Compression in Chipyard.
items.abstract: Data movement bottlenecks have emerged as a dominant performance limiter in modern computing systems. At the same time, scientific detectors are generating unprecedented data volumes: X-ray detectors may soon produce terabytes per second and high-energy physics experiments demand bandwidth on the order of petabytes per second. Streaming compression offers a promising path to reducing data movement overhead, and hardware accelerators can further improve data throughput, while the exploration of system-level hardware compressors remains largely unexplored. This paper presents a preliminary study toward enabling hardware evaluation of streaming compressors. We design and implement a custom hardware accelerator for scientific data compression using modern hardware description languages, providing a complete end-to-end hardware acceleration system for CPU-based platforms. Our prototype features a multi-stage state machine, parallel element processing, and optimized data transfers, achieving 1.45 × speedup over a software baseline with comparable quality, with 31% fewer cycles per element and 45% faster compression throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 数据移动瓶颈已成为现代计算系统中主要的性能限制因素。与此同时，科学探测器正在生成前所未有的数据量：X 射线探测器可能很快就会产生每秒 TB 级的数据，而高能物理实验则需要每秒 PB 级的带宽。流式压缩为减少数据移动开销提供了一条有希望的途径，硬件加速器可以进一步提高数据吞吐量，而系统级硬件压缩器的探索在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本文提出了对流式压缩器进行硬件评估的初步研究。我们使用现代硬件描述语言设计和实现用于科学数据压缩的定制硬件加速器，为基于CPU的平台提供完整的端到端硬件加速系统。我们的原型具有多级状态机、并行元素处理和优化的数据传输，在质量相当的情况下，比软件基准实现了 1.45 倍的加速，每个元素的周期减少了 31%，压缩吞吐量提高了 45%。

items.title: Lowering and Runtime Support for Fortran's Multi-Image Parallel Features using LLVM Flang, PRIF, and Caffeine.
AskHPC: A ChatBot for High Performance Computing User Support.
items.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems in the exascale era are increasingly heterogeneous, requiring users to navigate diverse tools, configurations, and best practices. However, essential information is often scattered across fragmented, multimodal documentation, making it difficult and time-consuming to locate. To address this, we present AskHPC, an intelligent question-answering ChatBot that delivers accurate, timely, and accessible information through a unified conversational interface. Built on a curated knowledge base integrating user guides, scheduler manuals, and programming documentation, AskHPC leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework. It employs two key techniques to improve HPC query responses: a modality-aware document parsing pipeline that preserves multimodal structure, and a dual-context strategy combining retrieved content (e.g., complete code blocks) with LLM-generated semantics. Evaluation, including a real-world user study, shows AskHPC outperforms direct LLM queries and vanilla RAG systems, enhancing user support and accelerating HPC software development.
items.abstract_zh: 百亿亿次时代的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统越来越异构，要求用户使用不同的工具、配置和最佳实践。然而，重要信息通常分散在零散的多模式文档中，使得定位变得困难且耗时。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 AskHPC，这是一种智能问答聊天机器人，可以通过统一的对话界面提供准确、及时且可访问的信息。 AskHPC 建立在集成用户指南、调度程序手册和编程文档的精选知识库之上，在检索增强生成 (RAG) 框架内利用大型语言模型 (LLM)。它采用两项关键技术来改进 HPC 查询响应：保留多模态结构的模态感知文档解析管道，以及将检索到的内容（例如完整代码块）与 LLM 生成的语义相结合的双上下文策略。包括真实用户研究在内的评估表明，AskHPC 的性能优于直接 LLM 查询和普通 RAG 系统，从而增强了用户支持并加速了 HPC 软件开发。

items.title: Microcredentials for Open Hardware and HPC Workforce Development: The Openchip Approach with RISC-V Ecosystem.
items.abstract: The semiconductor and high-performance computing (HPC) sectors face a parallel and urgent challenge: a widening skills gap amid rapid technological evolution, particularly with the rise of open hardware platforms such as RISC-V. As global initiatives like the EU Chips Act and national sovereignty strategies emphasize workforce development, traditional academic programs remain too rigid and slow to adapt. This paper presents a microcredential-based strategy for agile, modular, and industry-validated training focused on open hardware and full-stack HPC system design. Through the lens of Openchip's approach, we explore how co-designed curricula—especially around vector-based RISC-V architectures—can modernize education to reflect emerging HPC paradigms. We also examine curricular gaps, the potential alignment with the TCPP curriculum initiative, and propose a roadmap for embedding microcredentials into scalable, open, and sovereign HPC education ecosystems.
items.abstract_zh: 半导体和高性能计算 (HPC) 行业面临着一个并行而紧迫的挑战：技术快速发展，特别是随着 RISC-V 等开放硬件平台的兴起，技能差距不断扩大。由于《欧盟芯片法案》和国家主权战略等全球倡议强调劳动力发展，传统的学术项目仍然过于僵化且难以适应。本文提出了一种基于微证书的敏捷、模块化和经过行业验证的培训策略，重点关注开放硬件和全栈 HPC 系统设计。通过 Openchip 方法的视角，我们探索共同设计的课程（尤其是围绕基于矢量的 RISC-V 架构）如何实现教育现代化，以反映新兴的 HPC 范式。我们还研究了课程差距、与 TCPP 课程计划的潜在一致性，并提出了将微证书嵌入可扩展、开放和主权 HPC 教育生态系统的路线图。

items.title: Extending RAJA Parallel Programming Abstractions with Just-In-Time Optimization.
items.abstract: The prevalence of heterogeneous computing systems – comprising both CPUs and GPUs – has led to the adoption of performance portability programming models, such as RAJA. These models allow developers to write portable code that compiles ahead-of-time (AOT), unmodified for different backends, thus improving productivity and maintainability. However, AOT toolchains lack access to runtime information, limiting their ability to perform context-specific optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 异构计算系统（包括 CPU 和 GPU）的盛行导致了性能可移植性编程模型的采用，例如 RAJA。这些模型允许开发人员编写可提前编译（AOT）的可移植代码，无需针对不同后端进行修改，从而提高生产力和可维护性。然而，AOT 工具链无法访问运行时信息，限制了它们执行特定于上下文的优化的能力。

items.title: Intelligent Sampling of Extreme-Scale Turbulence Datasets for Accurate and Efficient Spatiotemporal Model Training.
items.abstract: With the end of Moore’s law and Dennard scaling, efficient training increasingly requires rethinking data volume. Can we train better models with significantly less data via intelligent subsampling? To explore this, we develop SICKLE, a sparse intelligent curation framework for efficient learning, featuring a novel maximum entropy (MaxEnt) sampling approach, scalable training, and energy benchmarking. We compare MaxEnt with random and phase-space sampling on large direct numerical simulation (DNS) datasets of turbulence. Evaluating SICKLE at scale on Frontier, we show that subsampling as a preprocessing step can, in many cases, improve model accuracy and substantially lower energy consumption, with observed reductions of up to 38×.
items.abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律和登纳德缩放定律的终结，高效的训练越来越需要重新考虑数据量。我们能否通过智能二次采样以更少的数据训练更好的模型？为了探索这一点，我们开发了 SICKLE，这是一种用于高效学习的稀疏智能管理框架，具有新颖的最大熵 (MaxEnt) 采样方法、可扩展训练和能量基准测试。我们将 MaxEnt 与大型湍流直接数值模拟 (DNS) 数据集上的随机采样和相空间采样进行比较。在 Frontier 上大规模评估 SICKLE，我们发现，在许多情况下，子采样作为预处理步骤可以提高模型精度并显着降低能耗，观察到的能耗降低高达 38 倍。

items.title: Slicing Is All You Need: Towards A Universal One-Sided Algorithm for Distributed Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: Many important applications across science, data analytics, and AI workloads depend on distributed matrix multiplication. Prior work has developed a large array of algorithms suitable for different problem sizes and partitionings including 1D, 2D, 1.5D, and 2.5D algorithms. A limitation of current work is that existing algorithms are limited to a subset of partitionings. Multiple algorithm implementations are required to support the full space of possible partitionings. If no algorithm implementation is available for a particular set of partitionings, one or more operands must be redistributed, increasing communication costs. This paper presents a universal one-sided algorithm for distributed matrix multiplication that supports all combinations of partitionings and replication factors. Our algorithm uses slicing (index arithmetic) to compute the sets of overlapping tiles that must be multiplied together. This list of local matrix multiplies can then either be executed directly, or reordered and lowered to an optimized IR to maximize overlap. We implement our algorithm using a high-level C++-based PGAS programming framework that performs direct GPU-to-GPU communication using intra-node interconnects. We evaluate performance for a wide variety of partitionings and replication factors, finding that our work is competitive with PyTorch DTensor, a highly optimized distributed tensor library targeting AI models.
items.abstract_zh: 科学、数据分析和人工智能工作负载中的许多重要应用都依赖于分布式矩阵乘法。先前的工作已经开发了大量适用于不同问题规模和分区的算法，包括 1D、2D、1.5D 和 2.5D 算法。当前工作的一个限制是现有算法仅限于分区的子集。需要多种算法实现来支持可能分区的全部空间。如果没有可用于一组特定分区的算法实现，则必须重新分配一个或多个操作数，从而增加通信成本。本文提出了一种通用的分布式矩阵乘法单边算法，支持所有分区和复制因子的组合。我们的算法使用切片（索引算术）来计算必须相乘的重叠图块集。然后可以直接执行该局部矩阵乘法列表，或者重新排序并降低到优化的 IR 以最大化重叠。我们使用基于 C++ 的高级 PGAS 编程框架来实现我们的算法，该框架使用节点内互连执行直接 GPU 到 GPU 通信。我们评估了各种分区和复制因子的性能，发现我们的工作与 PyTorch DTensor（一种针对 AI 模型的高度优化的分布式张量库）具有竞争力。

items.title: Characterizing the Performance of Parallel Data-Compression Algorithms across Compilers and GPUs.
items.abstract: Different compilers can generate code with notably different performance characteristics—even on the same system. Today, GPU developers have three popular options for compiling CUDA or HIP code for GPUs. First, CUDA code can be compiled by either NVCC or Clang for NVIDIA GPUs. Alternatively, AMD’s recently introduced HIP platform makes porting from CUDA to HIP relatively simple, enabling compilation for AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. This study compares the performance of 107,632 data-compression algorithms when compiling them with different compilers and running them on different GPUs from NVIDIA and AMD. We find that the relative performance of some of these codes changes significantly depending on the compiler and hardware used. For example, Clang tends to produce relatively slow compressors but relatively fast decompressors compared to NVCC and HIPCC.
items.abstract_zh: 不同的编译器可以生成具有明显不同性能特征的代码——即使在同一系统上也是如此。如今，GPU 开发人员可以使用三种流行的选项来为 GPU 编译 CUDA 或 HIP 代码。首先，CUDA 代码可以通过 NVCC 或 Clang 为 NVIDIA GPU 编译。另外，AMD 最近推出的 HIP 平台使从 CUDA 到 HIP 的移植变得相对简单，从而可以针对 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 进行编译。这项研究比较了 107,632 种数据压缩算法使用不同编译器进行编译并在 NVIDIA 和 AMD 的不同 GPU 上运行时的性能。我们发现其中一些代码的相对性能根据所使用的编译器和硬件的不同而发生显着变化。例如，与 NVCC 和 HIPCC 相比，Clang 倾向于生成相对较慢的压缩器，但生成相对较快的解压缩器。

items.title: Building n-Dimensional Trees for Resolution-Based Progressive Compression.
items.abstract: Floating-point data is typically compressed at strict error bounds to reduce storage cost while facilitating scientific analyses. Unfortunately, this tends to yield large compressed files. In some cases, however, a user might not need the data at a high fidelity. Progressive compression addresses this issue by refactoring the data into a hierarchical series of increasing fidelity, allowing users to download the data at an initial fidelity and subsequently retrieve higher fidelities. This paper studies a resolution-based progressive compression approach that achieves competitive compression ratios against traditional compression methods. Furthermore, it studies how the progression of resolution affects the quality of the data.
items.abstract_zh: 浮点数据通常在严格的误差范围内进行压缩，以降低存储成本，同时促进科学分析。不幸的是，这往往会产生很大的压缩文件。然而，在某些情况下，用户可能不需要高保真度的数据。渐进式压缩通过将数据重构为保真度不断增加的分层系列来解决此问题，允许用户以初始保真度下载数据并随后检索更高的保真度。本文研究了一种基于分辨率的渐进压缩方法，该方法可实现与传统压缩方法相比具有竞争力的压缩比。此外，它还研究分辨率的进展如何影响数据的质量。

items.title: Dynamic Factor Graphs for Attack Preemption.
items.abstract: Preempting attacks that target supercomputing systems before damage is done remains a top security priority. The main challenge is that noisy attack attempts and unreliable alerts often mask real attacks, resulting in permanent damage, such as system integrity violations and data breaches. This paper describes a security testbed embedded in the live traffic of a supercomputer at the National Center for Supercomputing Applications (NCSA). The objective is to demonstrate attack preemption, i.e., stopping system compromise and data breaches in petascale supercomputers. Deployment of our testbed at NCSA enabled the following key contributions:
items.abstract_zh: 在造成损害之前先发制人针对超级计算系统的攻击仍然是安全的首要任务。主要挑战是嘈杂的攻击尝试和不可靠的警报常常掩盖真正的攻击，从而导致永久性损害，例如系统完整性违规和数据泄露。本文描述了嵌入在国家超级计算应用中心 (NCSA) 超级计算机实时流量中的安全测试平台。目的是演示攻击先发制人，即阻止千万亿级超级计算机中的系统泄露和数据泄露。在 NCSA 部署我们的测试平台实现了以下关键贡献：

items.title: Scaling LLM Training Using RDMA over Converged Ethernet.
items.abstract: We present a comprehensive benchmarking study that evaluates the scaling performance of RDMA over Converged Ethernet (RoCE) and compares it with InfiniBand in the context of large-scale LLM training workloads. While InfiniBand is traditionally favored for its low-latency, high-bandwidth characteristics, it imposes significant infrastructure and operational costs. RoCE, leveraging commodity Ethernet and RDMA, offers a cost-effective alternative. Through extensive experiments on production clusters, we demonstrate that RoCE can achieve near-linear scaling performance comparable to InfiniBand when properly configured. Our analysis spans data sharding strategies, quantization and activation recomputation techniques, batch size tuning, and system-level optimizations, providing practical guidance for designing scalable and efficient AI infrastructure.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项全面的基准测试研究，评估融合以太网上的 RDMA (RoCE) 的扩展性能，并将其与大规模 LLM 训练工作负载背景下的 InfiniBand 进行比较。虽然 InfiniBand 传统上因其低延迟、高带宽特性而受到青睐，但它带来了巨大的基础设施和运营成本。 RoCE 利用商用以太网和 RDMA，提供了一种经济高效的替代方案。通过对生产集群的大量实验，我们证明，在正确配置的情况下，RoCE 可以实现与 InfiniBand 相当的近线性扩展性能。我们的分析涵盖数据分片策略、量化和激活重新计算技术、批量大小调整和系统级优化，为设计可扩展且高效的人工智能基础设施提供实用指导。

items.title: To Stream or Not to Stream: Towards A Quantitative Model for Remote HPC Processing Decisions.
items.abstract: Modern scientific instruments generate data at rates that increasingly exceed local compute capabilities and, when paired with the staging and I/O overheads of file-based transfers, also render file-based use of remote HPC resources impractical for time-sensitive analysis and experimental steering. Real-time streaming frameworks promise to reduce latency and improve system efficiency, but lack a principled way to assess their feasibility. In this work, we introduce a quantitative framework and an accompanying Streaming Speed Score to evaluate whether remote high-performance computing (HPC) resources can provide timely data processing compared to local alternatives. Our model incorporates key parameters including data generation rate, transfer efficiency, remote processing power, and file input/output overhead to compute total processing completion time (Tpct) and identify operational regimes where streaming is beneficial. We motivate our methodology with use cases from facilities such as APS, FRIB, LCLS-II, and the LHC, and validate our approach through an illustrative case study based on LCLS-II data. Our measurements show that streaming can achieve up to 97% lower end-to-end completion time than file-based methods under high data rates, while worst-case congestion can increase transfer times by over an order of magnitude, underscoring the importance of tail latency in streaming feasibility decisions.
items.abstract_zh: 现代科学仪器生成数据的速度越来越超过本地计算能力，并且当与基于文件的传输的分段和 I/O 开销相结合时，还使得基于文件的远程 HPC 资源的使用对于时间敏感的分析和实验指导来说是不切实际的。实时流框架有望减少延迟并提高系统效率，但缺乏评估其可行性的原则性方法。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个定量框架和随附的流速度分数，以评估与本地替代方案相比，远程高性能计算（HPC）资源是否可以提供及时的数据处理。我们的模型结合了关键参数，包括数据生成率、传输效率、远程处理能力和文件输入/输出开销，以计算总处理完成时间 (Tpct) 并确定流式处理有利的操作机制。我们利用来自 APS、FRIB、LCLS-II 和 LHC 等设施的用例来激发我们的方法，并通过基于 LCLS-II 数据的说明性案例研究来验证我们的方法。我们的测量表明，在高数据速率下，流式传输可以比基于文件的方法缩短高达 97% 的端到端完成时间，而最坏情况的拥塞可能会使传输时间增加一个数量级以上，这凸显了尾部延迟在流式传输可行性决策中的重要性。

items.title: Adapting Classic Scheduling Heuristics for Online Execution under Uncertainty.
items.abstract: We present an automated framework for online task scheduling on heterogeneous distributed systems, building on a modular parametric scheduler that enables dynamic scheduling decisions based on evolving execution states. Inspired by classical list-scheduling strategies such as HEFT and CPoP, our online scheduler simulates real-time task scheduling using only partial task graph knowledge. We evaluate our online scheduler variants against both their traditional offline baselines and a naive online strategy using a large-scale benchmark suite of real-world scientific workflows. Experimental results across different estimation methods and compute-to-communication ratio (CCR) settings show that our adaptive online schedulers consistently outperform the naive approach, achieving performance within approximately 3–5% of an ideal offline scheduler that has full future knowledge (compared to the approximately 10% overhead for the naive baseline).
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于异构分布式系统上在线任务调度的自动化框架，该框架建立在模块化参数调度器的基础上，该调度器能够根据不断变化的执行状态进行动态调度决策。受到 HEFT 和 CPoP 等经典列表调度策略的启发，我们的在线调度程序仅使用部分任务图知识来模拟实时任务调度。我们使用现实世界科学工作流程的大规模基准套件，根据传统的离线基线和简单的在线策略来评估我们的在线调度程序变体。不同估计方法和计算通信比 (CCR) 设置的实验结果表明，我们的自适应在线调度程序始终优于朴素方法，其性能与具有完整未来知识的理想离线调度程序的性能相差约 3-5%（相比之下，朴素基线的开销约为 10%）。

items.title: A Practical Quantum Solver for Multidimensional Partial Differential Equations.
items.abstract: Quantum computing has the potential to transform computational problem-solving by leveraging quantum mechanical principles of superposition and entanglement. This capability is particularly important for the numerical solution of complex and/or multidimensional partial differential equations (PDEs). There are currently many quantum techniques available for solving PDEs, which are mainly based on variational quantum algorithms (VQAs). However, the existing quantum PDE solvers, particularly those based on VQAs suffer from limitations such as low accuracy, high execution times, and low scalability on both simulators as well as on real quantum devices. In this work, we propose an efficient and scalable algorithm for solving multidimensional PDEs. We present two variants of our algorithm: the first leverages finite-difference method (FDM), classical-to-quantum (C2Q) encoding, and numerical instantiation, while the second employs FDM, C2Q, and column-by-column decomposition (CCD). Both variants are designed to enhance accuracy and scalability while reducing execution times. We have validated our proposed algorithm by solving several practically useful PDEs such as Poisson, heat, Black-Scholes, and Navier-Stokes equations. Our results demonstrate higher accuracy, higher scalability, and faster execution times compared to VQA-based solvers on noise-free and noisy quantum simulators from IBM and achieved promising results on real quantum hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算有潜力通过利用量子力学的叠加和纠缠原理来改变计算问题的解决方式。此功能对于复杂和/或多维偏微分方程 (PDE) 的数值求解尤其重要。目前有许多量子技术可用于求解偏微分方程，其中主要基于变分量子算法（VQA）。然而，现有的量子偏微分方程求解器，特别是基于 VQA 的求解器，在模拟器和真实量子设备上都存在精度低、执行时间长、可扩展性低等局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效且可扩展的算法来求解多维偏微分方程。我们提出了算法的两种变体：第一种利用有限差分法 (FDM)、经典到量子 (C2Q) 编码和数值实例化，而第二种采用 FDM、C2Q 和逐列分解 (CCD)。这两种变体都旨在提高准确性和可扩展性，同时减少执行时间。我们通过求解几个实际有用的偏微分方程（例如泊松方程、热方程、布莱克-斯科尔斯方程和纳维-斯托克斯方程）验证了我们提出的算法。与 IBM 无噪声和有噪声量子模拟器上基于 VQA 的求解器相比，我们的结果表明具有更高的准确性、更高的可扩展性和更快的执行时间，并且在真实量子硬件上取得了有希望的结果。

items.title: Evaluating HPK for Running Cloud-Native Workloads on Slurm Clusters.
items.abstract: The escalating complexity of applications and services encourages a shift towards higher-level data processing pipelines that integrate both Cloud-native and HPC steps into the same workflow. Cloud providers and HPC centers typically provide both execution platforms on separate resources. In this paper we explore a more practical design that enables running unmodified Cloud-native workloads directly on the main HPC cluster, avoiding resource partitioning and retaining the HPC center’s existing job management and accounting policies.
items.abstract_zh: 应用程序和服务的复杂性不断上升，促使人们转向更高级别的数据处理管道，将云原生和 HPC 步骤集成到同一工作流程中。云提供商和 HPC 中心通常在不同的资源上提供两个执行平台。在本文中，我们探索了一种更实用的设计，可以直接在主 HPC 集群上运行未经修改的云原生工作负载，避免资源分区并保留 HPC 中心现有的作业管理和会计策略。

items.title: PEAK: Cost-Adaptive Profiling in a Heartbeat.
items.abstract: Instrumentation-based profiling is essential for uncovering fine-grained optimization opportunities in High-Performance Computing (HPC) and cloud applications, yet static instrumentation methods often impose fixed profiling overheads that cannot adapt to the dynamic workloads from applications at runtime. We further develop PEAK, a Dynamic Binary Instrumentation (DBI)-based profiler with two complementary modes for overhead control: a static mode, which enforces an upper limit on the absolute instrumentation overhead, and a dynamic mode based on the heartbeat mechanism, which controls the relative overhead in real time to maintain a user-defined ratio. Evaluations of workloads ranging from compute-intensive kernels to lightweight functions show that the heartbeat mechanism effectively bounds overhead while improving profile accuracy compared to static methods, delivering predictable and adaptive profiling performance for long-running, dynamic workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 基于检测的分析对于发现高性能计算 (HPC) 和云应用程序中的细粒度优化机会至关重要，但静态检测方法通常会带来固定的分析开销，无法适应运行时应用程序的动态工作负载。我们进一步开发了 PEAK，一种基于动态二进制检测 (DBI) 的分析器，具有两种互补的开销控制模式：静态模式，强制绝对检测开销的上限；以及基于心跳机制的动态模式，实时控制相对开销以维持用户定义的比率。对从计算密集型内核到轻量级函数的工作负载的评估表明，与静态方法相比，心跳机制有效地限制了开销，同时提高了分析准确性，为长期运行的动态工作负载提供可预测和自适应的分析性能。

items.title: Beyond Guess and Check: Quantifying the Fidelity of Proxy Applications.
items.abstract: Proxy applications are targeted submodels of larger parent applications, designed to represent key characteristics such as the programming model, memory usage, or communication behaviors. Proxy applications are valuable for system design and optimization, offering a more manageable and privacy-preserving alternative to analyzing the full parent application, as long as they accurately capture the characteristics of the parent applications they represent.
items.abstract_zh: 代理应用程序是较大父应用程序的目标子模型，旨在表示关键特征，例如编程模型、内存使用或通信行为。代理应用程序对于系统设计和优化非常有价值，只要它们准确地捕获它们所代表的父应用程序的特征，就可以为分析完整的父应用程序提供更易于管理和保护隐私的替代方案。

items.title: MoE-Inference-Bench: Performance Evaluation of Mixture of Expert Large Language and Vision Models.
items.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have enabled the scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) by achieving massive parameter counts while maintaining computational efficiency. However, MoEs introduce several inference-time challenges, including load imbalance across experts and the additional routing computational overhead. To address these challenges and fully harness the benefits of MoE, a systematic evaluation of hardware acceleration techniques is essential. We present MoE-Inference-Bench, a comprehensive study to evaluate MoE performance across diverse scenarios. We analyze the impact of batch size, sequence length, and critical MoE hyperparameters such as FFN dimensions and number of experts on throughput. We evaluate several optimization techniques on Nvidia H100 GPUs, including pruning, Fused MoE operations, speculative decoding, quantization, and various parallelization strategies. Our evaluation includes MoEs from the Mixtral, DeepSeek, OLMoE and Qwen families. The results reveal performance differences across configurations and provide insights for the efficient deployment of MoEs.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过在保持计算效率的同时实现大量参数计数，实现了大型语言模型 (LLM) 和视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的扩展。然而，MoE 引入了一些推理时间挑战，包括专家之间的负载不平衡和额外的路由计算开销。为了应对这些挑战并充分利用 MoE 的优势，对硬件加速技术进行系统评估至关重要。我们提出了 MoE-Inference-Bench，这是一项评估 MoE 在不同场景下表现的综合研究。我们分析了批量大小、序列长度和关键 MoE 超参数（例如 FFN 维度和专家数量）对吞吐量的影响。我们在 Nvidia H100 GPU 上评估了多种优化技术，包括修剪、Fused MoE 操作、推测性解码、量化和各种并行化策略。我们的评估包括来自 Mixtral、DeepSeek、OLMoE 和 Qwen 系列的 MoE。结果揭示了不同配置之间的性能差异，并为 MoE 的高效部署提供了见解。

items.title: Scaling Hybrid Quantum-HPC Applications with the Quantum Framework.
items.abstract: Hybrid quantum-high performance computing (Q-HPC) workflows are emerging as a key strategy for running quantum applications at scale in current noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. These workflows must operate seamlessly across diverse simulators and hardware backends since no single simulator offers the best performance for every circuit type. Simulation efficiency depends strongly on circuit structure, entanglement, and depth, making a flexible and backend-agnostic execution model essential for fair benchmarking, informed platform selection, and ultimately the identification of quantum advantage opportunities. In this work, we extend the Quantum Framework (QFw), a modular and HPC-aware orchestration layer, to integrate multiple local backends (Qiskit Aer, NWQ-Sim, QTensor, and TN-QVM) and a cloud-based quantum backend (IonQ) under a unified interface. Using this integration, we execute a number of non-variational as well as variational workloads. The results highlight workload-specific backend advantages: while Qiskit Aer’s matrix product state excels for large Ising models, NWQ-Sim not only leads on large-scale entanglement and Hamiltonian but also shows the benefits of concurrent subproblem execution in a distributed manner for optimization problems. These findings demonstrate that simulator-agnostic, HPC-aware orchestration is a practical path toward scalable, reproducible, and portable Q-HPC ecosystems, thereby accelerating progress toward demonstrating quantum advantage.
items.abstract_zh: 混合量子高性能计算 (Q-HPC) 工作流程正在成为在当前嘈杂的中规模量子 (NISQ) 设备中大规模运行量子应用程序的关键策略。这些工作流程必须在不同的模拟器和硬件后端之间无缝运行，因为没有一个模拟器可以为每种电路类型提供最佳性能。仿真效率在很大程度上取决于电路结构、纠缠和深度，这使得灵活且与后端无关的执行模型对于公平基准测试、明智的平台选择以及最终识别量子优势机会至关重要。在这项工作中，我们扩展了量子框架（QFw），一个模块化和HPC感知的编排层，以在统一的接口下集成多个本地后端（Qiskit Aer、NWQ-Sim、QTensor和TN-QVM）和基于云的量子后端（IonQ）。使用这种集成，我们执行许多非变分和变分工作负载。结果突出了特定于工作负载的后端优势：虽然 Qiskit Aer 的矩阵乘积状态在大型 Ising 模型中表现出色，但 NWQ-Sim 不仅在大规模纠缠和哈密顿量方面领先，而且还显示了以分布式方式并发子问题执行对于优化问题的好处。这些发现表明，与模拟器无关的 HPC 感知编排是实现可扩展、可重复和便携式 Q-HPC 生态系统的实用途径，从而加速了展示量子优势的进展。

items.title: Characterizing the Impact of GPU Power Management on an Exascale System.
items.abstract: As GPU-accelerated high-performance computing (HPC) systems approach exascale performance, controlling energy consumption without compromising throughput is essential. Architectures such as the AMD MI250X-based Frontier supercomputer provide runtime mechanisms like frequency and power capping, enabling energy tuning without modifying application code. Although both target energy reduction, they operate via distinct hardware control paths and influence workloads differently. We present a comprehensive evaluation of these strategies on a leadership-class system using diverse HPC proxy applications representative of production workloads. Our study analyzes performance–energy trade-offs across multiple capping levels, node counts (1 and 32), and application profiles. Results show that frequency capping generally achieves higher energy efficiency and scalability, with gains of up to 13.2% without performance loss, while power capping is more effective for single-node runs or bursty GPU utilization. We also provide practical guidelines to help system administrators and users balance energy efficiency and performance in large-scale scientific workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 加速的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统接近百亿亿次性能，在不影响吞吐量的情况下控制能耗至关重要。基于 AMD MI250X 的 Frontier 超级计算机等架构提供频率和功率上限等运行时机制，无需修改应用程序代码即可实现能量调整。尽管两者都以节能为目标，但它们通过不同的硬件控制路径进行操作，并对工作负载产生不同的影响。我们使用代表生产工作负载的各种 HPC 代理应用程序在领先级系统上对这些策略进行了全面评估。我们的研究分析了多个上限级别、节点数量（1 和 32）和应用程序配置文件之间的性能与能源权衡。结果表明，频率上限通常可以实现更高的能源效率和可扩展性，在不损失性能的情况下，增益高达 13.2%，而功率上限对于单节点运行或突发性 GPU 使用更有效。我们还提供实用指南，帮助系统管理员和用户在大规模科学工作负载中平衡能源效率和性能。

items.title: LLM-based Optimization Algorithm Selection for High-Performance Networks Orchestration.
items.abstract: The rapid growth of Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications, particularly through the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), has caused an unprecedented growth in computing and network infrastructures. Current infrastructure expansion cannot keep pace, resulting in suboptimal performance. This creates an urgent need for network automation capable of dynamically orchestrating services and exploiting all available resources. Manual optimization processes are slow, error-prone, and unable to meet the requirements of complex, multi-domain, and data-intensive networks. A fundamental challenge is the absence of a universal optimization algorithm that performs effectively across all scenarios. In this paper, we present preliminary work on an LLM-based optimization algorithm selection framework for multi-domain, high-performance networks orchestration. The proposed framework utilizes LLM-generated descriptive embeddings of algorithms, network state logs, and service requests to identify the most suitable optimization method from a pool of algorithms, curating optimization to the current scenario.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 应用的快速增长，特别是通过大型语言模型 (LLM) 的广泛采用，导致计算和网络基础设施出现前所未有的增长。当前的基础设施扩张无法跟上步伐，导致性能不佳。这就迫切需要能够动态编排服务并利用所有可用资源的网络自动化。手动优化过程速度慢、容易出错，无法满足复杂、多域、数据密集型网络的要求。一个根本的挑战是缺乏能够在所有场景下有效执行的通用优化算法。在本文中，我们提出了针对多域、高性能网络编排的基于 LLM 的优化算法选择框架的初步工作。所提出的框架利用 LLM 生成的算法描述性嵌入、网络状态日志和服务请求来从算法池中识别最合适的优化方法，从而针对当前场景进行优化。

items.title: Weak Scaling of NVSHMEM Applied To Hashed Distributed Structured Data.
items.abstract: We present a parallel, hash-based software library, HashBrick, for sparse, block-structured applications on CPUs and NVIDIA GPUs. We use a brick-based layout, where data is aggregated into small regular bricks, and hashes hide the complexity of neighbor indexing. This exposes an extra level of flexibility for irregular data and avoids packing communication buffers for ghost zones. One-sided NVSHMEM is used for GPU-GPU communication of an irregular distribution of ghost bricks. Weak scaling experiments using a high-order CFD application and a Jacobi iteration benchmark were run on a NVIDIA GH200 cluster. For constant problem size per node, the computation time is constant, and communication scales well despite load imbalance. We find that the variation in the distribution of ghost bricks more or less correlates with scaling efficiency. Our results show that MPI and NVSHMEM have similar scaling, but MPI wall-clock times are 64-84% higher for these experiments.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于哈希的并行软件库 HashBrick，适用于 CPU 和 NVIDIA GPU 上的稀疏块结构应用程序。我们使用基于砖块的布局，其中数据被聚合成小的规则砖块，并且哈希隐藏了邻居索引的复杂性。 This exposes an extra level of flexibility for irregular data and avoids packing communication buffers for ghost zones.单面 NVSHMEM 用于不规则分布鬼砖的 GPU-GPU 通信。使用高阶 CFD 应用程序和 Jacobi 迭代基准在 NVIDIA GH200 集群上运行弱扩展实验。对于每个节点的恒定问题大小，计算时间是恒定的，并且尽管负载不平衡，通信也可以很好地扩展。我们发现鬼砖分布的变化或多或少与缩放效率相关。我们的结果表明，MPI 和 NVSHMEM 具有相似的缩放比例，但这些实验的 MPI 挂钟时间要高 64-84%。

items.title: Pretraining LLMs at Scale: Tuning Strategies and Performance Portability.
items.abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) at scale presents challenges that demand careful co-design across software, hardware, and parallelization strategies. In this work, we introduce a communication-aware tuning methodology for optimizing LLM pretraining, and adapt the performance portability metric to evaluate LLM-training efficiency across our systems. Our methodology, validated through LLM pretraining workloads at a leading global technology enterprise, delivered up to 1.6x speedup over default configurations. We further provide six key insights that challenge prevailing assumptions in LLM training performance, including the trade-offs between ZeRO stages, the default DeepSpeed communication collectives, and the critical role of batch size choices. Our findings highlight the need for platform-specific tuning and advocate for a shift toward end-to-end co-design to unlock performance efficiency in LLM training.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临着挑战，需要跨软件、硬件和并行化策略进行仔细的协同设计。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于优化 LLM 预训练的通信感知调整方法，并调整性能可移植性指标来评估我们系统中的 LLM 训练效率。我们的方法通过一家全球领先技术企业的 LLM 预训练工作负载进行了验证，与默认配置相比，速度提高了 1.6 倍。我们进一步提供了六个关键见解，挑战了 LLM 训练性能中的普遍假设，包括 ZeRO 阶段之间的权衡、默认的 DeepSpeed 通信集合以及批量大小选择的关键作用。我们的研究结果强调了针对特定平台进行调整的必要性，并提倡转向端到端协同设计，以释放法学硕士培训的性能效率。

items.title: BioR5: A Three-Layer Architecture for Biological Reasoning in Scientific AI.
items.abstract: Biological research requires diverse reasoning modes, from phylogenetic analysis to mechanistic understanding, each demanding specific methods and data types. Current AI systems typically employ single methodologies, limiting effectiveness in complex biological domains. We present BioR5, a three-layer architecture implementing eleven distinct biological reasoning modes with intelligent triage and specialized tool integration. Layer A provides parametric memory via large language models, Layer B incorporates specialized foundation models for multimodal data, and Layer C connects external databases and computational tools. Our system features an intelligent reasoning mode selection combining keyword matching with LLM analysis to choose appropriate strategies automatically. We demonstrate the framework through toxicology specialization, integrating TX-Gemma predictions with PubChem, ToxCast, and ChEMBL data. The open-source implementation supports dynamic registration of new reasoning modes and tools, enabling collaborative development and community-driven expansion. BioR5 represents an architecture-first approach to developing reasoning-mode-aware AI systems that scale easily with new biological use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 生物学研究需要多种推理模式，从系统发育分析到机制理解，每种推理模式都需要特定的方法和数据类型。当前的人工智能系统通常采用单一方法，限制了复杂生物领域的有效性。我们推出了 BioR5，这是一种三层架构，通过智能分类和专业工具集成实现了 11 种不同的生物推理模式。 A 层通过大型语言模型提供参数存储，B 层包含多模态数据的专用基础模型，C 层连接外部数据库和计算工具。我们的系统具有智能推理模式选择，结合关键词匹配和LLM分析，自动选择合适的策略。我们通过毒理学专业化、将 TX-Gemma 预测与 PubChem、ToxCast 和 ChEMBL 数据相结合来展示该框架。开源实现支持新推理模式和工具的动态注册，从而实现协作开发和社区驱动的扩展。 BioR5 代表了一种架构优先的方法，用于开发推理模式感知的人工智能系统，该系统可以轻松地根据新的生物用例进行扩展。

items.title: Redesigning GROMACS Halo Exchange: Improving Strong Scaling with GPU-initiated NVSHMEM.
items.abstract: Improving time-to-solution in molecular dynamics simulations often requires strong scaling due to fixed-sized problems. GROMACS is highly latency-sensitive, with peak iteration rates in the sub-millisecond, making scalability on heterogeneous supercomputers challenging. MPI’s CPU-centric nature introduces additional latencies on GPU-resident applications’ critical path, hindering GPU utilization and scalability. To address these limitations, we present an NVSHMEM-based GPU kernel-initiated redesign of the GROMACS domain decomposition halo-exchange algorithm. Highly tuned GPU kernels fuse data packing and communication, leveraging hardware latency-hiding for fine-grained overlap. We employ kernel fusion across overlapped data forwarding communication phases and utilize the asynchronous copy engine over NVLink to optimize latency and bandwidth. Our GPU-resident formulation greatly increases communication-computation overlap, improving GROMACS strong scaling performance across NVLink by up to 1.5x (intra-node) and 2x (multi-node), and up to 1.3x multi-node over NVLink+InfiniBand. This demonstrates the profound benefits of GPU-initiated communication for strong-scaling a broad range of latency-sensitive applications.
items.abstract_zh: 由于固定大小的问题，缩短分子动力学模拟的解决时间通常需要强大的缩放。 GROMACS 对延迟高度敏感，峰值迭代速率为亚毫秒级，这使得异构超级计算机的可扩展性面临挑战。 MPI 以 CPU 为中心的特性在 GPU 驻留应用程序的关键路径上引入了额外的延迟，从而阻碍了 GPU 的利用率和可扩展性。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于 NVSHMEM 的 GPU 内核发起的 GROMACS 域分解光环交换算法的重新设计。高度调优的 GPU 内核融合了数据打包和通信，利用硬件延迟隐藏实现细粒度重叠。我们在重叠的数据转发通信阶段采用内核融合，并利用 NVLink 上的异步复制引擎来优化延迟和带宽。我们的 GPU 驻留公式极大地增加了通信计算重叠，将 GROMACS 在 NVLink 上的强大扩展性能提高了高达 1.5 倍（节点内）和 2 倍（多节点），并且在 NVLink+InfiniBand 上将多节点提高了高达 1.3 倍。这证明了 GPU 发起的通信对于大力扩展各种延迟敏感应用程序的深远优势。

items.title: Scalable, High-Fidelity Monitoring of Application Communication Patterns in Vernier.
items.abstract: Understanding the irregular, dynamic communication patterns in HPC applications at scale is critical when evaluating potential software optimizations and hardware architectures. Current systems monitor communication behavior for entire applications as exhaustive traces or general-purpose aggregated statistics. Generally, these approaches often do not scale well and the data gathered is often too generic or inflexible to make specific hardware/software optimizations. This paper describes a new, configurable, histogram-based approach to gathering scalable, high-fidelity monitoring information about HPC communication that we implemented in the Vernier communication monitoring system. This approach enables targeted collection of statistical data about annotated communication patterns for online or offline analysis, benchmarking, or network simulations. We assess these capabilities by collecting communication patterns from several production HPC applications at scale, showing that the resulting statistical representations accurately characterize the communication patterns in these applications, and can be used to provide new insights into communication patterns of complex HPC applications.
items.abstract_zh: 在评估潜在的软件优化和硬件架构时，了解大规模 HPC 应用程序中不规则的动态通信模式至关重要。当前系统以详尽的跟踪或通用聚合统计数据的形式监控整个应用程序的通信行为。一般来说，这些方法通常不能很好地扩展，并且收集的数据通常过于通用或不灵活，无法进行特定的硬件/软件优化。本文描述了一种新的、可配置的、基于直方图的方法，用于收集有关我们在 Vernier 通信监控系统中实现的 HPC 通信的可扩展、高保真监控信息。这种方法可以有针对性地收集有关带注释的通信模式的统计数据，以进行在线或离线分析、基准测试或网络模拟。我们通过从多个生产 HPC 应用程序中大规模收集通信模式来评估这些功能，结果表明所得到的统计表示准确地表征了这些应用程序中的通信模式，并且可用于提供对复杂 HPC 应用程序的通信模式的新见解。

items.title: eIM: GPU-Accelerated Efficient Influence Maximization in Large-Scale Social Networks.
items.abstract: The influence maximization problem seeks to identify a subset of k vertices in a network that, when activated, maximizes the spread of influence under a given diffusion process. It is NP-hard to find the optimal set of influential vertices; thus, recent studies have focused on developing algorithms to find an approximate solution. The state-of-the-art parallel implementations leverage a sketch-based algorithm called influence maximization via martingales (IMM). However, IMM incurs significant memory overhead due to the storage requirements of graph traversal samples called random reverse reachable (RRR) sets. In this paper, we introduce efficient Influence Maximization (eIM), a novel GPU-accelerated IMM algorithm designed to improve the efficiency and scalability of IMM. Compared to two popular GPU implementations, eIM achieves similar accuracy with one to three orders of magnitude speedups while reducing the memory requirement to store network data and RRR sets up to 54%.
items.abstract_zh: 影响力最大化问题旨在识别网络中 k 个顶点的子集，该子集在激活时会在给定扩散过程下最大化影响力的传播。找到影响力顶点的最优集合是 NP 困难的；因此，最近的研究重点是开发算法来寻找近似解。最先进的并行实现利用基于草图的算法，称为通过鞅影响最大化 (IMM)。然而，由于称为随机反向可达 (RRR) 集的图遍历样本的存储要求，IMM 会产生大量内存开销。在本文中，我们介绍了高效的影响最大化（eIM），这是一种新颖的 GPU 加速的 IMM 算法，旨在提高 IMM 的效率和可扩展性。与两种流行的 GPU 实现相比，eIM 实现了相似的精度，加速了一到三个数量级，同时减少了存储网络数据的内存需求，RRR 设置高达 54%。

items.title: RL4Sys: A Lightweight System-driven RL Framework for Drop-in Integration in System Optimization.
items.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved notable success in complex decision-making tasks across various domains, including games, autonomous driving, and robotics. Motivated by these advances, systems researchers have explored RL for optimizing system behavior. However, practical deployment remains uncommon, as existing RL frameworks are ill-suited for system-oriented use cases, introducing substantial integration and runtime overhead in system software. To address this gap, we present RL4Sys, a lightweight RL framework designed specifically for seamless system-level integration. RL4Sys includes a minimal client that embeds easily within target systems to record trajectories and run inference from locally cached deep policies. RL4Sys’s remote RL trainers are executed asynchronously and distributed across servers, leveraging zero-copy gRPC and adaptive batching to update policies without blocking the original system. Our evaluation shows that RL4Sys matches the convergence behavior of conventional RL frameworks and achieves up to 220% higher throughput in environment-oriented settings compared to the state-of-the-art framework, RLlib, while incurring less than 6% runtime overhead relative to the original non-RL system. These results indicate that RL4Sys substantially lowers the barrier to deploying RL for real-world systems optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 在游戏、自动驾驶和机器人等各个领域的复杂决策任务中取得了显着的成功。受这些进步的推动，系统研究人员探索了强化学习来优化系统行为。然而，实际部署仍然不常见，因为现有的强化学习框架不适合面向系统的用例，在系统软件中引入了大量的集成和运行时开销。为了解决这一差距，我们推出了 RL4Sys，这是一种专为无缝系统级集成而设计的轻量级 RL 框架。 RL4Sys 包括一个最小的客户端，可以轻松嵌入目标系统中，以记录轨迹并根据本地缓存的深度策略进行推理。 RL4Sys 的远程 RL 训练器异步执行并分布在服务器上，利用零拷贝 gRPC 和自适应批处理来更新策略，而不会阻塞原始系统。我们的评估表明，RL4Sys 与传统 RL 框架的收敛行为相匹配，并且与最先进的框架 RLlib 相比，在面向环境的设置中实现了高达 220% 的高吞吐量，同时相对于原始非 RL 系统，运行时开销不到 6%。这些结果表明 RL4Sys 大大降低了部署 RL 进行现实系统优化的障碍。

items.title: Simulating Hybrid Analog + RISC-V Systems for HPC Applications.
items.abstract: As digital scaling trends have slowed over the past decade, there has been renewed interest in new computing paradigms. Analog computing is one such alternative, and has the potential to provide performance and efficiency beyond what is achievable by digital systems, but many challenges remain. One important challenge is enabling complex applications to take advantage of analog components that only support a limited set of computational kernels. In this work, we examine one potential solution to this challenge, hybrid analog–digital systems in which analog accelerators function as tightly integrated coprocessors within each core. In this approach, the RISC-V ISA simplifies hybrid system design by providing a mature software stack for the digital components, enabling system designers to focus on the analog-specific aspects of the architecture and software. To investigate the viability of hybrid architectures for high-performance computing (HPC), we evaluate two iterative linear solvers on analog–digital RISC-V processors with the Structural Simulation Toolkit (SST). Our analysis shows that digital operations remain bottlenecks even in analog-dominated applications. This demonstrates the importance of further work on hybrid systems and on software to effectively balance analog and digital operations for large-scale applications.
items.abstract_zh: 随着过去十年数字扩展趋势放缓，人们对新的计算范例重新产生了兴趣。模拟计算就是这样的一种替代方案，它有可能提供超出数字系统所能达到的性能和效率，但仍然存在许多挑战。一个重要的挑战是使复杂的应用程序能够利用仅支持一组有限的计算内核的模拟组件。在这项工作中，我们研究了应对这一挑战的一种潜在解决方案，即混合模拟数字系统，其中模拟加速器在每个内核中充当紧密集成的协处理器。在这种方法中，RISC-V ISA 通过为数字组件提供成熟的软件堆栈来简化混合系统设计，使系统设计人员能够专注于架构和软件的模拟特定方面。为了研究高性能计算 (HPC) 混合架构的可行性，我们使用结构仿真工具包 (SST) 评估了模拟数字 RISC-V 处理器上的两个迭代线性求解器。我们的分析表明，即使在模拟主导的应用中，数字操作仍然是瓶颈。这表明进一步研究混合系统和软件以有效平衡大规模应用的模拟和数字操作的重要性。

items.title: Compute4Biology: Taking Stock of High Performance Computing Needs for Foundation Models in Biological Sciences.
items.abstract: Foundation models are driving a paradigm shift across the life sciences, yet their transformative potential is fundamentally coupled to the capabilities of high-performance computing (HPC). The computational workloads presented by different biology and allied domains, from genomics and transcriptomics to proteomics, chemistry, and biomedical literature, are remarkably diverse and create distinct challenges for HPC infrastructure. This paper presents the first systematic, cross-domain analysis of HPC needs for state-of-the-art foundation models in biological sciences. We move beyond a simple cost summary to characterize and compare the specific computational bottlenecks inherent to each domain: the massive I/O demands of genomic sequence data, the intense memory pressure from protein structure prediction, and the unique compute kernels required for molecular modeling. By analyzing these diverse workloads, we identify common patterns and trade-offs in hardware utilization, data management, and software stack design. We conclude by outlining a unified set of best practices and co-design principles for building the next generation of HPC systems capable of accelerating discovery across the full spectrum of AI-driven science. This is a running survey of HPC needs in the biological domain; we would maintain a project page at www.abc.xxx
items.abstract_zh: 基础模型正在推动生命科学领域的范式转变，但它们的变革潜力从根本上与高性能计算 (HPC) 的功能相结合。不同生物学和相关领域（从基因组学和转录组学到蛋白质组学、化学和生物医学文献）所带来的计算工作负载非常多样化，给 HPC 基础设施带来了独特的挑战。本文首次对生物科学中最先进的基础模型的 HPC 需求进行了系统的跨领域分析。我们超越简单的成本总结来描述和比较每个领域固有的特定计算瓶颈：基因组序列数据的大量 I/O 需求、蛋白质结构预测带来的巨大内存压力以及分子建模所需的独特计算内核。通过分析这些不同的工作负载，我们确定了硬件利用率、数据管理和软件堆栈设计方面的常见模式和权衡。最后，我们概述了一套统一的最佳实践和协同设计原则，用于构建能够加速整个人工智能驱动科学领域的发现的下一代 HPC 系统。这是对生物领域 HPC 需求的持续调查；我们将在 www.abc.xxx 维护一个项目页面

items.title: Error Analysis of Globally Distributed Workflow Management System.
items.abstract: The management of data-intensive workflows in globally distributed computing systems, such as those used in high-energy physics, presents significant challenges in scalability, resource allocation, and fault tolerance. Workflow Management Systems (WMS) provide a critical framework for addressing these challenges by automating, monitoring, and optimizing the execution of complex computational tasks across heterogeneous resources. This paper introduces the Production and Distributed Analysis (PanDA) system, a sophisticated WMS developed for the ATLAS experiment at the Large Hadron Collider (LHC). PanDA is engineered to handle the immense data processing and analysis demands of ATLAS, operating on the Worldwide LHC Computing Grid (WLCG), one of the largest distributed computing infrastructures globally. However, faults or errors frequently occur when distributing and managing workloads on such a globally distributed computing grid. Errors can occur in various form across different sites. To understand and mitigate these errors, analysis is the first step. In this work, we analyze the errors that occurs across the globally distributed grid which will be the stepping stone towards designing effective mitigation strategies.
items.abstract_zh: 全球分布式计算系统（例如高能物理中使用的系统）中数据密集型工作流程的管理在可扩展性、资源分配和容错方面提出了重大挑战。工作流管理系统 (WMS) 提供了一个关键框架，通过自动化、监控和优化跨异构资源的复杂计算任务的执行来应对这些挑战。本文介绍了生产和分布式分析 (PanDA) 系统，这是一个为大型强子对撞机 (LHC) 的 ATLAS 实验开发的复杂 WMS。 PanDA 旨在满足 ATLAS 巨大的数据处理和分析需求，在全球大型强子对撞机计算网格 (WLCG) 上运行，这是全球最大的分布式计算基础设施之一。然而，在这样的全球分布式计算网格上分配和管理工作负载时，经常会出现故障或错误。不同站点上可能会出现各种形式的错误。要了解并减轻这些错误，分析是第一步。在这项工作中，我们分析了全球分布式网格中发生的错误，这将成为设计有效缓解策略的基石。

items.title: A Query Engine for Scientific Data Exploration using Theory, Simulation, and Artificial Intelligence Models.
items.abstract: Modern scientific discovery increasingly couples large-scale simulations, heterogeneous data, and AI models into interactive, iterative workflows. Yet existing systems rarely let scientists compose expressive queries that both retrieve massive, multi‑modal datasets and invoke complex computational models (simulations or AI inferences) with low turnaround time. We present the Intelligent Data Search (IDS) framework to bridge this gap. IDS builds on the Cray Graph Engine and combines a scalable in‑memory datastore (acting as a feature store, vector store, and knowledge graph) with a unified query engine that spans keyword, set‑theoretic, and linear‑algebraic operators. It also incorporates a model repository for User-Defined Functions (UDFs) and pre‑trained AI models, and a globally distributed, multi‑tier cache to stash intermediate and simulation outputs. We demonstrate IDS on a life‑sciences workflow developed in collaboration with the National Center for Natural Products (NCNPR). This effort integrates AI models such as AlphaFold with simulation codes like AutoDock Vina, and analytic functions such as the Smith–Waterman algorithm within a single query. In our evaluation, we show strong scaling on HPC systems, a complex “what‑could‑be” query that executes millions of similarity searches and thousands of model inferences. This executes in tens of seconds at scale, resulting in a 5–15x end‑to‑end improvement from the distributed cache. IDS enables scientists to pose and iterate model-driven “what‑if” questions over petascale datasets with far lower latency and less workflow fragmentation than prior approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 现代科学发现越来越多地将大规模模拟、异构数据和人工智能模型结合到交互式、迭代的工作流程中。然而，现有系统很少允许科学家编写表达性查询，既检索大量多模态数据集，又以较短的周转时间调用复杂的计算模型（模拟或人工智能推理）。我们提出了智能数据搜索（IDS）框架来弥补这一差距。 IDS 基于 Cray 图形引擎构建，并将可扩展的内存数据存储（充当特征存储、向量存储和知识图）与涵盖关键字、集合论和线性代数运算符的统一查询引擎相结合。它还包含用于用户定义函数 (UDF) 和预训练 AI 模型的模型存储库，以及用于存储中间和模拟输出的全球分布式多层缓存。我们在与国家天然产物中心 (NCNPR) 合作开发的生命科学工作流程上演示了 IDS。这项工作将 AlphaFold 等人工智能模型与 AutoDock Vina 等模拟代码以及单个查询中的 Smith–Waterman 算法等分析功能集成在一起。在我们的评估中，我们展示了 HPC 系统的强大扩展能力，这是一个复杂的“可能是什么”查询，可以执行数百万次相似性搜索和数千次模型推理。大规模执行只需数十秒，与分布式缓存相比，端到端性能提高了 5-15 倍。 IDS 使科学家能够在千万亿级数据集上提出并迭代模型驱动的“假设”问题，与以前的方法相比，延迟要低得多，工作流碎片要少得多。

items.title: Tackling the Challenges of Adding Pulse-level Support to a Heterogeneous HPCQC Software Stack: MQSS Pulse.
items.abstract: We study the problem of adding native pulse-level control to heterogeneous High Performance Computing-Quantum Computing (HPCQC) software stacks, using the Munich Quantum Software Stack (MQSS) as a case study. The goal is to expand the capabilities of HPCQC environments by offering the ability for low-level access and control, currently typically not foreseen for such hybrid systems. For this, we need to establish new interfaces that integrate such pulse-level control into the lower layers of the software stack, including the need for proper representation.
items.abstract_zh: 我们以慕尼黑量子软件堆栈 (MQSS) 作为案例研究，研究向异构高性能计算-量子计算 (HPCQC) 软件堆栈添加本机脉冲级控制的问题。目标是通过提供低级访问和控制能力来扩展 HPCQC 环境的功能，目前此类混合系统通常无法预见到这一点。为此，我们需要建立新的接口，将此类脉冲电平控制集成到软件堆栈的较低层中，包括需要正确的表示。

items.title: MPI Collectives with Programmable Smart Switches.
items.abstract: Programmable smart network devices are heavily used by cloud providers, but typically not for HPC. However, they provide opportunities for off-loading computations, in particular for collective operations, which are important for data intensive workloads in classic HPC and ML training. In this paper, we present a prototype called mpitofino to enable offloading MPI collectives (in particular reductions) onto smart switches over an Ethernet fabric. We target Intel’s programmable Ethernet switches equipped with a Tofino ASIC, and we use the P4 programming language to process collective packets on the chip’s low-latency data path. We demonstrate how the flexibility of P4 enables us to use RoCEv2 as protocol, utilizing RDMA hardware support on the nodes’ NICs. Furthermore, we implement mpitofino as a collective provider in Open MPI and discuss its desirable scaling characteristics. Finally, we demonstrate that mpitofino can achieve data throughput close to the 100GBit/s line rate.
