items.abstract_zh: 可编程智能网络设备被云提供商大量使用，但通常不用于 HPC。然而，它们提供了卸载计算的机会，特别是对于集体操作，这对于经典 HPC 和 ML 训练中的数据密集型工作负载非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 mpitofino 的原型，可以通过以太网结构将 MPI 集合（特别是缩减）卸载到智能交换机上。我们的目标是配备 Tofino ASIC 的英特尔可编程以太网交换机，并使用 P4 编程语言来处理芯片低延迟数据路径上的集体数据包。我们演示了 P4 的灵活性如何使我们能够使用 RoCEv2 作为协议，利用节点 NIC 上的 RDMA 硬件支持。此外，我们将 mpitofino 作为 Open MPI 中的集体提供者实现，并讨论其理想的扩展特性。最后，我们证明mpitofino可以实现接近100GBit/s线速的数据吞吐量。

items.title: From Soil to Software: Experience from a STEM Workshop on Smart Plant Care and Teachable Machines.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present our work on developing a sensor-based device capable of large-scale environmental data collection. We also outline how we integrated this technology into a STEM education workshop for high school students. Conducted over three consecutive days as part of the Toledo EXCEL program, the workshop aimed to introduce students to foundational computing concepts, including data acquisition, machine learning, and artificial intelligence through accessible, hands-on activities. Participants used a custom-built IoT sensor system in conjunction with visual programming tools like MakeCode to create a smart plant care assistant. They also explored basic machine learning by training classifiers using Teachable Machine. We describe both the technical development of the sensor device and its role in engaging students with real-world computing applications. Finally, we outline plans to enhance future workshops with topics such as parallel computing and real-time data visualization dashboards.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了我们在开发能够大规模环境数据收集的基于传感器的设备方面的工作。我们还概述了如何将这项技术集成到面向高中生的 STEM 教育研讨会中。作为托莱多 EXCEL 计划的一部分，该研讨会连续举办了三天，旨在通过易于理解的实践活动向学生介绍基础计算概念，包括数据采集、机器学习和人工智能。参与者使用定制的物联网传感器系统结合 MakeCode 等可视化编程工具来创建智能植物护理助手。他们还通过使用 Teachable Machine 训练分类器来探索基本的机器学习。我们描述了传感器设备的技术发展及其在吸引学生参与现实世界计算应用方面的作用。最后，我们概述了加强未来研讨会的计划，主题包括并行计算和实时数据可视化仪表板等。

items.title: KVMSR+UDWeave: Extreme-Scaling with Fine-grained Parallelism on the UpDown Graph Supercomputer.
items.abstract: Programming irregular graph applications is challenging on today’s scalable supercomputers. We describe a novel programming model, KVMSR+UDWeave, that supports extreme scaling by exposing fine-grained parallelism. By enabling the expression of maximum parallelism, it opens the door for extreme scaling, even on both small and large graph problems.
items.abstract_zh: 在当今的可扩展超级计算机上，编写不规则图形应用程序具有挑战性。我们描述了一种新颖的编程模型 KVMSR+UDWeave，它通过暴露细粒度并行性来支持极限扩展。通过启用最大并行性的表达，它为极端扩展打开了大门，即使在小型和大型图形问题上也是如此。

items.title: Comparing Distributed-Memory Programming Frameworks with Radix Sort.
items.abstract: Distributed-memory parallel processing addresses computational problems requiring significantly more memory or computational resources than can be found on one node. Software written for distributed-memory parallel processing typically uses a distributed-memory parallel programming framework to enhance productivity, scalability, and portability across supercomputers and cluster systems.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式内存并行处理解决了需要比一个节点上多得多的内存或计算资源的计算问题。为分布式内存并行处理编写的软件通常使用分布式内存并行编程框架来提高超级计算机和集群系统之间的生产力、可扩展性和可移植性。

items.title: Adapting scientific streaming inference workflows for a deterministic tensor processing unit.
items.abstract: The realization of real-time data processing near X-ray detectors presents ongoing challenges due to long ASIC development cycles and the limited computational capacity of near-detector FPGAs. We propose a hybrid solution that streams data directly to a deterministic tensor processing unit (i.e., Groq AI accelerator), enabling low-latency, high-throughput inference. This paper describes the system architecture, supporting software stack, and performance projections, demonstrating the advantages of this hybrid platform for future X-ray imaging systems. This integration shows promise for advancing real-time edge computing and enabling intelligent control in photon science experiments. A single inference on a 128 × 128 image, including image transfer time, completes in 156.06 μ s, enabling approximately 6.4 kHz processing with the edgePtychoNN model and improving experimental-in-the-loop computing. Using this system, we achieve a 3.6 × speedup over previous systems, highlighting the potential of this approach.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 ASIC 开发周期长以及近探测器 FPGA 的计算能力有限，实现 X 射线探测器附近的实时数据处理面临着持续的挑战。我们提出了一种混合解决方案，将数据直接流式传输到确定性张量处理单元（即 Groq AI 加速器），从而实现低延迟、高吞吐量推理。本文描述了系统架构、支持软件堆栈和性能预测，展示了该混合平台对于未来 X 射线成像系统的优势。这种集成显示了推进实时边缘计算和在光子科学实验中实现智能控制的前景。对 128 × 128 图像的单次推理（包括图像传输时间）可在 156.06 μs 内完成，从而能够使用 edgePtychoNN 模型进行约 6.4 kHz 的处理，并改进实验在环计算。使用该系统，我们比以前的系统实现了 3.6 倍的加速，凸显了这种方法的潜力。

items.title: The Cost of Teaching Operational ML.
items.abstract: Operational machine learning (ML) requires skills beyond model development, including infrastructure provisioning, large-scale training across clusters, model deployment with consideration of operational performance, monitoring, and automation - capabilities grounded in high-performance computing and distributed systems. This paper presents the design and infrastructure requirements of a graduate-level course on ML Systems Engineering and Operations, aimed at equipping students with these skills. Using 186,692 total compute instance hours on the Chameleon Cloud testbed, students built end-to-end ML pipelines incorporating distributed training, reproducible experiment tracking, automated re-training and re-deployment, and continuous monitoring. We analyze compute usage across assignments, compare expected versus actual resource consumption, and estimate that replicating the course on commercial cloud platforms would cost approximately $250 per student (almost $50,000 for our course with enrollment of 191 students). All course materials are publicly available for reuse.
items.abstract_zh: 操作机器学习 (ML) 需要模型开发之外的技能，包括基础设施配置、跨集群的大规模训练、考虑操作性能的模型部署、监控和自动化——基于高性能计算和分布式系统的功能。本文介绍了机器学习系统工程和操作研究生课程的设计和基础设施要求，旨在让学生具备这些技能。学生们在 Chameleon Cloud 测试台上使用了 186,692 个总计算实例小时，构建了端到端 ML 管道，其中包含分布式训练、可重复的实验跟踪、自动重新训练和重新部署以及持续监控。我们分析了作业​​中的计算使用情况，比较了预期资源消耗与实际资源消耗，并估计在商业云平台上复制课程的成本约为每个学生 250 美元（我们的课程有 191 名学生，费用接近 50,000 美元）。所有课程材料均可公开供重复使用。

items.title: X-ray Ptychography at the Edge: Towards Real-Time Feedback for High-Speed Nanoimaging.
items.abstract: X-ray ptychography is becoming an indispensable tool for nanoscale imaging, driving innovation in functional materials, electronics, life sciences, etc. To retrieve sample images, the technique relies on advanced mathematical algorithms, making it computationally intensive. Recent advances in data acquisition have greatly increased the data generation rate, making it challenging to perform reconstruction in a timely manner to support decision making during an experiment. Here, we demonstrate how efficient GPU-based iterative reconstruction algorithms, deployed at the edge, enable real-time feedback during high-speed continuous data acquisition, allowing for a more informed experiment execution and thus increasing the quality and efficiency of the measurements. These developments represent a steppingstone towards augmentation of computationally intensive experiments with data-driven decision making, paving the way for autonomous experiments performed at machine speeds.
items.abstract_zh: X 射线叠层成像技术正在成为纳米级成像不可或缺的工具，推动功能材料、电子、生命科学等领域的创新。为了检索样本图像，该技术依赖于先进的数学算法，计算量很大。数据采集​​的最新进展极大地提高了数据生成率，使得及时执行重建以支持实验过程中的决策变得具有挑战性。在这里，我们演示了部署在边缘的基于 GPU 的高效迭代重建算法如何在高速连续数据采集期间实现实时反馈，从而实现更明智的实验执行，从而提高测量的质量和效率。这些进展代表了通过数据驱动决策增强计算密集型实验的踏脚石，为以机器速度进行的自主实验铺平了道路。

items.title: Evaluating Accuracy and Performance Tradeoffs in GPU Accelerated Single Cell RNA-seq Analysis.
items.abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) has rapidly become a big-data field, with experiments now profiling up to millions of cells in a single study. While GPU-accelerated pipelines (built on frameworks like NVIDIA RAPIDS and CuPy) promise to drastically reduce runtimes, questions remain about the fidelity and reproducibility of their outputs compared to traditional CPU-based workflows. We benchmarked matched CPU and GPU workflows on a public 1.3-million-cell dataset and systematically downsampled subsets. GPUs delivered a dramatic end-to-end speedup of over 10×, but this performance gain was accompanied by a measurable tradeoff in biological output. We found a consistent, moderate level of concordance between CPU and GPU clustering results (Adjusted Rand Index approximately 0.5) across all sample sizes. Furthermore, we demonstrated that clustering fidelity was relative to the platform used to generate the reference “ground truth.” We also found that fidelity did not strongly correlate with sample size, suggesting that platform-specific algorithmic differences and parameter choices, such as a fixed feature space, were more significant drivers of variability than cell number alone. Together, these results indicated that while modern GPUs enabled fast, large-scale scRNA-seq analysis, researchers needed to be aware of the inherent tradeoffs and consider the choice of computational platform as a critical variable impacting the final biological interpretation.
items.abstract_zh: 单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 已迅速成为一个大数据领域，现在的实验可在一项研究中分析多达数百万个细胞。虽然 GPU 加速管道（基于 NVIDIA RAPIDS 和 CuPy 等框架构建）有望大幅缩短运行时间，但与传统的基于 CPU 的工作流程相比，其输出的保真度和可重复性仍然存在问题。我们在公共 130 万个单元数据集上对匹配的 CPU 和 GPU 工作流程进行了基准测试，并系统地对子集进行了下采样。 GPU 提供了超过 10 倍的显着端到端加速，但这种性能增益伴随着生物输出的可衡量的权衡。我们发现所有样本大小的 CPU 和 GPU 聚类结果（调整后的兰德指数约为 0.5）之间具有一致、中等程度的一致性。此外，我们证明了聚类保真度与用于生成参考“地面实况”的平台相关。我们还发现保真度与样本大小没有很强的相关性，这表明特定于平台的算法差异和参数选择（例如固定的特征空间）是比单独的细胞数量更重要的变异性驱动因素。总之，这些结果表明，虽然现代 GPU 能够实现快速、大规模的 scRNA-seq 分析，但研究人员需要意识到固有的权衡，并将计算平台的选择视为影响最终生物学解释的关键变量。

items.title: From Edge to HPC: Investigating Cross-Facility Data Streaming Architectures.
items.abstract: In this paper, we investigate three cross-facility data streaming architectures, Direct Streaming (DTS), Proxied Streaming (PRS), and Managed Service Streaming (MSS). We examine their architectural variations in data flow paths and deployment feasibility, and detail their implementation using the Data Streaming to HPC (DS2HPC) architectural framework and the SciStream memory-to-memory streaming toolkit on the production-grade Advanced Computing Ecosystem (ACE) infrastructure at Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility (OLCF). We present a workflow-specific evaluation of these architectures using three synthetic workloads derived from the streaming characteristics of scientific workflows. Through simulated experiments, we measure streaming throughput, round-trip time, and overhead under work sharing, work sharing with feedback, and broadcast and gather messaging patterns commonly found in AI-HPC communication motifs. Our study shows that DTS offers a minimal-hop path, resulting in higher throughput and lower latency, whereas MSS provides greater deployment feasibility and scalability across multiple users but incurs significant overhead. PRS lies in between, offering a scalable architecture whose performance matches DTS in most cases.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了三种跨设施数据流架构：直接流（DTS）、代理流（PRS）和托管服务流（MSS）。我们检查了它们在数据流路径和部署可行性方面的架构变化，并详细介绍了它们在橡树岭领先计算设施 (OLCF) 的生产级高级计算生态系统 (ACE) 基础设施上使用 Data Streaming to HPC (DS2HPC) 架构框架和 SciStream 内存到内存流工具包的实现。我们使用源自科学工作流程的流特征的三个合成工作负载，对这些架构进行了特定于工作流程的评估。通过模拟实验，我们测量了工作共享、带反馈的工作共享以及广播和收集 AI-HPC 通信主题中常见的消息传递模式下的流吞吐量、往返时间和开销。我们的研究表明，DTS 提供了最小跳数路径，从而实现更高的吞吐量和更低的延迟，而 MSS 提供了跨多个用户的更大的部署可行性和可扩展性，但会产生大量开销。 PRS 介于两者之间，提供可扩展的架构，其性能在大多数情况下与 DTS 相匹配。

items.title: Implementing Network-level QoS at HPC Datacenters to Enable Distributed Scientific Workflows.
items.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) datacenters must handle real-time streams demanding sub-millisecond latency and bulk transfers requiring sustained multi-gigabit throughput—objectives that inherently compete on a shared network. Achieving both simultaneously requires end-to-end performance guarantees, typically provided by Quality of Service (QoS) that classify traffic, reserve bandwidth, and enforce priorities across every hop. While backbone and Wide Area Network (WAN) providers (e.g., ESnet) already enforce QoS, the local Ethernet ingress “last-mile” in HPC remains best-effort, creating a blind spot where latency accumulates and jeopardizes time-sensitive workflows. We fill this gap with standards-based Differentiated Services Code Point (DSCP) QoS solution on existing leaf–spine switches: packets are marked at the host, queued per class, and shaped on every last-mile hop through to the High Speed Network (HSN) gateway network interface card (NIC). We evaluate our solution in two scenarios representative of HPC traffic: Intra-domain—traffic that stays entirely within the datacenter (e.g., server-to-server flows over the leaf–spine Ethernet network), and Inter-domain—traffic that crosses the datacenter boundary (e.g., instrument Local Area Network (LAN) - WAN - HPC ingress). Our solution yields up to 60% more stable throughput, 30% fewer retransmissions, and tightly bounded jitter—deployable instantly on operational fabrics without hardware upgrades or proprietary extensions, and paving the way for true policy-driven, end-to-end performance in HPC datacenters.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 数据中心必须处理要求亚毫秒级延迟的实时流和需要持续数千兆位吞吐量的批量传输，这些目标本质上是在共享网络上竞争的。同时实现这两个目标需要端到端的性能保证，通常由服务质量 (QoS) 提供，服务质量 (QoS) 可以对流量进行分类、预留带宽并在每一跳上强制执行优先级。虽然骨干网和广域网 (WAN) 提供商（例如 ESnet）已经强制执行 QoS，但 HPC 中的本地以太网入口“最后一英里”仍然尽力而为，从而造成了延迟累积并危及时间敏感工作流程的盲点。我们在现有叶脊交换机上使用基于标准的差分服务代码点 (DSCP) QoS 解决方案来填补这一空白：数据包在主机上进行标记，按类别排队，并在到达高速网络 (HSN) 网关网络接口卡 (NIC) 的每个最后一英里跃点上进行整形。我们在代表 HPC 流量的两种场景中评估我们的解决方案：域内 — 完全保留在数据中心内的流量（例如，叶脊以太网上的服务器到服务器的流量），以及域间 — 跨越数据中心边界的流量（例如，仪器局域网 (LAN) - WAN - HPC 入口）。我们的解决方案可提高高达 60% 的稳定吞吐量、减少 30% 的重传和严格限制的抖动，可立即部署在运营结构上，无需硬件升级或专有扩展，并为 HPC 数据中心真正的策略驱动的端到端性能铺平道路。

items.title: Mojo: MLIR-based Performance-Portable HPC Science Kernels on GPUs for the Python Ecosystem.
items.abstract: We explore the performance and portability of the novel Mojo language for scientific computing workloads on GPUs. As the first language based on the LLVM’s Multi-Level Intermediate Representation (MLIR) compiler infrastructure, Mojo aims to close performance and productivity gaps by combining Python’s interoperability and CUDA-like syntax for compile-time portable GPU programming. We target four scientific workloads: a seven-point stencil (memory-bound), BabelStream (memory-bound), miniBUDE (compute-bound), and Hartree–Fock (compute-bound with atomic operations); and compare their performance against vendor baselines on NVIDIA H100 and AMD MI300A GPUs. We show that Mojo’s performance is competitive with CUDA and HIP for memory-bound kernels, whereas gaps exist on AMD GPUs for atomic operations and for fast-math compute-bound kernels on both AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. Although the learning curve and programming requirements are still fairly low-level, Mojo can close significant gaps in the fragmented Python ecosystem in the convergence of scientific computing and AI.
items.abstract_zh: 我们探索新颖的 Mojo 语言在 GPU 上科学计算工作负载的性能和可移植性。作为第一种基于 LLVM 多级中间表示 (MLIR) 编译器基础架构的语言，Mojo 旨在通过结合 Python 的互操作性和类似于 CUDA 的语法来进行编译时便携式 GPU 编程，从而缩小性能和生产力差距。我们的目标是四种科学工作负载：七点模板（内存限制）、BabelStream（内存限制）、miniBUDE（计算限制）和 Hartree–Fock（原子操作计算限制）；并将它们的性能与 NVIDIA H100 和 AMD MI300A GPU 上的供应商基准进行比较。我们表明，对于内存限制型内核，Mojo 的性能与 CUDA 和 HIP 相当，而 AMD GPU 上的原子操作以及 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 上的快速数学计算限制型内核则存在差距。尽管学习曲线和编程要求仍然相当低，但 Mojo 可以弥补分散的 Python 生态系统在科学计算和人工智能融合方面的重大差距。

items.title: Automated MCQA Benchmarking at Scale: Evaluating Reasoning Traces as Retrieval Sources for Domain Adaptation of Small Language Models.
items.abstract: As scientific knowledge grows at an unprecedented pace, evaluation benchmarks must evolve to reflect new discoveries and ensure language models are tested on current, diverse literature. We propose a scalable, modular framework for generating multiple-choice question-answering (MCQA) benchmarks directly from large corpora of scientific papers. Our pipeline automates every stage of MCQA creation, including PDF parsing, semantic chunking, question generation, and model evaluation. As a case study, we generate more than 16,000 MCQs from 22,000 open-access articles in radiation and cancer biology. We then evaluate a suite of small language models (1.1B–14B parameters) on these questions, comparing baseline accuracy with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) from paper-derived semantic chunks and from reasoning traces distilled from GPT-4.1. We find that reasoning-trace retrieval consistently improves performance on both synthetic and expert-annotated benchmarks, enabling several small models to surpass GPT-4 on the 2023 Astro Radiation and Cancer Biology exam.
items.abstract_zh: 随着科学知识以前所未有的速度增长，评​​估基准必须不断发展以反映新发现，并确保语言模型在当前多样化的文献中得到测试。我们提出了一个可扩展的模块化框架，用于直接从大型科学论文语料库生成多项选择题回答（MCQA）基准。我们的管道自动执行 MCQA 创建的每个阶段，包括 PDF 解析、语义分块、问题生成和模型评估。作为案例研究，我们从 22,000 篇放射和癌症生物学领域的开放获取文章中生成了 16,000 多个 MCQ。然后，我们针对这些问题评估一套小语言模型（1.1B-14B 参数），将基线准确性与来自论文衍生语义块和从 GPT-4.1 中提取的推理轨迹的检索增强生成 (RAG) 进行比较。我们发现推理轨迹检索持续提高了综合基准和专家注释基准的性能，使多个小型模型在 2023 年 Astro 辐射和癌症生物学考试中超越了 GPT-4。

items.title: Generating Permutations at Scale.
items.abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new algorithm for generating large-scale permutations on distributed systems. Permutations get used in many applications, including statistical analysis, machine learning, sampling, graph neural networks, matching, crypto-analysis, and bootstrapping. In data science the permutation is also commonly referred to as a shuffle operation as it reorganizes elements in an entirely random manner by applying the permutation. Our algorithm is computationally efficient, easy to understand, and scales to large systems. We measure the performance of our new permutation generation scheme on a cluster of NVIDIA DGX-A100s, using up to 256 NVIDIA A100 GPUs. We show that we can generate a permutation of 137 billion values in approximately 1.1 seconds, with a throughput of 124 billion elements per second.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种在分布式系统上生成大规模排列的新算法。排列可用于许多应用，包括统计分析、机器学习、采样、图神经网络、匹配、密码分析和引导。在数据科学中，排列通常也称为洗牌操作，因为它通过应用排列以完全随机的方式重新组织元素。我们的算法计算效率高，易于理解，并且可以扩展到大型系统。我们使用多达 256 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 在 NVIDIA DGX-A100 集群上测量了新的排列生成方案的性能。我们证明，我们可以在大约 1.1 秒内生成 1370 亿个值的排列，每秒吞吐量为 1240 亿个元素。

items.title: RESILIO : A Scalable and Composable Architecture for Tomographic Reconstruction Workflows.
items.abstract: Tomographic reconstruction (TR) aims to reconstruct a 3D object from a finite number of 2D projections. It is an important technique across domains such as medical imaging, materials science, and security, where high-resolution volumetric data is essential for decision-making. With advanced facilities such as the upgraded Advanced Photon Source enabling unprecedented data acquisition rates, TR pipelines struggle to handle large data volumes while maintaining low latency in time-sensitive domains, fault tolerance, and scalability. Traditional, tightly coupled, batch-oriented workflows are increasingly inadequate in such high-performance contexts. In response, we propose ResiliO , a composable, high-performance TR framework built atop the Mochi ecosystem that uses Mofka to improve resilience through persistent streaming and fully leverage high-performance computing platforms. Our design enables scalable and elastic execution across heterogeneous environments and programming models and languages. We contribute a reimagined TR pipeline architecture, its implementation using Mochi services, and an empirical evaluation showing up to 3490 × reduction in the per-event overhead compared to the original ZeroMQ implementation, and up to 3268 × improvement in throughput with performance-tuned configurations using Mofka.
items.abstract_zh: 断层扫描重建 (TR) 旨在从有限数量的 2D 投影重建 3D 对象。它是跨医学成像、材料科学和安全等领域的一项重要技术，其中高分辨率体积数据对于决策至关重要。凭借升级后的高级光子源等先进设施，实现前所未有的数据采集速率，TR 管道难以处理大量数据，同时在时间敏感领域保持低延迟、容错和可扩展性。传统的、紧密耦合的、面向批处理的工作流程在这种高性能环境中越来越不够用。为此，我们提出了 ResiliO，这是一个构建在 Mochi 生态系统之上的可组合的高性能 TR 框架，它使用 Mofka 通过持久流传输来提高弹性，并充分利用高性能计算平台。我们的设计支持跨异构环境、编程模型和语言的可扩展和弹性执行。我们贡献了重新构想的 TR 管道架构，其使用 Mochi 服务实现，实证评估显示，与原始 ZeroMQ 实现相比，每个事件的开销减少了 3490 倍，使用 Mofka 进行性能调整的配置，吞吐量提高了 3268 倍。

items.title: A Workflow for Error Analysis for Drug Response Prediction via Statistical Standardization and Distribution Analysis.
items.abstract: Drug response prediction is a promising approach to apply machine learning to the development of drugs for a range of cancer types. This method can be used to pre-screen potential drugs, perform high-throughput screening of drug databases, or perform more generalized tasks in machine learning. In an idealized real-world clinical situation, the overall solution must produce a short list of the most promising drugs for a particular patient medical situation. Promising drugs for a given case, however, are very rare, making model performance in this space very difficult. Thus, a great deal of supporting infrastructure must be developed to make this possible, including obtaining and curating datasets, large cross-validation training studies, and post-training inference and analysis. Herein, we describe a new approach for dealing with the rare drug problem, and implement a portable workflow that explores one proposed strategy for addressing it, with results from the exascale supercomputer Aurora.
items.abstract_zh: 药物反应预测是将机器学习应用于多种癌症类型药物开发的一种有前途的方法。该方法可用于预筛选潜在药物、对药物数据库进行高通量筛选或在机器学习中执行更通用的任务。在理想化的现实临床情况下，整体解决方案必须针对特定患者的医疗情况产生最有希望的药物的简短清单。然而，针对特定病例有前景的药物非常罕见，这使得该领域的模型表现非常困难。因此，必须开发大量的支持基础设施来实现这一点，包括获取和整理数据集、大型交叉验证训练研究以及训练后推理和分析。在此，我们描述了一种处理罕见毒品问题的新方法，并实施了一个便携式工作流程，利用百亿亿级超级计算机 Aurora 的结果探索解决该问题的拟议策略。

items.title: Experiences Integrating Database Support into the OLCF Test Harness.
items.abstract: In 2005, the United States Department of Energy created the Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility (OLCF) to provide leadership computing resources up to 100 times more powerful than is currently available for researchers across academia, industry, and government. These leadership-class supercomputers are among the largest in the world and often diverge from conventional supercomputer architectures at the time of deployment, demanding flexible and thorough testing to ensure their functionality and performance. To support the required testing, OLCF developed the OLCF Test Harness (OTH) [7, 8]. The OTH has adapted through more than 20 years of novel architectures, including the arrivals of NVIDIA GPUs in Titan and AMD GPUs in Frontier. Unique challenges with each system provide opportunities for continuously improving the OTH. In the case of Frontier, OLCF’s latest leadership-class supercomputer deployed in 2022, one unique challenge was how to ensure the functionality of the more than 9,400 compute nodes. The OTH recently released version 3.0 [2], which implements support for logging test data to InfluxDB, and version 3.1, which adds support for Apache Kafka with the Apache Druid database. Grafana interfaces to these databases greatly improve the real-time monitoring capabilities and broader analysis capabilities for Frontier. The OTH is just one of many system testing frameworks available, but is among the first to explicitly enable and encourage database-based logging. Among three well-known testing frameworks surveyed (ReFrame, Ramble, and Pavilion2), ReFrame is the only framework that supports any form of database and documents features that could be extended for logging to other databases or formats. As such, we see an opportunity to openly discuss our experiences and lessons learned integrating database support into the OTH. In this work, we present a high-level description of the OTH and the database support within, and discuss the challenges, successes, failures, and future goals for the OTH.
items.abstract_zh: 2005 年，美国能源部创建了橡树岭领先计算设施 (OLCF)，为学术界、工业界和政府的研究人员提供比目前可用的领先计算资源强大 100 倍的资源。这些领先级的超级计算机是世界上最大的超级计算机之一，在部署时通常与传统的超级计算机架构不同，需要灵活、彻底的测试以确保其功能和性能。为了支持所需的测试，OLCF 开发了 OLCF 测试工具 (OTH) [7, 8]。 OTH 已经适应了 20 多年的新颖架构，包括 Titan 中的 NVIDIA GPU 和 Frontier 中的 AMD GPU。每个系统的独特挑战为不断改进 OTH 提供了机会。就 OLCF 于 2022 年部署的最新领先级超级计算机 Frontier 而言，一个独特的挑战是如何确保 9,400 多个计算节点的功能。 OTH 最近发布了 3.0 版 [2]，它实现了对将测试数据记录到 InfluxDB 的支持，以及 3.1 版，它增加了对 Apache Kafka 和 Apache Druid 数据库的支持。 Grafana 与这些数据库的接口极大地提高了 Frontier 的实时监控能力和更广泛的分析能力。 OTH 只是众多可用系统测试框架之一，但它是第一个明确启用和鼓励基于数据库的日志记录的框架。在接受调查的三个知名测试框架（ReFrame、Ramble 和 Pavilion2）中，ReFrame 是唯一支持任何形式的数据库和文档功能的框架，这些功能可以扩展为记录到其他数据库或格式。因此，我们看到了一个公开讨论将数据库支持集成到 OTH 中的经验和教训的机会。在这项工作中，我们对 OTH 及其数据库支持进行了高级描述，并讨论了 OTH 的挑战、成功、失败和未来目标。

items.title: Run-time Energy-Efficiency Optimization for AI and HPC Workloads.
items.abstract: Effective power management is crucial for balancing high performance and environmental impact in the exascale era, particularly for datacenters dominated by massively parallel GPU systems due to the rise of AI.
items.abstract_zh: 有效的电源管理对于平衡百亿亿次时代的高性能和环境影响至关重要，特别是对于由于人工智能的兴起而以大规模并行 GPU 系统为主的数据中心。

items.title: Dyninst on the RISC-V: Binary Instrumentation in Support of Performance, Debugging, and Other Tools.
items.abstract: Binary instrumentation provides the ability to instrument and modify a program after the compilation process has completed. Operating on the binary level allows instrumentation of the program as it was produced by the compiler. In addition, it can operate on programs or libraries for which you may not have the source code. Binary instrumentation is the foundation for a wide variety of tools, including those for performance profiling, debugging, tracing, architectural simulation, and digital forensics. Dyninst is a free and open-source suite of toolkits for building binary analysis and instrumentation tools for architectures that include the x86, ARM, and Power. It is used in tools produced by industry, academia and research labs. This paper describes our efforts to port Dyninst to the RISC-V architecture. We discuss the challenges presented by the RISC-V, our approaches to solving them, and the status of Dyninst on the RISC-V.
items.abstract_zh: 二进制检测提供了在编译过程完成后检测和修改程序的能力。在二进制级别上操作允许对编译器生成的程序进行检测。此外，它还可以运行您可能没有源代码的程序或库。二进制检测是各种工具的基础，包括性能分析、调试、跟踪、架构模拟和数字取证工具。 Dyninst 是一套免费的开源工具包，用于为 x86、ARM 和 Power 等架构构建二进制分析和检测工具。它用于工业界、学术界和研究实验室生产的工具。本文介绍了我们将 Dyninst 移植到 RISC-V 架构的努力。我们讨论 RISC-V 带来的挑战、解决这些挑战的方法以及 Dyninst 在 RISC-V 上的地位。

items.title: Lessons Learned: Template-Heavy C++ in Production HPC Runtime Systems.
items.abstract: Modern HPC runtime systems increasingly rely on sophisticated C++ template metaprogramming to achieve zero-cost abstractions and type safety. This paper presents lessons learned from implementing the AllScale runtime system, a production HPC framework that makes extensive use of variadic templates, SFINAE, and template specialization for distributed data management. Through analysis of our template-heavy architecture for data items, automatic serialization, and type-safe requirement systems, we identify key challenges, performance implications, and best practices for template metaprogramming in HPC contexts. Our findings show that careful template design can maintain compile-time performance while enabling zero-cost abstractions that achieve 92-105% of hand-tuned MPI performance. We provide concrete recommendations for managing template complexity, compilation overhead, and debugging challenges in production HPC systems.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 HPC 运行时系统越来越依赖复杂的 C++ 模板元编程来实现零成本抽象和类型安全。本文介绍了从实现 AllScale 运行时系统中吸取的经验教训，该系统是一个生产 HPC 框架，广泛使用可变参数模板、SFINAE 和分布式数据管理的模板专业化。通过分析数据项的模板密集型架构、自动序列化和类型安全需求系统，我们确定了 HPC 环境中模板元编程的关键挑战、性能影响和最佳实践。我们的研究结果表明，仔细的模板设计可以保持编译时性能，同时实现零成本抽象，从而实现 92-105% 的手动调整 MPI 性能。我们为管理生产 HPC 系统中的模板复杂性、编译开销和调试挑战提供具体建议。

items.title: Extending the C++ Execution Control Library to Support Dynamic Parallel Runtime Systems.
items.abstract: The release of the C++26 execution control library (senders and receivers) provides a uniform interface for coordinating asynchronous work on heterogeneous backends. That said, the standardization of senders and receivers is just a starting point toward structured parallelism and composable heterogeneous parallel programming. To evaluate these capabilities, we present a sender-based interface for the Qthreads user-level threading library. It shows that the execution control idioms apply even to cases where work is discovered and created dynamically and the degree of concurrency vastly surpasses available hardware resources. Here we provide an introduction to the C++26 standard execution control library and show how it can be used with dynamic runtime systems. We demonstrate that the new standard interface is extensible and motivate future work on similar runtime integration efforts. We show that this interoperability layer incurs low overhead and provides additional optimization opportunities, even when used in a fine-grained parallel setting.
items.abstract_zh: C++26执行控制库（发送者和接收者）的发布为协调异构后端上的异步工作提供了统一的接口。也就是说，发送方和接收方的标准化只是结构化并行性和可组合异构并行编程的起点。为了评估这些功能，我们为 Qthreads 用户级线程库提供了一个基于发送者的接口。它表明执行控制习惯甚至适用于动态发现和创建工作并且并发程度远远超过可用硬件资源的情况。在这里，我们介绍了 C++26 标准执行控制库，并展示了如何将其与动态运行时系统一起使用。我们证明新的标准接口是可扩展的，并激励未来开展类似的运行时集成工作。我们表明，即使在细粒度并行设置中使用，该互操作层也会产生较低的开销并提供额外的优化机会。

items.title: Aurora Acceptance: A Collaborative Exascale Test Harness.
items.abstract: The Aurora exascale system is the latest supercomputer deployed at the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF). Successfully deploying a leadership class system is the result of years of effort both by the facility and the vendor. This extensive collaboration culminates with the successful completion of acceptance testing, a necessary step to prepare the system for general access, ensuring that the system is stable, accurate, and performant for scientific discovery.
items.abstract_zh: Aurora exascale 系统是阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 部署的最新超级计算机。成功部署领导级系统是设施和供应商多年努力的结果。这种广泛的合作最终以成功完成验收测试而告终，验收测试是准备系统进行一般访问的必要步骤，确保系统稳定、准确且高性能，可用于科学发现。

items.title: Inverse Design for Generating Initial Conditions in Scientific Simulations.
items.abstract: We propose a conditional normalizing flow (CNF) surrogate model to solve generative, many-to-one inverse problems in scientific simulations governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) with time-evolving interactions between heterogeneous materials. We present two case studies: electrostatic potential and heat diffusion, which serve as proxy simulations for generating diverse sets of initial conditions that can reproduce an observed output state (transient or steady). Finally, we provide a comprehensive overview of the synthetic datasets, the model specification, each stage of the experimental workflow, evaluation of training performance, and uncertainty quantification for the generated samples.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种条件归一化流（CNF）代理模型，用于解决由偏微分方程（PDE）控制的科学模拟中的生成性多对一逆问题，以及异质材料之间随时间演化的相互作用。我们提出了两个案例研究：静电势和热扩散，它们用作生成不同初始条件集的代理模拟，这些初始条件集可以重现观察到的输出状态（瞬态或稳定）。最后，我们全面概述了合成数据集、模型规范、实验工作流程的每个阶段、训练性能评估以及生成样本的不确定性量化。

items.title: Data Management System Analysis for Distributed Computing Workloads.
items.abstract: Large-scale international collaborations such as ATLAS rely on globally distributed workflows and data management to process, move, and store vast volumes of data. ATLAS’s Production and Distributed Analysis (PanDA) workflow system and the Rucio data management system are each highly optimized for their respective design goals. However, operating them together at global scale exposes systemic inefficiencies, including underutilized resources, redundant or unnecessary transfers, and altered error distributions. Moreover, PanDA and Rucio currently lack shared performance awareness and coordinated, adaptive strategies.
items.abstract_zh: ATLAS 等大规模国际合作依靠全球分布式工作流程和数据管理来处理、移动和存储大量数据。 ATLAS 的生产和分布式分析 (PanDA) 工作流程系统和 Rucio 数据管理系统均针对各自的设计目标进行了高度优化。然而，在全球范围内一起运行它们会暴露出系统效率低下的问题，包括资源利用不足、冗余或不必要的传输以及错误分布的改变。此外，PanDA 和 Rucio 目前缺乏共同的绩效意识和协调的自适应策略。

items.title: Modeling and Optimizing Real-Time Telescope Interaction for Multi-wavelength Observation of Gamma-ray Bursts.
items.abstract: Multi-wavelength observation of gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) requires real-time interaction among multiple telescopes. A gamma-ray telescope detects and localizes a GRB in the sky and must then communicate with an optical telescope to direct the latter toward the GRB as quickly as possible. We previously developed software for ADAPT, a suborbital gamma-ray telescope, to localize GRBs in real time, on a timescale shorter than that of the GRB itself. This work therefore studies progressive localization, in which ADAPT computes a series of increasingly accurate location estimates during a GRB to enable a partner instrument to more rapidly find it. We describe a modeling and optimization framework to decide when ADAPT should compute estimated GRB locations to minimize the time for the partner to find the GRB. Our framework can design progressive strategies that allow a partner telescope to find a GRB up to 42% faster than strategies using a single alert.
items.abstract_zh: 伽马射线暴（GRB）的多波长观测需要多个望远镜之间的实时交互。伽马射线望远镜探测并定位天空中的伽马射线暴，然后必须与光学望远镜通信，以尽快将后者引导至伽玛射线暴。我们之前为亚轨道伽马射线望远镜 ADAPT 开发了软件，用于实时定位伽玛射线暴，其时间尺度比伽玛射线暴本身的时间尺度短。因此，这项工作研究渐进式定位，其中 ADAPT 在 GRB 期间计算一系列越来越准确的位置估计，以使合作伙伴仪器能够更快地找到它。我们描述了一个建模和优化框架来决定 ADAPT 何时应计算估计的 GRB 位置，以最大限度地缩短合作伙伴找到 GRB 的时间。我们的框架可以设计渐进策略，使合作伙伴望远镜发现GRB的速度比使用单一警报的策略快42%。

items.title: Using Code Coverage to Assess Feature Gaps in MPI Correctness Tool Classification Tests.
items.abstract: We examine the code generator-based MPI correctness benchmark MPI-BugBench (MBB) by analyzing the code coverage it triggers in three tools: MUST, PARCOACH, and clang-tidy. We present our analysis as a complement to MBB’s original design, which is based on pruning the potentially exhaustive test set based on real-world MPI usage patterns. Our assessment identifies two key limitations in MBB’s generated tests: incomplete coverage of MPI features, such as varying-count collectives, and limited structural diversity, such as lack of loops and array-based MPI handles. In addition, the current strategy of MBB’s code generation by increasing test volume alone offers limited benefit for exercising the analysis of these tools in our assessment. To address these gaps, we implemented 34 new tests covering missing MPI features and more varied code structures. The tests exercise previously uncovered analysis code, where a single varying-count collectives test adds 770 covered code lines in MUST.
items.abstract_zh: 我们通过分析基于代码生成器的 MPI 正确性基准 MPI-BugBench (MBB) 在三种工具中触发的代码覆盖率来检查它：MUST、PARCOACH 和 clang-tidy。我们将我们的分析作为 MBB 原始设计的补充，该设计基于根据现实世界的 MPI 使用模式修剪可能详尽的测试集。我们的评估确定了 MBB 生成的测试中的两个关键限制：MPI 功能的不完整覆盖（例如不同计数的集合）和有限的结构多样性（例如缺乏循环和基于数组的 MPI 句柄）。此外，当前仅通过增加测试量来生成 MBB 代码的策略对于在我们的评估中对这些工具进行分析的好处有限。为了弥补这些差距，我们实施了 34 项新测试，涵盖缺失的 MPI 功能和更多样化的代码结构。这些测试练习了之前未发现的分析代码，其中单个可变计数集合测试在 MUST 中添加了 770 个已覆盖的代码行。

items.title: Data Race Detection through Vibe Translation.
items.abstract: We propose a data race detection approach for code written in a source programming language, by means of AI-agent translation to a target language, followed by conventional tool-based detection in the target language. We evaluate this translate-then-check approach by translating the C/Fortran+OpenMP programs in DataRaceBench to the Go programming language, and using the Go data race detector to check for races. The translation is controlled through natural language prompts, similar to approaches popularized as vibe coding. Translate-then-check achieves 92.8% accuracy and 9 false negatives for the C programs in DataRaceBench, compared to 89.9% accuracy and 17 false negatives for Clang with ThreadSanitizer and Archer applied to the original C programs. We discuss the approach and its overall accuracy, and show examples where translate-then-check leads to false negatives or positives due to limitations of the Go data race checker or, in some cases, limitations of the translation.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对用源编程语言编写的代码的数据竞争检测方法，通过人工智能代理翻译为目标语言，然后在目标语言中进行基于传统工具的检测。我们通过将 DataRaceBench 中的 C/Fortran+OpenMP 程序翻译为 Go 编程语言，并使用 Go 数据竞争检测器来检查竞争来评估这种先翻译后检查的方法。翻译是通过自然语言提示控制的，类似于流行的振动编码方法。 Translate-then-check 在 DataRaceBench 中为 C 程序实现了 92.8% 的准确率和 9 个假阴性，而将 ThreadSanitizer 和 Archer 应用于原始 C 程序的 Clang 的准确度为 89.9%，并有 17 个假阴性。我们讨论了该方法及其整体准确性，并展示了由于 Go 数据竞争检查器的限制或在某些情况下翻译的限制而导致先翻译后检查导致误报或误报的示例。

items.title: Optimizing Microgrid Composition for Sustainable Data Centers.
items.abstract: As computing energy demand continues to grow and electrical grid infrastructure struggles to keep pace, an increasing number of data centers are being planned with colocated microgrids that integrate on-site renewable generation and energy storage. However, while existing research has examined the tradeoffs between operational and embodied carbon emissions in the context of renewable energy certificates, there is a lack of tools to assess how the sizing and composition of microgrid components affects long-term sustainability and power reliability.
items.abstract_zh: 随着计算能源需求持续增长，而电网基础设施难以跟上步伐，越来越多的数据中心正在规划采用托管微电网，整合现场可再生能源发电和能源存储。然而，虽然现有研究已经在可再生能源证书的背景下审查了运行碳排放和隐含碳排放之间的权衡，但缺乏工具来评估微电网组件的规模和组成如何影响长期可持续性和电力可靠性。

items.title: Dynamic Thread Coarsening for CPU and GPU OpenMP Code.
items.abstract: Thread coarsening is a well known optimization technique for GPUs. It enables instruction-level parallelism, reduces redundant computation, and can provide better memory access patterns. However, the presence of divergent control flow - cases where uniformity of branch conditions among threads cannot be proven at compile time - diminishes its effectiveness. In this work, we implement multi-level thread coarsening for CPU and GPU OpenMP code, by implementing a generic thread coarsening transformation on LLVM IR. We introduce dynamic convergence - a new technique that generates both coarsened and non-coarsened versions of divergent regions in the code and allows for the uniformity check to happen at runtime instead of compile time. We performed evalution on HecBench for GPU and LULESH for CPU. We found that best case speedup without dynamic convergence was 4.6% for GPUs and 2.9% for CPUs, while our approach achieved 7.5% for GPUs and 4.3% for CPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 线程粗化是一种众所周知的 GPU 优化技术。它支持指令级并行，减少冗余计算，并可以提供更好的内存访问模式。然而，不同控制流的存在（在编译时无法证明线程之间分支条件的一致性的情况）会降低其有效性。在这项工作中，我们通过在 LLVM IR 上实现通用线程粗化转换，为 CPU 和 GPU OpenMP 代码实现多级线程粗化。我们引入了动态收敛——一种新技术，可以在代码中生成发散区域的粗化和非粗化版本，并允许在运行时而不是编译时进行一致性检查。我们在 HecBench 上对 GPU 进行了评估，在 LULESH 上对 CPU 进行了评估。我们发现，在没有动态收敛的情况下，GPU 的最佳加速率为 4.6%，CPU 的加速率为 2.9%，而我们的方法的 GPU 加速率为 7.5%，CPU 加速率为 4.3%。

items.title: Evaluating the Efficacy of LLM-Based Reasoning for Multiobjective HPC Job Scheduling.
items.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) job scheduling involves balancing conflicting objectives such as minimizing makespan, reducing wait times, optimizing resource use, and ensuring fairness. Traditional methods, including heuristic-based, e.g., First-Come-First-Served(FJFS) and Shortest Job First (SJF), or intensive optimization techniques, often lack adaptability to dynamic workloads and, more importantly, cannot simultaneously optimize multiple objectives in HPC systems. To address this, we propose a novel Large Language Model (LLM)-based scheduler using a ReAct-style framework (Reason + Act), enabling iterative, interpretable decision-making. The system incorporates a scratchpad memory to track scheduling history and refine decisions via natural language feedback, while a constraint enforcement module ensures feasibility and safety. We evaluate our approach using OpenAI’s O4-Mini and Anthropic’s Claude 3.7 across seven real-world HPC workload scenarios, including heterogeneous mixes, bursty patterns, and adversarial cases etc. Comparisons against FCFS, SJF, and Google OR-Tools (on 10 to 100 jobs) reveal that LLM-based scheduling effectively balances multiple objectives while offering transparent reasoning through natural language traces. The method excels in constraint satisfaction and adapts to diverse workloads without domain-specific training. However, a trade-off between reasoning quality and computational overhead challenges real-time deployment. This work presents the first comprehensive study of reasoning-capable LLMs for HPC scheduling, demonstrating their potential to handle multiobjective optimization while highlighting limitations in computational efficiency. The findings provide insights into leveraging advanced language models for complex scheduling problems in dynamic HPC environments.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 作业调度涉及平衡相互冲突的目标，例如最小化完工时间、减少等待时间、优化资源使用和确保公平。传统方法，包括基于启发式的方法，例如先来先服务（FJFS）和最短作业优先（SJF）或密集优化技术，通常缺乏对动态工作负载的适应性，更重要的是，无法同时优化 HPC 系统中的多个目标。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于大型语言模型（LLM）的调度程序，使用 ReAct 风格的框架（Reason + Act），从而实现迭代、可解释的决策。该系统采用暂存器存储器来跟踪调度历史并通过自然语言反馈完善决策，而约束执行模块则确保可行性和安全性。我们使用 OpenAI 的 O4-Mini 和 Anthropic 的 Claude 3.7 在七个现实世界的 HPC 工作负载场景中评估我们的方法，包括异构混合、突发模式和对抗性案例等。与 FCFS、SJF 和 Google OR-Tools（10 到 100 个作业）的比较表明，基于 LLM 的调度有效地平衡了多个目标，同时通过自然语言跟踪提供透明的推理。该方法在约束满足方面表现出色，并且无需特定领域的培训即可适应不同的工作负载。然而，推理质量和计算开销之间的权衡对实时部署提出了挑战。这项工作首次对用于 HPC 调度的具有推理能力的 LLM 进行了全面研究，展示了它们处理多目标优化的潜力，同时强调了计算效率的局限性。这些发现为利用高级语言模型解决动态 HPC 环境中的复杂调度问题提供了见解。

items.title: EMLIO: Minimizing I/O Latency and Energy Consumption for Large-Scale AI Training.
items.abstract: Large-scale deep learning workloads increasingly suffer from I/O bottlenecks as datasets grow beyond local storage capacities and GPU compute outpaces network and disk latencies. While recent systems optimize data-loading time, they overlook the energy cost of I/O—a critical factor at large scale. We introduce EMLIO, an Efficient Machine Learning I/O service that jointly minimizes end-to-end data-loading latency (T) and I/O energy consumption (E) across variable-latency networked storage. EMLIO deploys a lightweight data-serving daemon on storage nodes that serializes and batches raw samples, streams them over TCP with out-of-order prefetching, and integrates seamlessly with GPU-accelerated (NVIDIA DALI) preprocessing on the client side. In exhaustive evaluations over local disk, LAN (0.05 ms & 10 ms round trip time (RTT)), and WAN (30 ms RTT) environments, EMLIO delivers on average up to 8.6 × faster I/O and 10.9 × lower energy use compared to state-of-the-art loaders, while maintaining constant performance and energy profiles irrespective of network distance. EMLIO’s service-based architecture offers a scalable blueprint for energy-aware I/O in next-generation AI clouds.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据集的增长超出本地存储容量以及 GPU 计算速度超过网络和磁盘延迟，大规模深度学习工作负载越来越受到 I/O 瓶颈的困扰。虽然最新的系统优化了数据加载时间，但它们忽略了 I/O 的能源成本——这是大规模的一个关键因素。我们推出了 EMLIO，这是一种高效的机器学习 I/O 服务，可共同最小化可变延迟网络存储中的端到端数据加载延迟 (T) 和 I/O 能耗 (E)。 EMLIO 在存储节点上部署一个轻量级数据服务守护进程，用于序列化和批处理原始样本，通过 TCP 进行乱序预取流式传输，并与客户端的 GPU 加速 (NVIDIA DALI) 预处理无缝集成。在对本地磁盘、LAN（0.05 ms 和 10 ms 往返时间 (RTT)）和 WAN（30 ms RTT）环境进行的详尽评估中，与最先进的加载器相比，EMLIO 的 I/O 速度平均提高了 8.6 倍，能耗降低了 10.9 倍，同时无论网络距离如何，都能保持恒定的性能和能源配置。 EMLIO 基于服务的架构为下一代 AI 云中的能源感知 I/O 提供了可扩展的蓝图。

items.title: Lightweight CNN-Based Artifact Reduction for Scientific Error-bounded Lossy Compression.
items.abstract: Lossy compression is widely used to reduce storage and transmission costs in large-scale scientific data, but it inevitably introduces artifacts that may compromise subsequent analysis. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight 3D convolutional architecture with a fixed-scale batch normalization strategy, ensuring stable training and fast inference. We further analyze the trade-offs related to network size and highlight an empirical relationship between the minimum achievable MSE loss and the corresponding training cost. We also validate the generalizability of the trained network.
items.abstract_zh: 有损压缩广泛用于降低大规模科学数据的存储和传输成本，但它不可避免地会引入可能影响后续分析的伪影。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有固定规模批量归一化策略的轻量级 3D 卷积架构，确保稳定的训练和快速的推理。我们进一步分析与网络规模相关的权衡，并强调可实现的最小 MSE 损失与相应训练成本之间的经验关系。我们还验证了训练网络的通用性。

items.title: A Study of Performance Portability of Low-bit Fused Matrix-Vector Multiplication Kernels in SYCL.
items.abstract: Understanding the causes of performance gaps between a portable programming model and a vendor-specific programming model is important for improving performance portability. This paper studies performance portability of low-bit fused general matrix-vector multiplication kernels in SYCL on vendors’ graphics processing units (GPUs). This work introduces the use case, explains the kernel implementations in detail, evaluates the performance of the CUDA, HIP, and SYCL kernels on datacenter, desktop, and laptop GPUs, and investigates the causes of performance gaps. The results show that loop unrolling, kernel dispatch overhead, and sum reduction contribute to the gaps.
items.abstract_zh: 了解可移植编程模型和特定于供应商的编程模型之间性能差距的原因对于提高性能可移植性非常重要。本文研究了 SYCL 中低位融合通用矩阵向量乘法内核在供应商图形处理单元 (GPU) 上的性能可移植性。这项工作介绍了用例，详细解释了内核实现，评估了数据中心、台式机和笔记本电脑 GPU 上的 CUDA、HIP 和 SYCL 内核的性能，并调查了性能差距的原因。结果表明，循环展开、内核分派开销和总和减少导致了差距。

items.title: GridMind: LLMs-Powered Agents for Power System Analysis and Operations.
items.abstract: The complexity of traditional power system analysis workflows presents significant barriers to efficient decision-making in modern electric grids. This paper presents GridMind, a multi-agent AI system that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) with deterministic engineering solvers to enable conversational scientific computing for power system analysis. The system employs specialized agents coordinating AC Optimal Power Flow and N-1 contingency analysis through natural language interfaces while maintaining numerical precision via function calls. GridMind addresses workflow integration, knowledge accessibility, context preservation, and expert decision-support augmentation. Experimental evaluation on IEEE test cases demonstrates that the proposed agentic framework consistently delivers correct solutions across all tested language models, with smaller LLMs achieving comparable analytical accuracy with reduced computational latency. This work establishes agentic AI as a viable paradigm for scientific computing, demonstrating how conversational interfaces can enhance accessibility while preserving numerical rigor essential for critical engineering applications.
items.abstract_zh: 传统电力系统分析工作流程的复杂性给现代电网的高效决策带来了重大障碍。本文介绍了 GridMind，这是一个多代理人工智能系统，它将大型语言模型 (LLM) 与确定性工程求解器集成在一起，以实现用于电力系统分析的对话式科学计算。该系统采用专门的代理，通过自然语言接口协调交流最佳潮流和 N-1 应急分析，同时通过函数调用保持数值精度。 GridMind 致力于工作流程集成、知识可访问性、上下文保存和专家决策支持增强。对 IEEE 测试用例的实验评估表明，所提出的代理框架在所有测试的语言模型中一致地提供了正确的解决方案，较小的法学硕士实现了可比的分析精度，同时减少了计算延迟。这项工作将代理人工智能建立为科学计算的可行范例，展示了对话界面如何增强可访问性，同时保持关键工程应用所必需的数字严谨性。

items.title: Enhancing ChatPORT with CUDA-to-SYCL Kernel Translation Capability.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong capabilities in general code translation. However, code translation involving parallel programming models remains largely unexplored. This work enhances the capabilities of code LLMs in CUDA-to-SYCL kernel translation with parameter-efficient fine-tuning. The resultant fine-tuned LLM, called ChatPORT, is an effort to provide high-fidelity translations from one programming model to another. We describe the preparation of datasets from heterogeneous computing benchmarks for model fine-tuning and testing, the parameter-efficient fine-tuning of 19 open-source code models ranging in size from 0.5 to 34 billion parameters and evaluate the correctness rates of the SYCL kernels by the fine-tuned models. The experimental results show that most code models fail to translate CUDA codes to SYCL correctly. However, fine-tuning these models using a small set of CUDA and SYCL kernels can enhance the capabilities of these models in kernel translation. Depending on the sizes of the models, the correctness rate ranges from 19.9% to 81.7% for a test dataset of 62 CUDA kernels.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在通用代码翻译方面表现出了强大的能力。然而，涉及并行编程模型的代码翻译在很大程度上仍未得到探索。这项工作通过参数高效的微调增强了代码 LLM 在 CUDA 到 SYCL 内核转换中的能力。由此产生的经过微调的法学硕士（称为 ChatPORT）旨在提供从一种编程模型到另一种编程模型的高保真转换。我们描述了用于模型微调和测试的异构计算基准数据集的准备，对 19 个开源代码模型（参数大小从 0.5 到 340 亿个参数）的参数高效微调，并通过微调模型评估 SYCL 内核的正确率。实验结果表明，大多数代码模型无法正确将 CUDA 代码转换为 SYCL。然而，使用一小组 CUDA 和 SYCL 内核对这些模型进行微调可以增强这些模型在内核翻译方面的能力。根据模型的大小，62 个 CUDA 内核的测试数据集的正确率范围为 19.9% 到 81.7%。

items.title: Bridging Speed and Optimality in Job Scheduling: A Hybrid Ant Colony Optimization Approach for Distributed Systems.
items.abstract: Efficient job scheduling in distributed systems faces exponential complexity growth as systems scale. While queue-based methods (e.g., FIFO) generate schedules rapidly but suboptimally, optimization tools achieve higher quality at significant computational cost. We propose a hybrid ant colony optimization (HACO) algorithm bridging this gap. HACO uses queue-based warm-start initialization for pheromone levels, constructs disjunctive graphs modeling precedence and resource constraints, and applies parallel local search on selected subgraphs to escape local optima. Our approach combines the speed of heuristics with optimization quality through strategic pheromone updates and OR-Tools integration. Experimental evaluation on job shop scheduling (JSSP), flexible job shop (FJSP), and synthetic large-scale problems demonstrates 3-5% deviation from optimality with 5-10x speedup over state-of-the-art solvers. Results show consistent performance across varying problem scales, making HACO compelling for large-scale distributed scheduling where computational efficiency is critical.
items.abstract_zh: 随着系统规模的扩大，分布式系统中的高效作业调度面临着指数级的复杂性增长。虽然基于队列的方法（例如 FIFO）可以快速生成调度，但效果欠佳，但优化工具以显着的计算成本实现更高的质量。我们提出了一种混合蚁群优化（HACO）算法来弥补这一差距。 HACO 对信息素水平使用基于队列的热启动初始化，构造析取图来建模优先级和资源约束，并对选定的子图应用并行局部搜索以逃避局部最优。我们的方法通过战略信息素更新和 OR-Tools 集成将启发式的速度与优化质量结合起来。对作业车间调度 (JSSP)、灵活作业车间 (FJSP) 和综合大型问题的实验评估表明，与最先进的求解器相比，与最优性的偏差为 3-5%，加速速度为 5-10 倍。结果显示，不同问题规模的性能一致，这使得 HACO 对于计算效率至关重要的大规模分布式调度具有吸引力。

items.title: LAMMPS-KOKKOS: Performance Portable Molecular Dynamics Across Exascale Architectures.
items.abstract: Since its inception in 1995, LAMMPS has grown to be a world-class molecular dynamics code, with thousands of users, over one million lines of code, and multi-scale simulation capabilities. We discuss how LAMMPS has adapted to the modern heterogeneous computing landscape by integrating the Kokkos performance portability library into the existing C++ code. We investigate performance portability of simple pairwise, many-body reactive, and machine-learned force-field interatomic potentials. We present results on GPUs across different vendors and generations, and analyze performance trends, probing FLOPS throughput, memory bandwidths, cache capabilities, and thread-atomic operation performance. Finally, we demonstrate strong scaling on three exascale machines – OLCF Frontier, ALCF Aurora, and NNSA El Capitan – as well as on the CSCS Alps supercomputer, for the three potentials.
items.abstract_zh: 自 1995 年推出以来，LAMMPS 已发展成为世界一流的分子动力学代码，拥有数千名用户、超过一百万行代码和多尺度模拟能力。我们讨论 LAMMPS 如何通过将 Kokkos 性能可移植库集成到现有的 C++ 代码中来适应现代异构计算环境。我们研究了简单成对、多体反应和机器学习的力场原子间势的性能可移植性。我们展示不同供应商和各代 GPU 的结果，并分析性能趋势、探测 FLOPS 吞吐量、内存带宽、缓存功能和线程原子操作性能。最后，我们在三台百亿亿次计算机（OLCF Frontier、ALCF Aurora 和 NNSA El Capitan）以及 CSCS Alps 超级计算机上展示了三种潜力的强大扩展能力。

items.title: Generating Frequently Asked Questions from Technical Support Tickets using Large Language Models.
items.abstract: High-performance computing is a driving force behind scientific innovation and discovery. However, as the number of users and the complexity of high-performance computing systems grow, so does the volume and variability of technical issues handled by support teams. The evolving nature of these issues presents a need for automated tools that can extract clear, accurate, and relevant frequently asked questions directly from support tickets. This need was addressed by developing a novel pipeline that incorporates semantic clustering, representation learning, and large language models. While prior research laid strong foundations across classification, clustering and large language model-based questions & answers, our work augments these efforts by integrating semantic clustering, domain-specific summarization, and multi-stage generation into a scalable pipeline for autonomous technical support. To prioritize high-impact issues, the pipeline began by filtering tickets based on anomaly frequency and recency. It then leveraged an instruction-tuned large language model to clean and summarize each ticket into a structured issue-resolution pair. Next, unsupervised semantic clustering was performed to identify subclusters of semantically similar tickets within broader topic clusters. A large language model-based generation module was then applied to create frequently asked questions representing the most dominant issues. A structured evaluation by subject matter experts indicated that our approach transformed technical support tickets into understandable, factually sound, and pertinent frequently asked questions. The ability to extract fine-grained insights from raw ticket data enhances the scalability, efficiency, and responsiveness of technical support workflows in high-performance computing environments, ultimately enabling faster troubleshooting and more accessible pathways to scientific discovery.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算是科学创新和发现背后的驱动力。然而，随着高性能计算系统的用户数量和复杂性的增加，支持团队处理的技术问题的数量和可变性也在增加。这些问题的不断发展的性质提出了对自动化工具的需求，这些工具可以直接从支持票证中提取清晰、准确且相关的常见问题。通过开发一种新颖的管道来解决这一需求，该管道结合了语义聚类、表示学习和大型语言模型。虽然之前的研究在分类、聚类和基于大型语言模型的问答方面奠定了坚实的基础，但我们的工作通过将语义聚类、特定领域摘要和多阶段生成集成到可扩展的管道中以提供自主技术支持来增强这些工作。为了优先考虑影响较大的问题，管道首先根据异常频率和新近度过滤票证。然后，它利用指令调整的大型语言模型来清理并将每张票证总结为结构化的问题解决对。接下来，执行无监督语义聚类，以识别更广泛的主题集群中语义相似的工单的子集群。然后应用基于大型语言模型的生成模块来创建代表最主要问题的常见问题。主题专家的结构化评估表明，我们的方法将技术支持请求转化为易于理解、事实合理且相关的常见问题。从原始票证数据中提取细粒度洞察的能力增强了高性能计算环境中技术支持工作流程的可扩展性、效率和响应能力，最终实现更快的故障排除和更容易的科学发现途径。

items.title: Towards Enabling Hostile Multi-tenancy in Kubernetes.
items.abstract: Kubernetes has become the de facto standard for container orchestration, yet its core design does not address the requirements of hostile multi-tenancy. Native constructs such as namespaces, role-based access control, and admission controllers offer logical separation but fall short of delivering the strong isolation guarantees needed in untrusted, adversarial environments. This paper introduces a Kubernetes-compatible architecture that combines per-tenant virtual control planes, hypervisor-backed virtual machines as sandboxes for containers, and automated policy enforcement to achieve secure, isolation-centric multi-tenancy. Each tenant is provisioned with a dedicated virtual control plane (via vCluster) connected to a virtual node that schedules workloads into VM-based sandboxes (with Azure Container Instances) while maintaining the familiar Kubernetes API. A policy engine (Kyverno) automatically hardens namespaces by enforcing network segmentation, resource governance, and strict security contexts at admission time. Evaluation results show that the proposed model significantly improves inter-tenant isolation with negligible runtime performance overhead, offering a practical pathway to zero-trust container orchestration in hostile cloud and edge environments.
items.abstract_zh: Kubernetes 已经成为容器编排事实上的标准，但其核心设计并没有满足恶意多租户的需求。命名空间、基于角色的访问控制和准入控制器等本机结构提供了逻辑分离，但无法提供不可信、对抗环境中所需的强大隔离保证。本文介绍了一种与 Kubernetes 兼容的架构，该架构将每个租户的虚拟控制平面、作为容器沙箱的虚拟机管理程序支持的虚拟机以及自动化策略实施相结合，以实现安全、以隔离为中心的多租户。每个租户都配备了一个连接到虚拟节点的专用虚拟控制平面（通过 vCluster），该虚拟节点将工作负载调度到基于 VM 的沙箱（使用 Azure 容器实例），同时维护熟悉的 Kubernetes API。策略引擎 (Kyverno) 通过在准入时实施网络分段、资源治理和严格的安全上下文来自动强化命名空间。评估结果表明，所提出的模型显着改善了租户间隔离，运行时性能开销可以忽略不计，为敌对云和边缘环境中的零信任容器编排提供了实用途径。

items.title: Evaluating Trusted Execution Environment Performance for Genome Sequence Alignment: An AMD SEV Case Study.
items.abstract: HPC systems are used for a variety of applications from different fields and user groups. These research areas include, among others, the life sciences and medicine, engineering, the humanities, and the natural sciences. Applications from these areas all have different characteristics and computational demands. An important requirement is the security and protection of data, especially when dealing with highly sensitive data such as the human genome. In order to facilitate the processing of actual patient data on HPC systems, it is imperative to implement robust protective measures, particularly given the prevalence of multi-tenancy models in such systems. In this paper, we focus in particular on in-memory encryption with AMD SEV and SME. We compare two micro benchmarks and the BWA-MEM2 algorithm as genome sequencing workflow against each other. Our evaluation matrix includes a SMP node, a VM with SEV and SME enabled and VM with only SME enabled, all assessed against varying thread counts and different file systems for the input data. Our analysis showed that the location of the input data has a minor impact on performance, while the encrypted file system causes the most overhead. Memory bandwidth seems to be the limiting factor as the bandwidth drops by approximately 50% with SEV and SME being enabled. Overall we observed that the overhead caused by the encryption for the genome alignment workload is adequate with 10.4% for SME and over 20.9% for SEV+SME using 32 threads, but the algorithm scales worse for larger thread counts compared to the native execution.
items.abstract_zh: HPC系统用于不同领域和用户群体的各种应用。这些研究领域包括生命科学和医学、工程学、人文学科和自然科学等。这些领域的应用程序都有不同的特征和计算需求。一个重要的要求是数据的安全和保护，特别是在处理高度敏感的数据（例如人类基因组）时。为了促进 HPC 系统上实际患者数据的处理，必须实施强有力的保护措施，特别是考虑到此类系统中多租户模型的普遍存在。在本文中，我们特别关注 AMD SEV 和 SME 的内存加密。我们将两个微观基准和 BWA-MEM2 算法作为基因组测序工作流程进行相互比较。我们的评估矩阵包括一个 SMP 节点、启用了 SEV 和 SME 的虚拟机以及仅启用了 SME 的虚拟机，所有这些都针对输入数据的不同线程数和不同文件系统进行了评估。我们的分析表明，输入数据的位置对性能的影响较小，而加密文件系统造成的开销最大。内存带宽似乎是限制因素，因为启用 SEV 和 SME 后带宽会下降约 50%。总体而言，我们观察到，基因组比对工作负载加密造成的开销足够，对于使用 32 个线程的 SME 为 10.4%，对于 SEV+SME 超过 20.9%，但与本机执行相比，对于更大的线程数，算法的扩展性更差。

items.title: Scaling All-to-All Operations Across Emerging Many-Core Supercomputers.
items.abstract: Performant all-to-all collective operations in MPI are critical to fast Fourier transforms, transposition, and machine learning applications. There are many existing implementations for all-to-all exchanges on emerging systems, with the achieved performance dependent on many factors, including message size, process count, architecture, and parallel system partition. This paper presents novel all-to-all algorithms for emerging many-core systems. Further, the paper presents a performance analysis against existing algorithms and system MPI, with novel algorithms achieving up to 3x speedup over system MPI at 32 nodes of state-of-the-art Sapphire Rapids systems.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 中高性能的全面集体运算对于快速傅立叶变换、转置和机器学习应用至关重要。在新兴系统上有许多现有的全对全交换实现，所实现的性能取决于许多因素，包括消息大小、进程计数、体系结构和并行系统分区。本文提出了适用于新兴多核系统的新颖的全对全算法。此外，本文还针对现有算法和系统 MPI 进行了性能分析，在最先进的 Sapphire Rapids 系统的 32 个节点上，新算法比系统 MPI 实现了高达 3 倍的加速。

items.title: Is it an HPC Workflow Assistant? Is it a Framework? It's Drona Workflow Engine.
items.abstract: HPC resources are becoming increasingly complex, while HPC itself is becoming more popular among novice researchers across a wide range of research domains. These novice researchers often lack typical HPC skills, which results in a steep learning curve that leads to frustration and inefficient use of HPC resources. To address this, we developed Drona Workflow Engine. Drona offers an intuitive Graphical User Interface (GUI) that assists researchers in running their scientific workflows. The researcher provides the required information for their specific scientific workflow, and Drona generates all the scripts needed to run that workflow on the researcher’s behalf. For transparency and additional flexibility, Drona will display all generated scripts in a fully editable preview window, allowing the researcher to make any final adjustments as needed. Drona also provides a flexible framework for importing, creating, adapting, and sharing custom scientific workflows. Drona significantly enhances researcher productivity by abstracting the underlying HPC complexities while retaining full control over their workflows.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 资源变得越来越复杂，而 HPC 本身也越来越受到各个研究领域的新手研究人员的欢迎。这些新手研究人员往往缺乏典型的 HPC 技能，从而导致学习曲线陡峭，从而导致 HPC 资源的使用效率低下和沮丧。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 Drona 工作流程引擎。 Drona 提供直观的图形用户界面 (GUI)，可帮助研究人员运行其科学工作流程。研究人员提供其特定科学工作流程所需的信息，Drona 代表研究人员生成运行该工作流程所需的所有脚本。为了提高透明度和灵活性，Drona 将在完全可编辑的预览窗口中显示所有生成的脚本，允许研究人员根据需要进行任何最终调整。 Drona 还提供了一个灵活的框架，用于导入、创建、调整和共享自定义科学工作流程。 Drona 通过抽象底层 HPC 复杂性，同时保留对其工作流程的完全控制，显着提高了研究人员的工作效率。

items.title: Teaching Task-Based Parallel Programming with a Runtime Systems-Aware Perspective.
items.abstract: Conventional parallel programming using explicit multithreading over modern multicore processors imposes significant complexity in organizing and balancing work across threads. Task-based models simplify parallel programming using runtimes that handle task scheduling and resource management, improving scalability and reducing developer effort.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代多核处理器上使用显式多线程的传统并行编程在组织和平衡线程之间的工作方面带来了极大的复杂性。基于任务的模型使用处理任务调度和资源管理的运行时来简化并行编程，从而提高可扩展性并减少开发人员的工作量。

items.title: MPI Communication Performance on AMD MI300A: Microbenchmarks and Applications.
items.abstract: AMD’s MI300A integrates CPU and GPU chiplets around a shared HBM3 pool, removing the traditional host-device boundary and changing assumptions in GPU-aware MPI. Despite early deployments, there is little guidance on how mainstream MPI libraries behave on this architecture. This evaluation paper presents a comparative study of MVAPICH-Plus, Open MPI, MPICH, and Cray MPICH on MI300A APU nodes. We measure point-to-point performance on CPU and GPU buffers, reporting intra-node and inter-node latency, unidirectional bandwidth, and bidirectional bandwidth across various message sizes. We then examine collectives, covering reduction-based and data-movement-based operations, and analyze scaling behavior. Finally, we connect microbenchmark trends to application results using OpenFOAM and Distributed training of a large language model (LLM) with PyTorch. The study distills practical guidance and highlights opportunities for MI300A-aware optimizations in MPI.
items.abstract_zh: AMD 的 MI300A 在共享 HBM3 池周围集成了 CPU 和 GPU 小芯片，消除了传统的主机设备边界并改变了 GPU 感知 MPI 的假设。尽管已经进行了早期部署，但关于主流 MPI 库如何在此架构上运行的指导很少。本评估论文对 MI300A APU 节点上的 MVAPICH-Plus、Open MPI、MPICH 和 Cray MPICH 进行了比较研究。我们测量 CPU 和 GPU 缓冲区的点对点性能，报告节点内和节点间延迟、单向带宽和各种消息大小的双向带宽。然后，我们检查集体，涵盖基于缩减和基于数据移动的操作，并分析扩展行为。最后，我们使用 OpenFOAM 和 PyTorch 对大型语言模型 (LLM) 进行分布式训练，将微基准趋势与应用结果联系起来。该研究提炼了实用指南，并强调了 MPI 中 MI300A 感知优化的机会。

items.title: xGFabric: Coupling Sensor Networks and HPC Facilities with Private 5G Wireless Networks for Real-Time Digital Agriculture.
items.abstract: Advanced scientific applications require coupling distributed sensor networks with centralized high-performance computing facilities. Citrus Under Protective Screening (CUPS) exemplifies this need in digital agriculture, where citrus research facilities are instrumented with numerous sensors monitoring environmental conditions and detecting protective screening damage. CUPS demands access to computational fluid dynamics codes for modeling environmental conditions and guiding real-time interventions like water application or robotic repairs. These computing domains have contrasting properties: sensor networks provide low-performance, limited-capacity, unreliable data access, while high-performance facilities offer enormous computing power through high-latency batch processing. Private 5G networks present novel capabilities addressing this challenge by providing low latency, high throughput, and reliability necessary for near-real-time coupling of edge sensor networks with HPC simulations. This work presents xGFabric, an end-to-end system coupling sensor networks with HPC facilities through Private 5G networks. The prototype connects remote sensors via 5G network slicing to HPC systems, enabling real-time digital agriculture simulation.
items.abstract_zh: 先进的科学应用需要将分布式传感器网络与集中式高性能计算设施相结合。保护性筛选下的柑橘 (CUPS) 体现了数字农业中的这种需求，其中柑橘研究设施配备了大量传感器，用于监测环境条件并检测保护性筛选损坏。 CUPS 需要访问计算流体动力学代码来对环境条件进行建模并指导实时干预，例如水应用或机器人维修。这些计算领域具有截然不同的特性：传感器网络提供低性能、有限容量、不可靠的数据访问，而高性能设施通过高延迟批处理提供巨大的计算能力。专用 5G 网络提供了解决这一挑战的新颖功能，提供边缘传感器网络与 HPC 模拟的近实时耦合所需的低延迟、高吞吐量和可靠性。这项工作提出了 xGFabric，这是一种通过专用 5G 网络将传感器网络与 HPC 设施耦合的端到端系统。该原型通过 5G 网络切片将远程传感器连接到 HPC 系统，从而实现实时数字农业模拟。

items.title: RISC-V Vectorization Coverage for HPC: A TSVC-Based Analysis.
items.abstract: The RISC-V Vector Extension (RVV) introduces scalable, vector-length agnostic operations with strong potential for high-performance computing (HPC). This paper presents a TSVC-based instruction coverage analysis of RVV to evaluate current compiler auto-vectorization support. We compile TSVC with GNU and LLVM under both vector-length agnostic (VLA) and vector-length specific (VLS) modes and analyze the emitted instructions against the RVV 1.0 specification. Our results quantify instruction usage across key groups, identify missed instructions, and classify the causes of failed vectorization, including compiler backend limitations, absent use cases in TSVC, and nontrivial or unsupported patterns. We also highlight TSVC’s limitations, including ambiguous kernel vectorizability and missing representations of modern HPC-relevant patterns. Finally, we suggest directions for enhancing benchmark suites to better reflect RVV capabilities and guide compiler development for HPC workloads.
items.abstract_zh: RISC-V 矢量扩展 (RVV) 引入了可扩展、矢量长度无关的操作，具有高性能计算 (HPC) 的强大潜力。本文提出了一种基于 TSVC 的 RVV 指令覆盖率分析，以评估当前编译器自动向量化支持。我们在向量长度不可知 (VLA) 和向量长度特定 (VLS) 模式下使用 GNU 和 LLVM 编译 TSVC，并根据 RVV 1.0 规范分析发出的指令。我们的结果量化了关键组中的指令使用情况，识别丢失的指令，并对矢量化失败的原因进行分类，包括编译器后端限制、TSVC 中缺少的用例以及不平凡或不受支持的模式。我们还强调了 TSVC 的局限性，包括模糊的内核可向量化性和缺少现代 HPC 相关模式的表示。最后，我们提出了增强基准测试套件的方向，以更好地反映 RVV 功能并指导 HPC 工作负载的编译器开发。

items.title: A RISC-V Vector Extension for Multi-word Arithmetic.
items.abstract: Multi-word arithmetic plays a critical role in high-performance computing (HPC) as it enables arithmetic on operands exceeding a processor’s native word size. For example, many cryptographic kernels, such as number theoretic transform, rely on multi-word arithmetic to compute log 2(q)-bit integer arithmetic, accelerating mod-q polynomial multiplication in post-quantum cryptography. To mitigate carry-propagation bottlenecks in multi-word arithmetic, prior work proposed code-generation approaches targeting GPUs and domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) with native large-integer support. However, GPU-based approaches tend to be less energy-efficient, while DSA designs incur non-trivial non-recurring engineering. Therefore, our work evaluates the potential for RISC-V in HPC and explores multi-word arithmetic using RISC-V. We propose a general modeling-based multi-word extension on the RISC-V Vector (RVV) ISA. Furthermore, we develop comprehensive performance models to analyze performance consistency across host vector processing systems with diverse microarchitectural configurations. Our work demonstrates that targeted architectural extensions can further saturate the pipeline by enhancing RVV’s carry-propagation support.
items.abstract_zh: 多字算术在高性能计算 (HPC) 中发挥着至关重要的作用，因为它可以对超过处理器本机字大小的操作数进行算术。例如，许多密码内核（例如数论变换）依赖多字算术来计算 log 2(q) 位整数算术，从而加速后量子密码学中的 mod-q 多项式乘法。为了缓解多字算术中的进位传播瓶颈，之前的工作提出了针对 GPU 和具有本机大整数支持的特定领域加速器 (DSA) 的代码生成方法。然而，基于 GPU 的方法往往能源效率较低，而 DSA 设计则需要非平凡的非重复性工程。因此，我们的工作评估了 RISC-V 在 HPC 中的潜力，并探索使用 RISC-V 的多字算术。我们在 RISC-V Vector (RVV) ISA 上提出了一种基于通用建模的多字扩展。此外，我们开发了全面的性能模型来分析具有不同微架构配置的主机矢量处理系统的性能一致性。我们的工作表明，有针对性的架构扩展可以通过增强 RVV 的进位传播支持来进一步饱和管道。

items.title: Modelling Load Imbalance In Shared Memory Multicore Systems.
items.abstract: Memory bandwidth has become the primary limiting factor of performance in many modern HPC applications, and it poses a limit to scalability because the achievable memory bandwidth only grows linearly with a small number of CPU cores. When the number of cores concurrently using the memory system exceeds a threshold, the aggregate memory bandwidth quickly saturates.
items.abstract_zh: 内存带宽已成为许多现代 HPC 应用程序性能的主要限制因素，并且它对可扩展性造成了限制，因为可实现的内存带宽仅随着 CPU 核心数量的减少而线性增长。当同时使用内存系统的核心数量超过阈值时，聚合内存带宽很快就会饱和。

items.title: Fast Linear Solvers via AI-Tuned Markov Chain Monte Carlo-based Matrix Inversion.
items.abstract: Large, sparse linear systems are pervasive in modern science and engineering, and Krylov subspace solvers are an established means of solving them. Yet convergence can be slow for ill-conditioned matrices, so practical deployments usually require preconditioners. Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC)-based matrix inversion can generate such preconditioners and accelerate Krylov iterations, but its effectiveness depends on parameters whose optima vary across matrices; manual or grid search is costly. We present an AI-driven framework recommending MCMC parameters for a given linear system. A graph neural surrogate predicts preconditioning speed from A and MCMC parameters. A Bayesian acquisition function then chooses the parameter sets most likely to minimise iterations. On a previously unseen ill-conditioned system, the framework achieves better preconditioning with 50% of the search budget of conventional methods, yielding about a 10% reduction in iterations to convergence. These results suggest a route for incorporating MCMC-based preconditioners into large-scale systems.
items.abstract_zh: 大型稀疏线性系统在现代科学和工程中普遍存在，而 Krylov 子空间求解器是解决这些系统的既定方法。然而，病态矩阵的收敛速度可能很慢，因此实际部署通常需要预处理器。基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 的矩阵求逆可以生成此类预处理器并加速 Krylov 迭代，但其有效性取决于其最优值因矩阵而异的参数；手动或网格搜索的成本很高。我们提出了一个人工智能驱动的框架，为给定的线性系统推荐 MCMC 参数。图神经代理根据 A 和 MCMC 参数预测预处理速度。然后，贝叶斯采集函数选择最有可能最小化迭代的参数集。在以前未见过的病态系统上，该框架以传统方法 50% 的搜索预算实现了更好的预处理，从而使收敛迭代减少了约 10%。这些结果提出了将基于 MCMC 的预处理器合并到大型系统中的途径。

items.title: Assessing a RISC-V Accelerator for Cross-Section Lookup in Chipyard.
items.abstract: High-fidelity nuclear reactor simulations using Monte Carlo neutron transport face bottlenecks in neutron cross-section lookups. We designed a custom RISC-V accelerator for RSBench, integrated with a RocketCore in Chipyard. The pipelined design employs Humlíček’s 8th-order rational approximation to efficiently compute the Faddeeva function during Doppler broadening of multipole cross section data, which forms the inner loop of the program, achieving a 17× cycle reduction for Faddeeva computations and 34.2× for the loop compared to RISC-V software, with similar gains over Intel Core i5 Tiger Lake-U, yielding a 10× wall-clock time improvement. Chipyard’s software-based environment benefits the HPC community by enabling accelerator evaluation. These results highlight RISC-V’s potential for HPC through custom accelerators and code portability. Future work will optimize operating frequency and extend to additional simulation kernels.
items.abstract_zh: 使用蒙特卡罗中子输运的高保真核反应堆模拟面临着中子截面查找的瓶颈。我们为 RSBench 设计了一个定制的 RISC-V 加速器，与 Chipyard 中的 RocketCore 集成。流水线设计采用 Humlíček 的 8 阶有理逼近法，在多极截面数据的多普勒展宽过程中高效计算 Faddeeva 函数，形成程序的内部循环，与 RISC-V 软件相比，Faddeeva 计算周期减少了 17 倍，循环周期减少了 34.2 倍，与英特尔酷睿 i5 Tiger Lake-U 相比，增益类似，挂钟时间缩短了 10 倍。 Chipyard 基于软件的环境通过支持加速器评估使 HPC 社区受益。这些结果凸显了 RISC-V 通过定制加速器和代码可移植性在 HPC 方面的潜力。未来的工作将优化运行频率并扩展到其他模拟内核。

items.title: SlimIO: Lightweight I/O Path Design for Write Isolation in FDP-backed In-Memory Databases.
items.abstract: In-Memory Databases (IMDBs) are widely used with HPC applications to manage transient data, often using snapshot-based persistence for backups. Redis, a representative IMDB, employs both snapshot and Write-Ahead Log (WAL) mechanisms, storing data on persistent devices via the traditional kernel I/O path. This method incurs syscall overhead, I/O contention between processes, and SSD garbage collection (GC) delays. To address these issues, we propose SlimIO, which adopts I/O passthru to minimize syscall overhead and inter-process I/O interference. Additionally, it leverages Flexible Data Placement (FDP) SSDs as backup storage to avoid performance degradation from SSD GC. Experimental results show that SlimIO reduces snapshot time by up to 25%, increases query throughput by up to 30% during non-snapshot periods, and lowers 99.9%-ile latency by up to 50%. Furthermore, it achieves a write amplification factor (WAF) of 1.00, indicating no redundant internal writes, thus extending SSD lifespan.
items.abstract_zh: 内存数据库 (IMDB) 广泛与 HPC 应用程序一起使用来管理瞬态数据，通常使用基于快照的持久性进行备份。 Redis是IMDB的代表，它采用快照和预写日志（WAL）两种机制，通过传统的内核I/O路径将数据存储在持久设备上。此方法会产生系统调用开销、进程之间的 I/O 争用以及 SSD 垃圾收集 (GC) 延迟。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 SlimIO，它采用 I/O passthru 来最小化系统调用开销和进程间 I/O 干扰。此外，它利用灵活数据放置 (FDP) SSD 作为备份存储，以避免 SSD GC 导致性能下降。实验结果表明，SlimIO 可将快照时间缩短高达 25%，在非快照期间将查询吞吐量提高高达 30%，并将 99.9%-ile 延迟降低高达 50%。此外，它的写入放大系数（WAF）达到1.00，表明内部没有冗余写入，从而延长了SSD的使用寿命。

items.title: A GPU FFT Wrapper to Co-optimize Floating-Point Precision and Library Selection via Predictive Error Modeling.
items.abstract: Approximate and low-precision computing are essential for modern applications, and effectively leveraging available precision options can deliver substantial gains in performance and energy efficiency. We focus on the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), a representative function used in scientific computing, and propose a wrapper library to exploit these options. Using multiple GPU-accelerated FFT libraries, we observe that different libraries excel in different regions of the performance–accuracy space and that these sweet spots depend on transform size and input content. Guided by these insights, we propose a framework that selects the best kernel (library and precision) on the fly to minimize runtime or energy while satisfying a specified error threshold. A lightweight machine learning model predicts per-kernel error at runtime from sampled input features. Experiments show over 98% selection accuracy and mean speedups exceeding 40% compared to a double precision baseline. The framework integrates seamlessly with existing workflows as a wrapper library.
items.abstract_zh: 近似和低精度计算对于现代应用至关重要，有效利用可用的精度选项可以显着提高性能和能源效率。我们专注于科学计算中使用的代表性函数快速傅里叶变换（FFT），并提出了一个包装库来利用这些选项。使用多个 GPU 加速的 FFT 库，我们观察到不同的库在性能精度空间的不同区域表现出色，并且这些最佳点取决于变换大小和输入内容。在这些见解的指导下，我们提出了一个框架，可以动态选择最佳内核（库和精度），以最大限度地减少运行时间或能量，同时满足指定的错误阈值。轻量级机器学习模型根据采样的输入特征在运行时预测每个内核的错误。实验表明，与双精度基线相比，选择准确度超过 98%，平均加速超过 40%。该框架作为包装库与现有工作流程无缝集成。

items.title: Parallel Data Object Creation: Scalable Metadata Management in Parallel I/O Library.
items.abstract: High-level I/O libraries, such as PnetCDF and HDF5, are commonly used by large-scale scientific applications to perform I/O tasks in parallel. These I/O libraries store the metadata of data objects in files along with their raw data. To ensure metadata consistency during parallel data object creation, they require applications to call the metadata APIs collectively using consistent metadata. Such a requirement can result in an expensive consistency check, as its cost increases with the metadata volume and the number of processes. To address this limitation, we propose a new file header format, which uses partitioned metadata blocks to enable independent data object creation and reduce the objects required for consistency check. Our performance evaluation shows that this new design achieves a scalable performance, cutting data object creation times by up to 196 × when running on 4096 MPI processes to create 5,684,800 data objects in parallel.
items.abstract_zh: 高级 I/O 库（例如 PnetCDF 和 HDF5）通常被大型科学应用程序用来并行执行 I/O 任务。这些 I/O 库将数据对象的元数据及其原始数据存储在文件中。为了确保并行数据对象创建过程中元数据的一致性，它们要求应用程序使用一致的元数据来集体调用元数据API。这样的要求可能会导致昂贵的一致性检查，因为其成本随着元数据量和进程数量的增加而增加。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的文件头格式，它使用分区元数据块来实现独立的数据对象创建并减少一致性检查所需的对象。我们的性能评估表明，这种新设计实现了可扩展的性能，在 4096 个 MPI 进程上运行以并行创建 5,684,800 个数据对象时，数据对象创建时间最多可减少 196 倍。

items.title: Beyond End-to-End: Understanding the Limits of LLMs in Scientific Problem Solving.
items.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are now widely used across many applications, including scientific question answering that requires combining visual and textual inputs. However, existing benchmarks in this area are mostly end-to-end, making it difficult to pinpoint where models fail. To address this gap, we design an evaluation framework that decomposes scientific question answering into subtasks for fine-grained assessment. We evaluate two MLLMs, Gemini 2.5 Pro and Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct, on questions involving high-resolution visual data. Results show that accurate answers are unattainable without scripting or tool use. Although both models can solve individual subtasks, such as mapping cities to coordinates or computing pixel positions, they often fail to integrate these abilities in end-to-end reasoning, producing large deviations. Our findings highlight the importance of benchmarks that expose reasoning bottlenecks and suggest that agent-based or multi-model approaches may be required to achieve reliable performance on complex scientific tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型 (MLLM) 现在广泛用于许多应用程序，包括需要结合视觉和文本输入的科学问答。然而，该领域现有的基准大多是端到端的，因此很难查明模型失败的地方。为了解决这一差距，我们设计了一个评估框架，将科学问答分解为细粒度评估的子任务。我们针对涉及高分辨率视觉数据的问题评估了两个 MLLM：Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct。结果表明，如果不使用脚本或工具，就无法获得准确的答案。尽管这两种模型都可以解决单个子任务，例如将城市映射到坐标或计算像素位置，但它们通常无法将这些能力集成到端到端推理中，从而产生较大偏差。我们的研究结果强调了暴露推理瓶颈的基准的重要性，并表明可能需要基于代理或多模型的方法才能在复杂的科学任务上实现可靠的性能。

items.title: Assessing Page Reclamation Mechanisms for Linux.
items.abstract: Page reclamation is critical for system performance. However, understanding and quantifying inner workings of reclamation policies remains challenging. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of Linux’s Two-Queue LRU (2QLRU) and Multi-Generational LRU (MGLRU) policies using a lightweight profiler that measures decision overhead and reclamation effectiveness. Across seven diverse applications under various memory constraints, we quantify how MGLRU achieves better reclamation decisions despite its higher decision making cost, while its performance benefits diminish under severe memory constraint. These insights provide guidance for future memory management optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 页面回收对于系统性能至关重要。然而，理解和量化填海政策的内部运作仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们使用轻量级分析器来衡量决策开销和回收有效性，对 Linux 的双队列 LRU (2QLRU) 和多代 LRU (MGLRU) 策略进行了全面分析。在各种内存限制下的七个不同应用程序中，我们量化了 MGLRU 如何实现更好的回收决策，尽管其决策成本较高，而其性能优势在严重的内存限制下会减弱。这些见解为未来的内存管理优化提供了指导。

items.title: A Simulation Framework for Workload Management in Hybrid Quantum-HPC Cloud System.
items.abstract: The convergence of quantum computing and high-performance computing (HPC) is giving rise to hybrid cloud platforms that coordinate workflows across classical and quantum resources. These heterogeneous environments introduce new challenges for workload management, including device variability, noise-prone quantum processors, and the need for synchronized orchestration across distributed systems. This survey reviews state-of-the-art techniques for scheduling, resource allocation, and workflow management in classical HPC, quantum clouds, and emerging hybrid infrastructures. A taxonomy is proposed to categorize workload management approaches by scheduling strategy, allocation model, orchestration mechanism, and performance metric. We present HybridCloudSim, a novel simulation framework designed to model hybrid quantum–HPC cloud environments and optimize resource usage under realistic constraints. HybridCloudSim is a conceptual foundation and a practical tool for advancing workload management in hybrid quantum–HPC systems.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算和高性能计算 (HPC) 的融合催生了混合云平台，可以协调经典资源和量子资源的工作流程。这些异构环境给工作负载管理带来了新的挑战，包括设备可变性、容易产生噪声的量子处理器以及跨分布式系统同步编排的需求。这项调查回顾了经典 HPC、量子云和新兴混合基础设施中调度、资源分配和工作流管理的最先进技术。提出了一种分类法，通过调度策略、分配模型、编排机制和性能指标对工作负载管理方法进行分类。我们推出了 HybridCloudSim，这是一种新颖的模拟框架，旨在对混合量子 HPC 云环境进行建模并在现实约束下优化资源使用。 HybridCloudSim 是一个概念基础和实用工具，用于推进混合量子 HPC 系统中的工作负载管理。

items.title: LangChain-Parsl: Connect Large Language Model Agents to High Performance Computing Resource.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can improve performance in answering questions beyond their contextual understanding by running external tools, such as a calculator for arithmetics, an online query for real-time weather, et al. For scientific applications, this enables the LLM to perform and analyze simulation runs for more accurate answers. However, the increasing scale of scientific computing requires high-performance computers (HPCs), which are managed by job schedulers. In this work, we implemented Parsl to the LangChain tool calling to bridge the gap between the LLM agent and the HPC resource.
