Two implementations were set up and tested on a local Nvidia GPU workstation and the Polaris/ALCF HPC system. The first setup was implemented by modifying the LangChain tool calling, which converts the LangChain tool calls to Parsl functions and queues them to the Parsl workers for parallel execution. The second approach was achieved by designing a Parsl ensemble function as an LLM tool, which performed parallel tasks. With these implementations, the LLM agent workflow was prompted to run molecular dynamics simulations, with different protein structures and simulation conditions. The results show that our Parsl implementations enable parallel execution of scientific tools that invoked by LLM agents on both local GPU workstations and HPC platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以通过运行外部工具（例如算术计算器、实时天气在线查询等）来提高回答超出其上下文理解范围的问题的性能。对于科学应用，这使得法学硕士能够执行和分析模拟运行以获得更准确的答案。然而，科学计算规模的不断扩大需要由作业调度程序管理的高性能计算机 (HPC)。在这项工作中，我们将 Parsl 实现到 LangChain 工具调用中，以弥合 LLM 代理和 HPC 资源之间的差距。在本地 Nvidia GPU 工作站和 Polaris/ALCF HPC 系统上设置并测试了两种实现。第一个设置是通过修改 LangChain 工具调用来实现的，它将 LangChain 工具调用转换为 Parsl 函数，并将它们排队到 Parsl Worker 中并行执行。第二种方法是通过将 Parsl 集成函数设计为 LLM 工具来实现的，该工具执行并行任务。通过这些实现，LLM代理工作流程被提示运行分子动力学模拟，具有不同的蛋白质结构和模拟条件。结果表明，我们的 Parsl 实现支持在本地 GPU 工作站和 HPC 平台上并行执行 LLM 代理调用的科学工具。

items.title: Compression Error Sensitivity Analysis for Different Experts in MoE Model Inference.
items.abstract: With the widespread application of Mixture of Experts (MoE) reasoning models in the field of LLM learning, efficiently serving MoE models under limited GPU memory constraints has emerged as a significant challenge. Offloading the non-activated experts to main memory has been identified as an efficient approach to address such a problem, while it brings the challenges of transferring the expert between the GPU memory and main memory. We need to explore an efficient approach to compress the expert and analyze how the compression error affects the inference performance.
items.abstract_zh: 随着专家混合 (MoE) 推理模型在 LLM 学习领域的广泛应用，在有限的 GPU 内存限制下高效服务 MoE 模型已成为一项重大挑战。将未激活的专家卸载到主内存已被认为是解决此类问题的有效方法，但它带来了在 GPU 内存和主内存之间传输专家的挑战。我们需要探索一种有效的方法来压缩专家并分析压缩误差如何影响推理性能。

items.title: Energy-aware performance portability with OpenMP dynamic variants.
items.abstract: Performance portability in HPC and embedded systems is often limited by power and thermal constraints. The OpenMP programming model offers a compile-time mechanism known as variants, allowing different function specializations. Previous research extended this concept to the runtime level, enabling dynamic variant selection. We build on these foundations with an energy‑aware runtime that augments variant selection with low‑overhead power and temperature instrumentation and a multi‑criteria policy balancing power caps, thermal headroom, and performance. Implemented in LLVM and publicly available, our mechanism profiles per‑variant energy and thermal behavior, selecting specializations at runtime based on user‑defined thresholds and live system state. Validation on HPC and embedded platforms shows the runtime enforces dynamic power caps with 98% compliance on a workstation (versus 67% unconstrained). On thermally constrained edge devices, proactive CPU/GPU migration beats hardware throttling, cutting execution time by 39% while maintaining stability. In a simulated battery‑limited mission, energy‑aware selection extends battery lifetime.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 和嵌入式系统中的性能可移植性通常受到功耗和热约束的限制。 OpenMP 编程模型提供了一种称为变体的编译时机制，允许不同的函数专门化。先前的研究将这一概念扩展到运行时级别，从而实现动态变体选择。我们在这些基础上构建了能源感知运行时，通过低开销功率和温度仪器以及平衡功率上限、热余量和性能的多标准策略来增强变体选择。我们的机制在 LLVM 中实现并公开可用，可分析每个变量的能量和热行为，并根据用户定义的阈值和实时系统状态在运行时选择专业化。 HPC 和嵌入式平台上的验证显示，运行时在工作站上强制执行动态功率上限，合规性为 98%（相对于不受约束的合规性为 67%）。在热受限的边缘设备上，主动 CPU/GPU 迁移击败了硬件限制，将执行时间缩短了 39%，同时保持了稳定性。在模拟电池有限的任务中，能源感知选择可以延长电池寿命。

items.title: Evaluating HPC Scheduling Strategies for Urgent Workloads.
items.abstract: Scientific computing centers increasingly face workloads with diverse urgency requirements, driven by applications that demand rapid or even immediate execution. Appropriately configured scheduling policies can significantly improve both user satisfaction and overall cluster utilization. In this work, we present a systematic analysis of scheduler configurations under scenarios where a fraction of jobs have urgent computing needs. We evaluate multiple job scheduling simulators, develop a lightweight job-submission emulation framework, and create tools to analyze and visualize the resulting scheduling data. Our study identifies key trade-offs between responsiveness, fairness, and efficiency, and offers a set of practical scheduling configurations (particularly for Slurm) that can be tailored to HPC environments supporting mixed-urgency workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 科学计算中心越来越多地面临着各种紧急要求的工作负载，这些工作负载是由需要快速甚至立即执行的应用程序驱动的。适当配置的调度策略可以显着提高用户满意度和整体集群利用率。在这项工作中，我们对部分作业有紧急计算需求的情况下的调度程序配置进行了系统分析。我们评估多个作业调度模拟器，开发轻量级作业提交仿真框架，并创建工具来分析和可视化生成的调度数据。我们的研究确定了响应性、公平性和效率之间的关键权衡，并提供了一组实用的调度配置（特别是 Slurm），可以针对支持混合紧急工作负载的 HPC 环境进行定制。

items.title: HPC Digital Twins for Evaluating Scheduling Policies, Incentive Structures and their Impact on Power and Cooling.
items.abstract: Schedulers are critical for optimal resource utilization in high-performance computing. Traditional methods to evaluate schedulers are limited to post-deployment analysis, or simulators, which do not model associated infrastructure. In this work, we present the first-of-its-kind integration of scheduling and digital twins in HPC. This enables what-if studies to understand the impact of parameter configurations and scheduling decisions on the physical assets, even before deployment, or regarching changes not easily realizable in production. We (1) provide the first digital twin framework extended with scheduling capabilities, (2) integrate various top-tier HPC systems given their publicly available datasets, (3) implement extensions to integrate external scheduling simulators. Finally, we show how to (4) implement and evaluate incentive structures, as-well-as (5) evaluate machine learning based scheduling, in such novel digital-twin based meta-framework to prototype scheduling. Our work enables what-if scenarios of HPC systems to evaluate sustainability, and the impact on the simulated system.
items.abstract_zh: 调度程序对于高性能计算中的最佳资源利用至关重要。评估调度程序的传统方法仅限于部署后分析或模拟器，它们不会对相关基础设施进行建模。在这项工作中，我们首次在 HPC 中实现了调度和数字孪生的集成。这使得假设研究能够了解参数配置和调度决策对物理资产的影响，甚至在部署或重新研究生产中不易实现的更改之前也是如此。我们 (1) 提供第一个具有调度功能的数字孪生框架，(2) 集成各种顶级 HPC 系统（鉴于其公开可用的数据集），(3) 实现扩展以集成外部调度模拟器。最后，我们展示了如何（4）实施和评估激励结构，以及（5）评估基于机器学习的调度，在这种新颖的基于数字孪生的元框架中进行原型调度。我们的工作使 HPC 系统的假设场景能够评估可持续性以及对模拟系统的影响。

items.title: Porting a Fortran plasma simulation to Exascale on AMD GPUs using both OpenMP and Kokkos.
items.abstract: This paper presents the 2-step work undertaken to port Gysela, a petascale Fortran simulation code for turbulence in tokamak plasmas, to GPUs. The initial porting process using OpenMP offloading allowed for good performance in most of the code with speedups ranging from × 1 to × 12.5, with the exception of the collision operator, which became a major bottleneck. This performance critical operator was then rewritten in C++ using Kokkos. The new version is known as KoLiOp, and is one of the code modules with the largest speedups relative to the CPU baseline. We explain our strategy in both phases of development and provide an in-depth analysis of how we leveraged each framework for overall performance. The techniques detailed are applicable to other codes seeking to use a portability layer. Finally, we present a comparative benchmark run on the CPU (AMD Genoa), GPU (MI250X) and APU (MI300A) partitions of the Adastra machine.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了将 Gysela（用于托卡马克等离子体湍流的千万亿级 Fortran 模拟代码）移植到 GPU 的两步工作。使用 OpenMP 卸载的初始移植过程在大多数代码中都实现了良好的性能，加速范围从 × 1 到 × 12.5，但碰撞运算符除外，它成为了主要瓶颈。然后使用 Kokkos 用 C++ 重写了这个性能关键运算符。新版本被称为 KoLiOp，是相对于 CPU 基准具有最大加速的代码模块之一。我们解释了我们在两个开发阶段的策略，并深入分析了我们如何利用每个框架来实现整体性能。详细介绍的技术适用于寻求使用可移植层的其他代码。最后，我们展示了在 Adastra 机器的 CPU (AMD Genoa)、GPU (MI250X) 和 APU (MI300A) 分区上运行的比较基准测试。

items.title: First Practical Experiences Integrating Quantum Computers with HPC Resources: A Case Study With a 20-qubit Superconducting Quantum Computer.
items.abstract: Incorporating Quantum Computers into High Performance Computing (HPC) environments (commonly referred to as HPC+QC integration) marks a pivotal step in advancing computational capabilities for scientific research. Here we report the integration of a superconducting 20-qubit quantum computer into the HPC infrastructure at Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ), one of the first practical implementations of its kind. This yielded four key lessons: (1) quantum computers have stricter facility requirements than classical systems, yet their deployment in HPC environments is feasible when preceded by a rigorous site survey to ensure compliance; (2) quantum computers are inherently dynamic systems that require regular recalibration that is automatic and controllable by the HPC scheduler; (3) redundant power and cooling infrastructure is essential; and (4) effective hands-on onboarding should be provided for both quantum experts and new users. The identified conclusions provide a roadmap to guide future HPC center integrations.
items.abstract_zh: 将量子计算机纳入高性能计算 (HPC) 环境（通常称为 HPC+QC 集成）标志着提高科学研究计算能力的关键一步。在这里，我们报告了将超导 20 量子位量子计算机集成到莱布尼茨超级计算中心 (LRZ) 的 HPC 基础设施中，这是此类计算机的首批实际实施之一。这产生了四个关键教训：（1）量子计算机比传统系统具有更严格的设施要求，但在进行严格的现场调查以确保合规性的情况下，将其部署在 HPC 环境中是可行的； (2) 量子计算机本质上是动态系统，需要定期重新校准，并且由 HPC 调度程序自动控制； (3) 冗余电源和冷却基础设施至关重要； (4) 应为量子专家和新用户提供有效的实践指导。确定的结论提供了指导未来 HPC 中心集成的路线图。

items.title: An HPC-Inspired Blueprint for a Technology-Agnostic Quantum Middle Layer.
items.abstract: We present a blueprint for a quantum middle layer that supports applications across various quantum technologies. Inspired by concepts and abstractions from HPC libraries and middleware, our design is backend-neutral and context-aware. A program only needs to specify its intent once as typed data and operator descriptors. It declares what the quantum registers mean and which logical transformations are required, without committing to gates, pulses, continuous-variable routines, or anneal backend. Such execution details are carried separately in a context descriptor and can change per backend without modifying the intent artifacts.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了量子中间层的蓝图，支持各种量子技术的应用。受到 HPC 库和中间件的概念和抽象的启发，我们的设计是后端中立和上下文感知的。程序只需将其意图指定为类型化数据和运算符描述符一次。它声明了量子寄存器的含义以及需要哪些逻辑转换，而无需使用门、脉冲、连续变量例程或退火后端。此类执行细节在上下文描述符中单独携带，并且可以根据后端进行更改，而无需修改意图工件。

items.title: Bridging FPGA and GPU over PCIe: A Low-Latency Communication Path using AVX-512.
items.abstract: We introduce a communication mechanism bridging accelerators like GPUs and PCIe-based FPGA devices using Programmed I/O as an alternative to Direct Memory Access data transmissions: less than 2 microseconds one-way latency for small message transfers is achieved when the FPGA operates as Network Interface Card (NIC). Our prototype employs APEnetX, a custom FPGA-based NIC, and a CPU engine that atomically writes descriptors and payloads directly into the PCIe device Memory Mapped region using AVX-512 instructions. Additionally, a GPU peer-to-peer remapping technique enables the injections of data packets from the GPU memory into the NIC Memory Mapped aperture with no DMA-orchestrated data movements by the CPU. Microbenchmarks show lower latency than traditional RDMA for small packets with a simpler software stack. This method is not limited to APEnetX: it applies to any FPGA-based NIC or accelerator exposing a PCIe-mapped control aperture, provided the device can read and transmit data from memory.
items.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种通信机制，使用编程 I/O 作为直接内存访问数据传输的替代方案，桥接 GPU 和基于 PCIe 的 FPGA 设备等加速器：当 FPGA 作为网络接口卡 (NIC) 运行时，小消息传输的单向延迟低于 2 微秒。我们的原型采用 APEnetX、基于 FPGA 的定制 NIC 和 CPU 引擎，该引擎使用 AVX-512 指令以原子方式将描述符和有效负载直接写入 PCIe 设备内存映射区域。此外，GPU 对等重新映射技术可以将数据包从 GPU 内存注入到 NIC 内存映射孔径中，而无需 CPU 进行 DMA 协调的数据移动。微基准测试表明，对于小数据包，具有更简单软件堆栈的延迟比传统 RDMA 更低。此方法不仅限于 APEnetX：它适用于任何基于 FPGA 的 NIC 或暴露 PCIe 映射控制孔径的加速器，前提是设备可以从内存读取和传输数据。

items.title: Frameworks for Large Language Model Serving in HPC Environments.
items.abstract: We introduce open-source frameworks for deploying and running large language models (LLMs) within high-performance computing (HPC) environments. One such framework, AI-Flux, targets high-throughput batch inference, enabling users to submit LLM requests in an OpenAI-compatible format as traditional HPC jobs. Another framework is based on Ray Serve and it provides dynamic, on-demand allocation of HPC resources for interactive LLM serving via APIs, supporting applications such as chatbots and AI agents. The third framework, Illinois Chat, is a production-grade, always-on platform for real-time interaction, that relies on a dedicated GPU server for model inference. These frameworks are designed to abstract away underlying computer system complexities, allowing researchers to request and utilize GPU resources for model inference without manual environment setup. We describe these systems and report LLM-specific performance metrics. Results demonstrate that the proposed frameworks enable scalable and resource-efficient LLM serving across both batch and interactive workloads in support of a diverse user needs.
items.abstract_zh: 我们引入了用于在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中部署和运行大型语言模型 (LLM) 的开源框架。 AI-Flux 就是这样一个框架，它的目标是高吞吐量批量推理，使用户能够像传统 HPC 作业一样以 OpenAI 兼容格式提交 LLM 请求。另一个框架基于 Ray Serve，它通过 API 为交互式 LLM 服务提供动态、按需的 HPC 资源分配，支持聊天机器人和 AI 代理等应用程序。第三个框架，Illinois Chat，是一个生产级、始终在线的实时交互平台，依赖于专用 GPU 服务器进行模型推理。这些框架旨在抽象化底层计算机系统的复杂性，使研究人员能够请求和利用 GPU 资源进行模型推理，而无需手动设置环境。我们描述这些系统并报告法学硕士特定的绩效指标。结果表明，所提出的框架能够跨批处理和交互式工作负载提供可扩展且资源高效的 LLM 服务，从而支持不同的用户需求。

items.title: Numerical Properties and Scalability of s-Step Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient Methods.
items.abstract: s-step Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient (PCG) variants for iteratively solving large sparse linear systems reduce the number of global synchronization points of standard PCG by a factor of \({\mathcal {O}}(s)\). Despite improving scalability on large-scale parallel computers, they have worse numerical properties than standard PCG. Choosing a suitable basis type for the s-step basis matrices is known to potentially improve numerical stability strongly. The s-step method proposed first in the literature was designed to only use the monomial basis. We generalize this method to support arbitrary basis types, denoting our new method as sPCG.
items.abstract_zh: 用于迭代求解大型稀疏线性系统的 s 步预条件共轭梯度 (PCG) 变体将标准 PCG 的全局同步点数量减少了 \({\mathcal {O}}(s)\) 因子。尽管提高了大规模并行计算机的可扩展性，但它们的数值属性比标准 PCG 更差。众所周知，为 s 步基矩阵选择合适的基类型可以极大地提高数值稳定性。文献中首先提出的 s-step 方法被设计为仅使用单项式基。我们将此方法推广到支持任意基础类型，将我们的新方法表示为 sPCG。

items.title: Optimizing Network Resilience Using Domain-Specific Hardware Accelerator for Dynamic Programming.
items.abstract: Dynamic programming accelerators (DPAs) are devices designed with an instruction set optimized for dynamic programming (DP) operations. DP is fundamental to solving complex networking problems, particularly those involving fault tolerance and routing under dynamic conditions. This paper explores the use of DPA to accelerate network resilience by implementing an optimal routing algorithm that efficiently identifies alternative paths in response to link failures. The system’s performance is evaluated by comparing DPA implementation against conventional GPU-based and CPU-based solutions. Results show that DPA provides significant performance improvements, enabling faster recovery and improved robustness in dynamic network environments.
items.abstract_zh: 动态编程加速器 (DPA) 是采用针对动态编程 (DP) 操作而优化的指令集而设计的设备。 DP 是解决复杂网络问题的基础，特别是那些涉及动态条件下的容错和路由的问题。本文探讨了使用 DPA 通过实施最佳路由算法来加速网络恢复能力，该算法可有效识别替代路径以响应链路故障。通过将 DPA 实施与传统的基于 GPU 和 CPU 的解决方案进行比较来评估系统的性能。结果表明，DPA 提供了显着的性能改进，可以在动态网络环境中实现更快的恢复并提高稳健性。

items.title: Determining Levels of Detail for Simulators of Parallel and Distributed Computing Systems via Automated Calibration.
items.abstract: There are two sources of inaccuracy when simulating parallel and distributed computing systems: (i) a simulator implemented at an insufficient level of detail; and (ii) incorrectly calibrated simulation parameter values. Increasing the simulator’s level of detail can improve accuracy, but at the cost of higher space, time, and/or software complexity. Furthermore, evaluating the intrinsic accuracy of a simulator requires that its parameters be well-calibrated. Making decisions regarding the level of detail is thus challenging. We propose a methodology for instantiating the simulation calibration process and a framework for automating this process, which makes it possible to pick appropriate levels of detail for any simulator. We demonstrate the usefulness of our approach via two case studies for two different domains.
items.abstract_zh: 在模拟并行和分布式计算系统时，不准确的原因有两个：（i）模拟器的细节程度不够； (ii) 错误校准的模拟参数值。增加模拟器的细节水平可以提高准确性，但代价是更高的空间、时间和/或软件复杂性。此外，评估模拟器的固有精度需要对其参数进行良好校准。因此，做出有关详细程度的决策具有挑战性。我们提出了一种用于实例化模拟校准过程的方法和一个用于自动化该过程的框架，这使得可以为任何模拟器选择适当的细节级别。我们通过两个不同领域的两个案例研究证明了我们的方法的有用性。

items.title: Implementing support for Interactive and AI workloads in a traditional HPC environment.
items.abstract: This paper provides an example technique for how to run interactive and AI workloads alongside traditional High-Performance computing jobs. It explains how to use short maximum runtime for all jobs and a resource limited, high priority QOS, to allow quick interactive job starts without impacting system capacity for traditional HPC jobs. It includes background on the history and culture that contributed to the implementation and technique. The reference implementation, technique, and paper are Slurm centric in terminology, but the computer scheduling concepts and methods will translate to other implementations. The paper concludes with observations on the conditions that made these techniques effective and possible areas of future work to make them more broadly applicable.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提供了一种示例技术，说明如何与传统的高性能计算作业一起运行交互式和人工智能工作负载。它解释了如何对所有作业使用较短的最大运行时间和资源有限的高优先级 QOS，以允许快速交互式作业启动，而不影响传统 HPC 作业的系统容量。它包括有助于实施和技术的历史和文化背景。参考实现、技术和论文在术语上以 Slurm 为中心，但计算机调度概念和方法将转化为其他实现。本文最后对使这些技术有效的条件以及未来可能的工作领域进行了观察，以使它们得到更广泛的应用。

items.title: eCounter: Inline Per-IP Network Monitoring at Millisecond Resolution via eBPF.
items.abstract: Scientific data acquisition (SciDAQ) systems are shifting from archive-based workflows to streaming paradigms, where real-time, fine-grained network monitoring becomes essential. While P4-enabled devices offer per-packet in-band observability, they require specialized switches and routers. Host-side tools like Prometheus exporters lack sufficient temporal granularity. To bridge this gap, we present eCounter, a lightweight, hardware-agnostic, inline telemetry agent built on extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF). eCounter captures per-interface ingress and egress traffic, categorized by IP address and protocol, at millisecond to sub-millisecond resolution. In a 100 Gbps environment, it continuously exports up to 3,257 time-series bins per second with only 4% CPU utilization at a 35 KiB/s data rate. We evaluate eCounter across diverse NIC MTU settings, hook types, CPU architectures and operating systems, and observed negligible impact on concurrent high-throughput streaming applications. Complexity analysis confirms that it can be readily scaled to distributed SciDAQ deployments.
items.abstract_zh: 科学数据采集 (SciDAQ) 系统正在从基于存档的工作流程转向流范式，其中实时、细粒度的网络监控变得至关重要。虽然支持 P4 的设备提供每个数据包的带内可观测性，但它们需要专门的交换机和路由器。像 Prometheus 导出器这样的主机端工具缺乏足够的时间粒度。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 eCounter，这是一种轻量级、与硬件无关的内联遥测代理，基于扩展伯克利数据包过滤器 (eBPF) 构建。 eCounter 以毫秒到亚毫秒的分辨率捕获每个接口的入口和出口流量，按 IP 地址和协议分类。在 100 Gbps 环境中，它每秒连续导出多达 3,257 个时间序列 bin，在 35 KiB/s 数据速率下，CPU 利用率仅为 4%。我们评估了不同 NIC MTU 设置、挂钩类型、CPU 架构和操作系统的 eCounter，并观察到对并发高吞吐量流应用程序的影响可以忽略不计。 Complexity analysis confirms that it can be readily scaled to distributed SciDAQ deployments.

items.title: ILAN: The Interference- and Locality-Aware NUMA Scheduler.
items.abstract: Modern HPC platforms increasingly adopt NUMA architectures, where OpenMP task-based programming model is a standard for enabling dynamic parallelism. However, the default OpenMP runtime is topology-agnostic, and the existing affinity policies are insufficient to ensure optimal performance on modern NUMA architectures. This lack of topology awareness results in suboptimal data locality and performance degradation. Additionally, the current OpenMP standard lacks mechanisms for detecting and mitigating the interference between concurrently executing tasks, further exacerbating the performance degradation. To enhance the performance of OpenMP task-based applications on NUMA architectures, we propose the ILAN scheduler: an interference- and locality-aware scheduler, employing moldability to dynamically minimize interference combined with hierarchical scheduling for improved data locality. We implement ILAN as an extension of LLVM OpenMP runtime. The results on a 64-core AMD Zen 4 platform show that ILAN achieves an average speedup of 13.2%, and a maximum speedup of 45.8% compared to the default scheduler.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 HPC 平台越来越多地采用 NUMA 架构，其中 OpenMP 基于任务的编程模型是实现动态并行性的标准。然而，默认的 OpenMP 运行时与拓扑无关，现有的关联策略不足以确保现代 NUMA 架构上的最佳性能。缺乏拓扑意识会导致数据局部性不佳和性能下降。此外，当前的OpenMP标准缺乏检测和减轻并发执行任务之间干扰的机制，进一步加剧了性能下降。为了提高 NUMA 架构上 OpenMP 基于任务的应用程序的性能，我们提出了 ILAN 调度程序：一种干扰和局部感知调度程序，利用可塑性动态最小化干扰，并结合分层调度来改进数据局部性。我们将 ILAN 实现为 LLVM OpenMP 运行时的扩展。在64核AMD Zen 4平台上的结果显示，与默认调度器相比，ILAN平均加速13.2%，最大加速45.8%。

items.title: Energy-Aware HPC Scheduling with LLM-Based Power Prediction.
items.abstract: As the increasing energy consumption of High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems places greater strain on electric grid infrastructure, operational strategies for load balancing become critically important. Energy-aware scheduling offers a promising solution by enabling HPC systems to function as actively managed loads within the energy grid. Despite extensive theoretical research on this strategy, practical implementations and real-system evaluations remain scarce. To bridge this gap, we introduce a systematic approach to developing, evaluating, and implementing energy-aware scheduling without modifications to Slurm’s core scheduler. Our method includes a novel mechanism for per-job power prediction based on Large Language Model embeddings of enriched job scripts, coupled with a lightweight, deployable scheduling strategy. Our predictor reduces per-job power MAE by 15% compared to the current state-of-the-art, and our simulated scheduler shifts 4.0 MWh onto on-site solar without throughput loss. These results demonstrate a clear and practical pathway to production deployment of energy-aware scheduling in HPC.
items.abstract_zh: 随着高性能计算 (HPC) 系统能耗的增加给电网基础设施带来更大的压力，负载平衡的运营策略变得至关重要。能源感知调度提供了一种有前景的解决方案，使 HPC 系统能够充当能源网中主动管理的负载。尽管对该策略进行了广泛的理论研究，但实际实施和实际系统评估仍然很少。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一种系统方法来开发、评估和实施能源感知调度，而无需修改 Slurm 的核心调度程序。我们的方法包括一种基于丰富作业脚本的大型语言模型嵌入的每作业功率预测的新颖机制，再加上轻量级、可部署的调度策略。与当前最先进的技术相比，我们的预测器将每个作业的功率 MAE 降低了 15%，并且我们的模拟调度器将 4.0 MWh 转移到现场太阳能，而没有吞吐量损失。这些结果展示了 HPC 中能源感知调度的生产部署的清晰且实用的途径。

items.title: Integrating and Characterizing HPC Task Runtime Systems for hybrid AI-HPC workloads.
items.abstract: Scientific workflows increasingly involve both HPC and machine-learning tasks, combining MPI-based simulations, training, and inference in a single execution. Launchers such as Slurm’s srun constrain concurrency and throughput, making them unsuitable for dynamic and heterogeneous workloads. We present a performance study of RADICAL-Pilot (RP) integrated with Flux and Dragon, two complementary runtime systems that enable hierarchical resource management and high-throughput function execution. Using synthetic and production-scale workloads on Frontier, we characterize the task execution properties of RP across runtime configurations. RP+Flux sustains up to 930 tasks/s, and RP+Flux+Dragon exceeds 1,500 tasks/s with over 99.6% utilization. In contrast, srun peaks at 152 tasks/s and degrades with scale, with utilization below 50%. For IMPECCABLE.v2 drug discovery campaign, RP+Flux reduces makespan by 30–60% relative to srun/Slurm and increases throughput more than four times on up to 1,024. These results demonstrate hybrid runtime integration in RP as a scalable approach for hybrid AI-HPC workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 科学工作流程越来越多地涉及 HPC 和机器学习任务，在一次执行中结合基于 MPI 的模拟、训练和推理。 Slurm 的 srun 等启动器会限制并发性和吞吐量，使其不适合动态和异构工作负载。我们提出了与 Flux 和 Dragon 集成的 RADICAL-Pilot (RP) 的性能研究，这两个互补的运行时系统可实现分层资源管理和高吞吐量函数执行。使用 Frontier 上的合成和生产规模工作负载，我们描述了 RP 跨运行时配置的任务执行属性。 RP+Flux sustains up to 930 tasks/s, and RP+Flux+Dragon exceeds 1,500 tasks/s with over 99.6% utilization.相比之下，srun 的峰值为 152 个任务/秒，并随着规模的扩大而下降，利用率低于 50%。对于 IMPECCABLE.v2 药物发现活动，相对于 srun/Slurm，RP+Flux 将完工时间缩短了 30-60%，并将吞吐量提高了四倍以上，高达 1,024。这些结果证明 RP 中的混合运行时集成是混合 AI-HPC 工作负载的可扩展方法。

items.title: CAMEO: A Co-design Architecture for Multi-objective Energy System Optimization.
items.abstract: Complex energy system co-design optimization requires sophisticated computational workflows that can orchestrate multiple interdependent components, handle diverse optimization paradigms, and scale across high-performance computing environments. Traditional approaches often rely on specialized, monolithic solutions that limit reusability, modularity, and scalability when addressing heterogeneous co-design problems involving multiple scenarios and optimization formulations. We introduce CAMEO (Co-design Architecture for Multi-objective Energy System Optimization), a modular workflow management framework that abstracts co-design problems as dag with standardized input-output interfaces between computational stages. The framework employs JSON-based workflow specifications that enable systematic decomposition of complex optimization problems into reusable, interchangeable components including data loaders, scenario generators, optimization solvers, and result summarizers. CAMEO’s software architecture supports multiple optimization paradigms through containerized execution environments and seamlessly integrates with high-performance computing infrastructure via Nextflow’s workflow orchestration capabilities. The framework’s plug-and-play design enables dynamic reconfiguration of optimization approaches without modifying workflow logic, while standardized interfaces ensure compatibility across diverse computational components and execution environments. We demonstrate CAMEO’s versatility and scalability through three comprehensive use cases: power grid expansion planning for data center integration, optimal battery design for variable generation installations, and secondary distribution network generation for counties in Virginia, USA. These implementations showcase the framework’s ability to handle varying computational scales and optimization paradigms while maintaining workflow reproducibility and portability across different computing environments.
items.abstract_zh: 复杂的能源系统协同设计优化需要复杂的计算工作流程，可以协调多个相互依赖的组件，处理不同的优化范例，并在高性能计算环境中扩展。传统方法通常依赖于专门的整体解决方案，在解决涉及多个场景和优化公式的异构协同设计问题时，这些解决方案限制了可重用性、模块化和可扩展性。我们引入了 CAMEO（多目标能源系统优化协同设计架构），这是一种模块化工作流程管理框架，它将协同设计问题抽象为计算阶段之间具有标准化输入输出接口的 dag。该框架采用基于 JSON 的工作流规范，能够将复杂的优化问题系统地分解为可重用、可互换的组件，包括数据加载器、场景生成器、优化求解器和结果摘要器。 CAMEO 的软件架构通过容器化执行环境支持多种优化范例，并通过 Nextflow 的工作流程编排功能与高性能计算基础设施无缝集成。该框架的即插即用设计可以动态重新配置优化方法，而无需修改工作流逻辑，而标准化接口则确保了不同计算组件和执行环境之间的兼容性。我们通过三个综合用例展示了 CAMEO 的多功能性和可扩展性：数据中心集成的电网扩展规划、可变发电装置的优化电池设计以及美国弗吉尼亚州各县的二次配电网络发电。这些实现展示了该框架处理不同计算规模和优化范例的能力，同时保持跨不同计算环境的工作流可重复性和可移植性。

items.title: Physical System Study on Balancing Interactive and Batch Job Performance through Oversubscribing Scheduling.
items.abstract: This paper evaluates oversubscribing in High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems as a solution to balance interactive and batch job performance. Using real workload traces and physical hardware experiments, we demonstrate that oversubscribing can reduce queue waiting times while maintaining overall system performance. Our results show this approach (1) decreases waiting times for interactive jobs, (2) has minimal impact on overall system throughput, and (3) effectively manages individual job turnaround times. Unlike traditional multiple queue approaches, oversubscribing provides these benefits with simpler configuration requirements. Additionally, through quantitative memory usage analysis, we provide insights into oversubscribing applicability for production capacity planning. Our research contributes empirical evidence of its effectiveness in real HPC environments, supported by comprehensive experimental data and practical implementation insights.
items.abstract_zh: 本文评估了高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的超额订阅作为平衡交互式和批处理作业性能的解决方案。使用真实的工作负载跟踪和物理硬件实验，我们证明超额订阅可以减少队列等待时间，同时保持整体系统性能。我们的结果表明，这种方法 (1) 减少了交互式作业的等待时间，(2) 对整体系统吞吐量的影响最小，(3) 有效管理单个作业的周转时间。与传统的多队列方法不同，超额订阅可以通过更简单的配置要求提供这些好处。此外，通过定量内存使用分析，我们可以深入了解生产能力规划的超额订阅适用性。我们的研究提供了其在真实 HPC 环境中有效性的经验证据，并得到全面的实验数据和实际实施见解的支持。

items.title: Benchmarking the Cerebras Wafer Scale Engine-2 Architecture.
items.abstract: Cerebras CS-2 system, developed for training large-scale language models, is gathering attention to utilise it for scientific applications. The Cerebras CS-2 comes with the world’s largest chip, the wafer-scale engine 2 (WSE-2). The WSE-2 has new characteristics that distinguish it from other computers, such as a massive number of small processing elements, low-latency 2D mesh topology, and a unique distributed memory architecture. By understanding this unique architecture and optimising applications for it, scientific applications can be accelerated significantly. However, its sustained performance and characteristics have not yet been fully understood. In this study, we give a benchmark study focusing on WSE-2. The objective is to examine the various performance characteristics of WSE-2 in detail, including inter-PE communication. In this paper, benchmarks of the effective computational performance and memory bandwidth are conducted, the Byte/Flop value is calculated, and a roofline model for the WSE-2 is built. Additionally, the effective communication latency of two distinct PEs and the bi-section bandwidth are measured. Our results provide a deeper understanding of the WSE-2 architecture. These new findings will contribute to further optimisation of applications through improved computational performance. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first attempt to understand the fundamental performance of the WSE-2 architecture.
items.abstract_zh: Cerebras CS-2 系统是为训练大规模语言模型而开发的，将其用于科学应用正引起人们的关注。 Cerebras CS-2 配备了世界上最大的芯片，晶圆级引擎 2 (WSE-2)。 WSE-2 具有区别于其他计算机的新特征，例如大量小型处理元件、低延迟 2D 网格拓扑以及独特的分布式内存架构。通过了解这种独特的架构并优化其应用程序，可以显着加速科学应用程序。然而，其持续性能和特点尚未得到充分了解。在本研究中，我们针对 WSE-2 进行了基准研究。目的是详细检查 WSE-2 的各种性能特征，包括 PE 间通信。本文对有效计算性能和内存带宽进行了基准测试，计算了 Byte/Flop 值，并建立了 WSE-2 的屋顶线模型。此外，还测量了两个不同 PE 的有效通信延迟和二分带宽。我们的结果让我们更深入地了解 WSE-2 架构。这些新发现将有助于通过提高计算性能进一步优化应用程序。据我们所知，这项研究是了解 WSE-2 架构基本性能的首次尝试。

items.title: SENSE in Practice: Quantifying the End-to-End Benefits of Intent-Based Bandwidth Reservation for Exascale Science Workflows.
items.abstract: The escalating demands of scientific collaborations necessitate advanced networking for deterministic, secure, and orchestrated services across multiple administrative domains. The Software-Defined Network for End-to-end Networked Science at the Exascale (SENSE) paradigm addresses these needs through intent-based networking and multi-domain orchestration. This paper evaluates SENSE’s performance on a comprehensive multi-domain testbed, including GNA-G AutoGOLE, the National Research Platform (NRP), FABRIC, and production LHC CMS infrastructure. Our results demonstrate that intent-based service requests are successfully translated into network configurations, with average provisioning times of 183 seconds for simple services and 290 seconds for complex multi-domain workflows. Performance monitoring confirms that SENSE maintains guaranteed bandwidth allocations, enabling higher-priority data flows to complete significantly faster than in best-effort scenarios. This capability transforms the network into a first-class schedulable resource, optimizing scientific workflows by prioritizing data criticality and moving beyond best-effort limitations to achieve predictable and efficient data movement for data-intensive scientific endeavors.
items.abstract_zh: 科学合作的需求不断增长，需要先进的网络来跨多个管理域提供确定性、安全和协调的服务。用于百万兆级端到端网络科学的软件定义网络 (SENSE) 范式通过基于意图的网络和多域编排满足了这些需求。本文评估了 SENSE 在综合多领域测试平台上的性能，包括 GNA-G AutoGOLE、国家研究平台 (NRP)、FABRIC 和生产 LHC CMS 基础设施。我们的结果表明，基于意图的服务请求已成功转换为网络配置，简单服务的平均配置时间为 183 秒，复杂的多域工作流的平均配置时间为 290 秒。性能监控确认 SENSE 维持有保证的带宽分配，使更高优先级的数据流能够比尽力而为场景更快地完成。此功能将网络转变为一流的可调度资源，通过优先考虑数据关键性并超越尽力而为的限制来优化科学工作流程，为数据密集型科学工作实现可预测且高效的数据移动。

items.title: Scalable Hydrodynamics on multiple Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs).
items.abstract: This paper presents scalable 2D and 3D Hydrodynamics solver implementations on FPGAs using Intel’s oneAPI framework, addressing challenges in porting stencil-based computations from CPU/GPU architectures on FPGAs. FPGAs offer customizable hardware with on-chip memory that can be custom-tailored for High Performance Computing (HPC) applications. Despite a much lower throughput, FPGAs achieve comparable energy efficiency with domain decomposition compared to NVIDIA A100 GPU. Optimizations leverage FPGA’s large cache to minimize data streaming and ensure data reuse, reducing memory bandwidth. Domain decomposition enabled pipeline duplication for scalable single FPGA workload, but also the distribution of the work on two Agilex 7 cards. This work demonstrates FPGA viability for computationally intensive simulations, contributing to scalable algorithms for heterogeneous HPC systems and offering insights for exascale computing.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用英特尔 oneAPI 框架在 FPGA 上实现可扩展的 2D 和 3D 流体动力学求解器，解决了从 FPGA 上的 CPU/GPU 架构移植基于模板的计算的挑战。 FPGA 提供带有片上存储器的可定制硬件，可针对高性能计算 (HPC) 应用进行定制。尽管吞吐量低得多，但与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，FPGA 通过域分解实现了相当的能源效率。优化利用 FPGA 的大缓存来最大限度地减少数据流并确保数据重用，从而减少内存带宽。域分解不仅可以实现可扩展的单个 FPGA 工作负载的管道复制，还可以将工作分配到两个 Agilex 7 卡上。这项工作展示了 FPGA 在计算密集型仿真中的可行性，为异构 HPC 系统的可扩展算法做出了贡献，并为百亿亿次计算提供了见解。

items.title: Open Composer: A Web-Based Application for Generating and Managing Batch Jobs on HPC Clusters.
items.abstract: Submitting batch jobs on HPC clusters usually requires familiarity with Linux commands and job schedulers, posing a significant learning barrier for beginners. To address this issue, we have developed Open Composer, a web-based application that helps users generate and manage batch jobs on HPC clusters. Open Composer automatically generates shell scripts using web forms defined for each application while also providing a real-time preview of the generated shell scripts and allowing direct editing. This feature helps reduce both the learning curve and the risk of syntax errors while maintaining flexibility in script writing. Open Composer provides a unified interface for job submission and status monitoring, and supports reusable job parameters, dynamic form widgets, and preprocessing steps. By enhancing usability and accessibility, Open Composer aims to make HPC resources more approachable for both novice and experienced users. Built on top of Open OnDemand[3], a widely adopted web portal framework for HPC environments, Open Composer ensures portability across various HPC clusters and seamless integration with institutional infrastructure, including authentication mechanisms.
items.abstract_zh: 在 HPC 集群上提交批处理作业通常需要熟悉 Linux 命令和作业调度程序，这对初学者来说是一个很大的学习障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 Open Composer，这是一个基于 Web 的应用程序，可以帮助用户在 HPC 集群上生成和管理批处理作业。 Open Composer 使用为每个应用程序定义的 Web 表单自动生成 shell 脚本，同时还提供生成的 shell 脚本的实时预览并允许直接编辑。此功能有助于减少学习曲线和语法错误的风险，同时保持脚本编写的灵活性。 Open Composer 为作业提交和状态监控提供统一的界面，并支持可重用的作业参数、动态表单小部件和预处理步骤。通过增强可用性和可访问性，Open Composer 旨在使新手和经验丰富的用户都更容易使用 HPC 资源。 Open Composer 建立在 Open OnDemand[3]（一种广泛采用的 HPC 环境 Web 门户框架）之上，可确保跨各种 HPC 集群的可移植性以及与机构基础设施（包括身份验证机制）的无缝集成。

items.title: Extending THAPI with CXI Hardware Counter Sampling for High Resolution NIC Telemetry.
items.abstract: High performance computing (HPC) applications are sensitive to network variability, yet existing tracing tools lack insight into low level network behavior. Modern network interface controllers (NICs), such as HPE’s Slingshot-11 Cassini, provide detailed hardware counters that can reveal conditions like congestion and retries, but remain underused due to limited integration with tracing frameworks. We extend the THAPI framework with a sampling plugin for Cassini’s CXI interface, periodically collecting NIC counters and integrating them into HPC trace timelines via the iprof tool. Data is visualized in Perfetto, enabling correlation between network telemetry and application events. Our approach imposes negligible overhead at typical sampling rates and exposes previously hidden performance factors, such as congestion delays and load imbalances. Case studies on point-to-point and collective patterns demonstrate new diagnostic capabilities. Contributions include the plugin’s design, integration into a state-of-the-art tracing toolchain, and evaluation highlighting opportunities for improved HPC communication performance.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序对网络变化很敏感，但现有的跟踪工具缺乏对低级网络行为的洞察。现代网络接口控制器 (NIC)，例如 HPE 的 Slingshot-11 Cassini，提供详细的硬件计数器，可以揭示拥塞和重试等情况，但由于与跟踪框架的集成有限，仍未得到充分利用。我们使用 Cassini CXI 接口的采样插件扩展了 THAPI 框架，定期收集 NIC 计数器并通过 iprof 工具将它们集成到 HPC 跟踪时间线中。数据在 Perfetto 中可视化，从而实现网络遥测和应用程序事件之间的关联。我们的方法在典型采样率下施加的开销可以忽略不计，并暴露了以前隐藏的性能因素，例如拥塞延迟和负载不平衡。点对点和集体模式的案例研究展示了新的诊断能力。贡献包括插件的设计、集成到最先进的跟踪工具链以及突出显示提高 HPC 通信性能的机会的评估。

items.title: Exploring Distributed Vector Databases Performance on HPC Platforms: A Study with Qdrant.
items.abstract: Vector databases have rapidly grown in popularity, enabling efficient similarity search over data such as text, images, and video. They now play a central role in modern AI workflows, aiding large language models by grounding model outputs in external literature through retrieval-augmented generation. Despite their importance, little is known about the performance characteristics of vector databases in high-performance computing (HPC) systems that drive large-scale science. This work presents an empirical study of distributed vector database performance on the Polaris supercomputer in the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility. We construct a realistic biological-text workload from BV-BRC and generate embeddings from the peS2o corpus using Qwen3-Embedding-4B. We select Qdrant to evaluate insertion, index construction, and query latency with up to 32 workers. Informed by practical lessons from our experience, this work takes a first step toward characterizing vector database performance on HPC platforms to guide future research and optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 矢量数据库迅速普及，支持对文本、图像和视频等数据进行高效的相似性搜索。它们现在在现代人工智能工作流程中发挥着核心作用，通过检索增强生成将模型输出扎根于外部文献中，从而帮助大型语言模型。尽管矢量数据库很重要，但人们对驱动大规模科学的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的性能特征知之甚少。这项工作对阿贡领导计算设施中的北极星超级计算机上的分布式矢量数据库性能进行了实证研究。我们从 BV-BRC 构建了一个真实的生物文本工作负载，并使用 Qwen3-Embedding-4B 从 peS2o 语料库生成嵌入。我们选择 Qdrant 来评估最多 32 个工作线程的插入、索引构建和查询延迟。根据我们的实际经验教训，这项工作朝着表征 HPC 平台上的矢量数据库性能以指导未来的研究和优化迈出了第一步。

items.title: Hybrid GPU Programming Education with Python and C++: Preferences, Performance and Common Python Pitfalls.
items.abstract: We present a hybrid GPU programming curriculum that allows students to choose between Python (Numba) and C++ (CUDA), supporting language flexibility in a distance-learning context. The dual-language design aims to engage both students familiar scripting languages like Python and those experienced compiled languages like C/C++. The course was evaluated with 19 computer science students at Bachelor’s and Master’s levels. A pre-course survey assessed prior knowledge in programming and related tools. Students generally preferred the language they were more familiar with, and performance correlated with this prior experience. Although C/C++ users achieved slightly higher scores, regression analysis indicates that differences were largely due to prior knowledge, not language choice. Finally, we analyzes Python-specific pitfalls, including boundary errors, type mismatches in shared memory, and inefficient data transfers. These subtle issues often led to correctness or performance problems. We conclude with teaching recommendations to support pythonic GPU learning and help students avoid common mistakes.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提供混合 GPU 编程课程，允许学生在 Python (Numba) 和 C++ (CUDA) 之间进行选择，支持远程学习环境中的语言灵活性。双语言设计旨在吸引学生熟悉的脚本语言（如Python）和经验丰富的编译语言（如C/C++）。该课程由 19 名计算机科学学士和硕士学生进行了评估。课程前调查评估了编程和相关工具的先验知识。学生通常更喜欢他们更熟悉的语言，并且表现与之前的经历相关。尽管 C/C++ 用户得分稍高，但回归分析表明差异主要是由于先验知识而不是语言选择造成的。最后，我们分析了 Python 特有的陷阱，包括边界错误、共享内存中的类型不匹配以及低效的数据传输。这些微妙的问题通常会导致正确性或性能问题。最后，我们提出了支持 Pythonic GPU 学习并帮助学生避免常见错误的教学建议。

items.title: Towards Efficient Load Balancing BFS on GPUs: One Code for AMD, Intel & Nvidia.
items.abstract: Efficient graph processing is essential for a wide range of applications. Scalability and memory access patterns are still a challenge, especially with the Breadth-First Search algorithm. This work focuses on leveraging HPC systems with multiple GPUs available in a single node with peer-to-peer functionality of the Intel oneAPI implementation of SYCL. We propose three GPU-based load-balancing methods: work-group localisation for efficient data access, even workload distribution for higher GPU occupancy, and a hybrid strided-access approach for heuristic balancing. These methods ensure performance, portability, and productivity with a unified codebase. Our proposed methodologies outperform state-of-the-art single-GPU implementations based on CUDA on synthetic RMAT graphs. We analysed BFS performance across NVIDIA A100, Intel Max 1550, and AMD MI300X GPUs, achieving a peak performance of 153.27 GTEPS on an RMAT25-64 graph using 8 GPUs on the NVIDIA A100. Furthermore, our work demonstrates the capability to handle RMAT graphs up to scale 29, achieving superior performance on synthetic graphs and competitive results on real-world datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 高效的图形处理对于广泛的应用至关重要。可扩展性和内存访问模式仍然是一个挑战，特别是对于广度优先搜索算法。这项工作的重点是利用单个节点中具有多个 GPU 的 HPC 系统，以及 SYCL 的 Intel oneAPI 实现的对等功能。我们提出了三种基于 GPU 的负载平衡方法：用于高效数据访问的工作组本地化、用于更高 GPU 占用的均匀工作负载分配以及用于启发式平衡的混合跨步访问方法。这些方法通过统一的代码库确保性能、可移植性和生产力。我们提出的方法在合成 RMAT 图上优于基于 CUDA 的最先进的单 GPU 实现。我们分析了 NVIDIA A100、Intel Max 1550 和 AMD MI300X GPU 的 BFS 性能，在 NVIDIA A100 上使用 8 个 GPU 在 RMAT25-64 图上实现了 153.27 GTEPS 的峰值性能。此外，我们的工作展示了处理高达 29 尺度的 RMAT 图的能力，在合成图上实现了卓越的性能，并在现实数据集上实现了具有竞争力的结果。

items.title: Extending MPI Correctness Benchmarking to the Fortran Language.
items.abstract: MPI correctness benchmarks evaluate the implementation quality of MPI correctness tools on a standardized set of tests. However, existing correctness benchmarks are limited to C, neglecting support for Fortran, the only other language that the MPI standard supports. Consequently, past evaluations of correctness tools focused solely on C, although some support error-checking of Fortran MPI codes. To alleviate this, we port the test generation logic of the most recently introduced MPI correctness benchmark, MPI-BugBench, to Fortran. We explore language-specific porting challenges and perform a comparative accuracy evaluation of the dynamic MPI correctness tool MUST on both C and Fortran. Our results show that MUST’s accuracy is largely consistent across languages, with a notable exception in type checking due to a required software dependency not supporting Fortran. Additionally, we uncovered bugs in both the OpenMPI Fortran bindings, and the MPI-BugBench test case generator.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 正确性基准评估 MPI 正确性工具在一组标准化测试上的实施质量。然而，现有的正确性基准仅限于 C，忽略了对 Fortran（MPI 标准支持的唯一其他语言）的支持。因此，过去对正确性工具的评估仅集中于 C，尽管有些工具支持 Fortran MPI 代码的错误检查。为了缓解这个问题，我们将最近引入的 MPI 正确性基准 MPI-BugBench 的测试生成逻辑移植到 Fortran。我们探索特定于语言的移植挑战，并对 C 和 Fortran 上的动态 MPI 正确性工具必须进行比较准确度评估。我们的结果表明，MUST 的准确性在不同语言中基本一致，但由于所需的软件依赖项不支持 Fortran，因此类型检查存在明显的例外。此外，我们还发现了 OpenMPI Fortran 绑定和 MPI-BugBench 测试用例生成器中的错误。

items.title: Coupling Static and Dynamic MPI Correctness Tools to Optimize Accuracy and Overhead.
items.abstract: The complexity of MPI programming led to the development of various correctness tools. Static tools may examine the entire source but yield false positives as they lack runtime context. Dynamic tools, detecting errors at runtime, offer higher precision but suffer from false negatives due to limited coverage and substantial overhead due to instrumentation requirements. This paper presents a coupled workflow that combines these approaches. Forwarding static tool reports to dynamic tools improves the overall accuracy and reduces the instrumentation overhead. A proposed generic exchange format enables interoperability between static and dynamic tools. The coupled workflow is tested through the integration of the tools CoVer, SPMD IR, and MUST for detecting MPI local data races. It eliminates static tool false positives, enables detection of previously missed races in dynamic tools, and reduces the runtime overhead through selective instrumentation up to an order of magnitude.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 编程的复杂性导致了各种正确性工具的开发。静态工具可能会检查整个源代码，但会产生误报，因为它们缺乏运行时上下文。在运行时检测错误的动态工具可以提供更高的精度，但由于覆盖范围有限以及仪器要求带来的大量开销，因此会出现误报。本文提出了一个结合了这些方法的耦合工作流程。将静态工具报告转发到动态工具可以提高整体准确性并减少仪器开销。所提出的通用交换格式可以实现静态和动态工具之间的互操作性。通过集成 CoVer、SPMD IR 和 MUST 工具来测试耦合工作流程，以检测 MPI 本地数据竞争。它消除了静态工具误报，能够检测动态工具中之前错过的比赛，并通过选择性检测将运行时开销降低到一个数量级。

items.title: Scabbard: LLVM Instrumentation-aided Race Checking in CPU/GPU Unified Memory for AMD GPUs.
items.abstract: Data Races are serious bugs whose occurrence in shared memory parallel and concurrent systems can cause unexpected non-deterministic outcomes and undermine the integrity of computational results. CPU/GPU systems that use Unified Heterogeneous Memory—for simplified memory sharing between GPUs and CPUs—are highly prone to data races. Unfortunately, none of the available data-race checkers are capable of detecting such data races. In this paper, we present Scabbard [18], the first tool that detects such races. Scabbard’s design is based on instrumenting the CPU and GPU codes by linking into LLVM’s compilation tool-chain as a pass plugin, to instrument the user’s code to to record writes, reads and synchronizations into trace files during execution, then subsequently performing offline trace analysis to report races. The main contribution of this paper is in detailing our algorithms and implementation challenges faced by us—newcomers to the LLVM’s and AMD’s ROCm/Hip ecosystems—that can help better the learning experience for future tool-builders who aim to use, improve and contribute to LLVM for the betterment of the GPU/CPU space.
items.abstract_zh: 数据争用是严重的错误，其在共享内存并行和并发系统中发生可能会导致意外的非确定性结果并破坏计算结果的完整性。 CPU/GPU systems that use Unified Heterogeneous Memory—for simplified memory sharing between GPUs and CPUs—are highly prone to data races. Unfortunately, none of the available data-race checkers are capable of detecting such data races. In this paper, we present Scabbard [18], the first tool that detects such races. Scabbard 的设计基于通过作为 pass 插件链接到 LLVM 的编译工具链来检测 CPU 和 GPU 代码，以检测用户的代码以在执行期间将写入、读取和同步记录到跟踪文件中，然后执行离线跟踪分析以报告竞争。本文的主要贡献在于详细介绍了我们（LLVM 和 AMD ROCm/Hip 生态系统的新手）所面临的算法和实现挑战，这可以帮助未来旨在使用、改进 LLV​​M 并为改善 GPU/CPU 空间做出贡献的工具构建者提供更好的学习体验。

items.title: Implications of Full-System Modeling for Superconducting Architectures.
items.abstract: As Moore’s Law slows, superconducting electronics offer ultra-low-power, high-speed computation potential. This paper presents the first full-system superconducting architecture modeling in gem5, evaluating superconducting cores, caches, and interconnects under realistic workloads. We extend gem5 with cryogenic semiconductor (4 GHz) and superconducting (100 GHz) RISC-V cores and multi-level caches, evaluating RISC-V benchmarks and SPEC CPU2006 applications. We also integrate SRNoC, a superconducting interconnect, with the NOVA graph accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: As Moore’s Law slows, superconducting electronics offer ultra-low-power, high-speed computation potential.本文提出了 gem5 中的第一个全系统超导架构建模，评估了实际工作负载下的超导核心、缓存和互连。我们使用低温半导体 (4 GHz) 和超导 (100 GHz) RISC-V 内核和多级缓存扩展 gem5，评估 RISC-V 基准测试和 SPEC CPU2006 应用程序。 We also integrate SRNoC, a superconducting interconnect, with the NOVA graph accelerator.

items.title: ASCRIBE-XR: Extended Reality for Visualization of Scientific Images.
items.abstract: We introduce ASCRIBE-XR, an immersive software application designed to accelerate the visualization and exploration of 3D dense arrays and mesh files from scientific experiments. Based on Godot and PC-VR technologies, the platform enables users to dynamically load and manipulate scientific records to dive into the structure of data. The novelty lies in the unique integration at the system level, combining disparate technologies, such as VR, HPC, and AI-driven object modeling for scientific visualization. Its integration with HPC resources grants remote processing of large-scale data with results streamed directly into the VR environment. The program’s multi-user capabilities, enabled through WebRTC and MQTT, allow multiple users to share data and visualize together in real-time, promoting a more interactive and engaging research experience. We describe the design and implementation of ASCRIBE-XR, highlighting its key features and capabilities. We also include examples of its application and discuss the potential benefits to the scientific community.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ASCRIBE-XR，这是一款沉浸式软件应用程序，旨在加速科学实验中 3D 密集阵列和网格文件的可视化和探索。该平台基于Godot和PC-VR技术，使用户能够动态加载和操作科学记录以深入了解数据结构。新颖之处在于系统级别的独特集成，结合了不同的技术，例如 VR、HPC 和用于科学可视化的人工智能驱动的对象建模。它与 HPC 资源的集成可以远程处理大规模数据，并将结果直接传输到 VR 环境中。该程序的多用户功能通过 WebRTC 和 MQTT 实现，允许多个用户实时共享数据和可视化，从而促进更具互动性和吸引力的研究体验。我们描述了 ASCRIBE-XR 的设计和实现，重点介绍了其主要特性和功能。我们还提供了其应用示例，并讨论了它对科学界的潜在好处。

items.title: DoCeph: DPU-Offloaded Messaging in Ceph for Reduced Host CPU Utilization.
items.abstract: Ceph is a widely used distributed object store, but its messenger layer imposes substantial CPU overhead on the host. To address this limitation, we propose DoCeph, a DPU-offloaded storage architecture for Ceph that disaggregates the system by offloading the communication-intensive messaging component to the DPU while retaining the storage backend on the host. The DPU efficiently manages communication, using lightweight RPC for metadata operations and DMA for data transfer. Moreover, DoCeph introduces a pipelining technique that overlaps data transmission with buffer preparation, mitigating hardware-imposed transfer size limitations. We implemented DoCeph on a Ceph cluster with NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPUs. Evaluation results indicate that DoCeph cuts host CPU usage by up to 92% while sustaining stable throughput and providing larger performance benefits for object writes over 1 MB.
items.abstract_zh: Ceph 是一种广泛使用的分布式对象存储，但它的信使层给主机带来了大量的 CPU 开销。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了 DoCeph，这是一种用于 Ceph 的 DPU 卸载存储架构，它通过将通信密集型消息传递组件卸载到 DPU 来分解系统，同时保留主机上的存储后端。 DPU 有效地管理通信，使用轻量级 RPC 进行元数据操作，使用 DMA 进行数据传输。此外，DoCeph 引入了一种管道技术，该技术将数据传输与缓冲区准备重叠，从而减轻了硬件施加的传输大小限制。我们在具有 NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPU 的 Ceph 集群上实现了 DoCeph。评估结果表明，DoCeph 将主机 CPU 使用率降低高达 92%，同时保持稳定的吞吐量，并为超过 1 MB 的对象写入提供更大的性能优势。

items.title: An Interactive Agentic HPC Tutor for Lesson Planning, Teaching, and Assessment.
items.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) education is at an inflection point, driven by agentic systems and “prompt-engineering” as a form of programming. We describe an interactive tutor built from autonomous LLM-based agents, each with a narrow role: planning lessons, explaining concepts, scaffolding code, and executing runs. Using open-source toolkits and locally hosted models on leadership-class supercomputers, the tutor lets educators generate and refine parallel-programming examples in real time without external APIs or subscription fees. Complex workflows are composed through structured prompts rather than traditional source code, while per-agent history summarization prevents context-window overflow and enables self-correcting code generation. Requiring no proprietary services, the platform is immediately deployable in institutional HPC environments and scales from single-user sessions to classroom labs. Beyond a teaching aid, it illustrates how prompt-driven, multi-agent software can deliver dynamic, personalized, and extensible learning experiences across technical domains.
items.abstract_zh: 在代理系统和作为一种编程形式的“即时工程”的推动下，高性能计算 (HPC) 教育正处于拐点。我们描述了一个由基于 LLM 的自主代理构建的交互式导师，每个代理都有一个狭窄的角色：规划课程、解释概念、搭建代码和执行运行。该导师使用开源工具包和领先级超级计算机上的本地托管模型，让教育工作者可以实时生成和完善并行编程示例，而无需外部 API 或订阅费。复杂的工作流程是通过结构化提示而不是传统的源代码组成的，而每个代理的历史摘要可以防止上下文窗口溢出并实现自我更正代码生成。该平台无需专有服务，可立即部署在机构 HPC 环境中，并可从单用户会话扩展到课堂实验室。除了教学辅助工具之外，它还说明了提示驱动的多代理软件如何跨技术领域提供动态、个性化和可扩展的学习体验。

items.title: Reproducible Performance Evaluation of OpenMP and SYCL Workloads under Noise Injection.
items.abstract: Performance instability caused by unpredictable system noise remains a persistent challenge in high-performance and parallel computing. This work presents a reproducible methodology to characterize this variability through noise injection, tested using workloads implemented in OpenMP and SYCL to compare their performance resilience under noisy conditions. We design a noise injector that captures real system traces and replays the deltas as controlled noises. Using this approach, we evaluate multiple mitigation efforts, that is, thread pinning, housekeeping core isolation, and simultaneous multithreading (SMT) toggling, under both default and noise-injected executions. Experiments with two benchmarks (N-body, Babelstream) and one mini-application (MiniFE) across two processor platforms show that while OpenMP consistently achieves higher raw performance, SYCL tends to exhibit greater resilience in noisy environments. Mitigation effectiveness varies with workload characteristics, system configuration, and noise intensity, with housekeeping core isolation offering the clearest benefits, particularly in high-noise scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 由不可预测的系统噪声引起的性能不稳定仍然是高性能和并行计算中持续存在的挑战。这项工作提出了一种可重现的方法，通过噪声注入来表征这种可变性，并使用 OpenMP 和 SYCL 中实现的工作负载进行测试，以比较它们在噪声条件下的性能弹性。我们设计了一个噪声注入器，可以捕获真实的系统轨迹并将增量重放为受控噪声。使用这种方法，我们在默认执行和噪声注入执行下评估多种缓解措施，即线程固定、内务核心隔离和同时多线程 (SMT) 切换。跨两个处理器平台的两个基准测试（N-body、Babelstream）和一个迷你应用程序 (MiniFE) 的实验表明，虽然 OpenMP 始终如一地实现更高的原始性能，但 SYCL 往往在嘈杂的环境中表现出更大的弹性。缓解效果因工作负载特征、系统配置和噪声强度而异，而内务核心隔离可提供最明显的好处，特别是在高噪声场景中。

items.title: Efficient Embedding Initialization via Dominant Eigenvector Projections.
items.abstract: The embedding layer is essential in deep learning, transforming high-dimensional data into compact representations. However, growing datasets and model sizes pose challenges in training time, memory, and generalization. We propose a scalable method for embedding initialization via spectral dimensionality reduction using dominant eigenvector projections.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入层在深度学习中至关重要，它将高维数据转换为紧凑的表示。然而，不断增长的数据集和模型大小给训练时间、内存和泛化带来了挑战。我们提出了一种可扩展的方法，通过使用主特征向量投影的谱维数降低来嵌入初始化。

items.title: From Exploration to Explanation: ML-Driven Causal Discovery for Datacenter Reliability at Scale.
items.abstract: Modern datacenters operate at unprecedented scale, supporting HPC and AI workloads while consuming hundreds of megawatts of power. Their reliability is challenged by complex interdependencies across cooling, power, and network subsystems, where failures can cascade into downtime and degraded performance. Existing monitoring approaches, largely threshold or only correlation-based, struggle to isolate root causes within high-dimensional, evolving telemetry. We present PACE (Pattern and Causal Exploration), an ML-based framework that combines unsupervised correlation clustering with supervised, lag-aware Granger causality to uncover subsystem structure and directed causal pathways from multivariate telemetry. PACE yields interpretable causal graphs, subsystem heatmaps, that align with physical processes and control logic, providing actionable insights for operations. Finally, we discuss how embedding PACE into digital twin architectures enables causal-informed what-if reasoning, advancing the reliability and efficiency in datacenters.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心以前所未有的规模运行，支持 HPC 和 AI 工作负载，同时消耗数百兆瓦的电力。它们的可靠性受到冷却、电源和网络子系统之间复杂的相互依赖性的挑战，其中故障可能会导致停机和性能下降。现有的监控方法（主要是基于阈值或仅基于相关性）很难在高维、不断发展的遥测中隔离根本原因。我们提出了 PACE（模式和因果探索），这是一个基于机器学习的框架，它将无监督相关聚类与有监督、滞后感知的格兰杰因果关系相结合，以揭示子系统结构和来自多元遥测的定向因果路径。 PACE 生成可解释的因果图、子系统热图，与物理过程和控制逻辑保持一致，为操作提供可操作的见解。最后，我们讨论如何将 PACE 嵌入到数字孪生架构中，从而实现基于因果关系的假设推理，从而提高数据中心的可靠性和效率。

items.title: From Path-Aware to Application-Aware Source Routing using Traffic Classes.
items.abstract: As one of the most complex challenges in networking, traffic engineering (TE) involves difficult decisions on how to do capacity planning, allocate flows, or even split traffic among multiple paths, in order to minimize congestion. Where creating an optimized solution is cumbersome and difficult, researchers have turned to AI/ML techniques to enable the network to learn based on traffic characteristics and network patterns, making optimal decisions. SDN-based TE tools, such as Teal, Hecate, and B4, among others, have utilized classification or deep reinforcement learning to identify optimal TE solutions. The additional advent of source routing tools, such as PolKA, has introduced the capability for finer-grained control of flows. In this paper, we explore the concept of traffic classification at the edge, enabling source routing to perform flow allocation based on incoming flow requests. We develop new traffic class patterns and queuing methods to ensure fair queuing allocation, thereby satisfying all traffic classes and achieving an optimized network utilization and allocation scheme. This work contributes to in-band network telemetry (INT) and P4 programmability, demonstrating how source routing can enable finer-grained decision-making for self-engineering networks.
items.abstract_zh: 作为网络中最复杂的挑战之一，流量工程 (TE) 涉及如何进行容量规划、分配流量，甚至在多条路径之间分割流量以最大限度地减少拥塞等方面的艰难决策。在创建优化解决方案既麻烦又困难的情况下，研究人员转向人工智能/机器学习技术，使网络能够根据流量特征和网络模式进行学习，从而做出最佳决策。基于 SDN 的 TE 工具（例如 Teal、Hecate 和 B4 等）已利用分类或深度强化学习来识别最佳 TE 解决方案。 PolKA 等源路由工具的出现引入了更细粒度的流量控制功能。在本文中，我们探讨了边缘流量分类的概念，使源路由能够根据传入流请求执行流分配。我们开发新的流量类别模式和排队方法，以确保公平的排队分配，从而满足所有流量类别并实现优化的网络利用率和分配方案。这项工作有助于带内网络遥测 (INT) 和 P4 可编程性，展示源路由如何为自工程网络实现更细粒度的决策。

items.title: Benchmarking Cutting-Edge Scientific Error-Bounded Lossy Compressors on Correlation-Based Rate-Distortion.
items.abstract: Scientific error-bounded lossy compressors are widely used to reduce storage and I/O costs in large-scale scientific computing tasks. As various designs and frameworks of scientific error-bounded lossy compressors exist, it is critical to benchmark those compressors to help data users better understand their performances. Nevertheless, when evaluating the decompressed data quality, existing benchmarks mainly focus on error-value-based data quality metrics such as PSNR, while correlational metrics such as SSIM, Error Autocorrelation, and the Pearson Coefficients are also important metrics evaluating the quality of the compressors. In this work, we benchmark seven compressors on six representative scientific datasets, evaluating diverse data quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM (2 different configurations), Error Autocorrelation, and Pearson Coefficient. Our results show that each existing compressor exhibits diverged performances over different metrics, and no single compressor can be advantageous on all metrics in one dataset or across all datasets in one metric. Comparing the performances of compressors on different quality metrics, we deliver some important takeaways and suggestions on how to select scientific error-bounded lossy compressors based on user requirements for data quality.
items.abstract_zh: 科学误差有限有损压缩器广泛用于降低大规模科学计算任务中的存储和 I/O 成本。由于存在科学误差有限有损压缩器的各种设计和框架，因此对这些压缩器进行基准测试以帮助数据用户更好地了解其性能至关重要。然而，在评估解压缩数据质量时，现有基准主要关注基于误差值的数据质量指标，例如PSNR，而SSIM、误差自相关和皮尔逊系数等相关指标也是评估压缩器质量的重要指标。在这项工作中，我们在六个代表性科学数据集上对七个压缩器进行了基准测试，评估了不同的数据质量指标，例如 PSNR、SSIM（2 种不同的配置）、误差自相关和皮尔逊系数。我们的结果表明，每个现有的压缩器在不同的指标上表现出不同的性能，并且没有任何一个压缩器可以在一个数据集中的所有指标或一个指标中的所有数据集上都具有优势。通过比较压缩器在不同质量指标上的性能，我们就如何根据用户对数据质量的要求选择科学的误差有限有损压缩器提供了一些重要的结论和建议。

items.title: Towards an Automated Workflow for Floating-Point Analysis of GPU Kernels.
items.abstract: We present early work towards establishing an automated workflow for floating-point error analysis of SYCL kernels. The method leverages the Intercept Layer for OpenCL Applica- tions to record the execution of GPU-targeted SYCL kernels and replay them with CPU runtimes, enabling detailed floating-point error evaluation without modifying the original application. We analyze the force kernel from a large-scale cosmology application code (HACC) using PoCL and Verificarlo, exploring both IEEE-compliant configurations and reduced-precision modes (e.g.,, FP16, TF32, BF16), as well as the effects of the -ffast-math compiler optimization using stochastic arithmetic via MCA and PRISM. By leveraging open tools and standards, this work contributes a reusable path toward broader adoption of floating-point accuracy evaluation in HPC.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了建立 SYCL 内核浮点误差分析自动化工作流程的早期工作。该方法利用 OpenCL 应用程序的拦截层来记录 GPU 目标 SYCL 内核的执行情况，并使用 CPU 运行时重放它们，从而无需修改原始应用程序即可进行详细的浮点错误评估。我们使用 PoCL 和 Verificarlo 分析来自大规模宇宙学应用代码 (HACC) 的力核，探索 IEEE 兼容配置和降低精度模式（例如 FP16、TF32、BF16），以及通过 MCA 和 PRISM 使用随机算术的 -ffast-math 编译器优化的效果。通过利用开放工具和标准，这项工作为在 HPC 中更广泛地采用浮点精度评估提供了一条可重用的途径。

items.title: Preserving CUDA Syntax for SYCL Portability: A Thin C++ Abstraction without Kernel Migration.
items.abstract: Preparing large-scale scientific applications for diverse GPU architectures requires strategies that balance performance, portability, and long-term maintainability. We introduce a unified kernel abstraction and evaluate it using CRK-HACC, a production N-body cosmology code, enabling single-source compilation through both CUDA and SYCL toolchains. Our approach introduces a thin C++ layer that preserves the original CUDA kernel syntax and launch style while providing SYCL compatibility through a mechanical “functorization” process. This method avoids the complexity of automated source translation, retains architecture-specific optimizations, and reduces maintenance effort by eliminating code duplication. We evaluate the implementation on two DOE leadership systems—Polaris (NVIDIA GPUs) and Aurora (Intel GPUs)—comparing kernel-level execution times across backends and architectures. Results show competitive performance for SYCL relative to native CUDA while preserving code clarity and portability. This case study demonstrates a practical path toward sustaining performance in complex, physics-rich codes as HPC hardware continues to evolve.
items.abstract_zh: 为不同的 GPU 架构准备大规模科学应用程序需要平衡性能、可移植性和长期可维护性的策略。我们引入了统一的内核抽象，并使用 CRK-HACC（一种生产 N 体宇宙学代码）对其进行评估，从而通过 CUDA 和 SYCL 工具链实现单源编译。我们的方法引入了一个薄的 C++ 层，该层保留了原始 CUDA 内核语法和启动样式，同时通过机械“函子化”过程提供 SYCL 兼容性。此方法避免了自动源转换的复杂性，保留了特定于体系结构的优化，并通过消除代码重复来减少维护工作。我们评估了两个 DOE 领导系统（Polaris（NVIDIA GPU）和 Aurora（Intel GPU））上的实施情况，比较了后端和架构之间的内核级执行时间。结果显示 SYCL 相对于本机 CUDA 具有竞争性能，同时保持代码清晰度和可移植性。本案例研究展示了随着 HPC 硬件不断发展，在复杂、物理丰富的代码中维持性能的实用途径。

items.title: Modeling the Carbon Footprint of HPC: The Top 500 and EasyC.
items.abstract: Climate change is a critical concern for HPC systems, but GHG protocol carbon-emission accounting methodologies are difficult for a single system, and effectively infeasible for a collection of systems. As a result, there is no HPC-wide carbon reporting, and even the largest HPC sites do not do GHG protocol reporting.
items.abstract_zh: 气候变化是 HPC 系统的一个关键问题，但温室气体协议碳排放核算方法对于单个系统来说很困难，并且对于系统集合来说实际上是不可行的。因此，没有 HPC 范围内的碳报告，甚至最大的 HPC 站点也不进行温室气体协议报告。

items.title: On the Performance and Scalability of Cloud Supercomputers: Insights from Eagle and Reindeer.
items.abstract: The launch of Eagle, Azure’s hyper-scale supercomputer and the Number 3 system on the TOP500 list in November 2023, demonstrated the increasing role of cloud platforms in high-performance computing. Cloud providers employ a diverse set of deployment strategies in their system design and planning, ranging from hyper-scale, single-location supercomputers to widely replicated, smaller-scale systems.
items.abstract_zh: Azure 超大规模超级计算机 Eagle 的推出以及 2023 年 11 月在 TOP500 榜单上排名第三的系统，证明了云平台在高性能计算中的作用日益增强。云提供商在其系统设计和规划中采用了多种部署策略，从超大规模、单位置超级计算机到广泛复制的小型系统。

items.title: Dori: User Centered HPC for Data Intensive Computing.
items.abstract: Dori has been the Joint Genome Institute’s (JGI) primary high-performance-computing cluster since 2022. It has been serving a wide array of research and production workloads, processing petabytes of data. This paper presents the challenges of running a mixed production/research cluster, a governance and communications model that enables addressing user needs, and a suite of software tools that have been developed to address the diverse set of requirements that result from a user base that manages and processes large amounts of data.
items.abstract_zh: 自 2022 年以来，Dori 一直是联合基因组研究所 (JGI) 的主要高性能计算集群。它一直服务于广泛的研究和生产工作负载，处理 PB 级数据。本文介绍了运行混合生产/研究集群、能够满足用户需求的治理和通信模型以及一套软件工具的挑战，这些软件工具是为了满足管理和处理大量数据的用户群产生的各种需求而开发的。

items.title: ChatEED: An agentic retrieval assistant for accelerator operators.
items.abstract: Scientists and operators at SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory rely on electronic logbooks (ELOGs) to record and share critical information surrounding accelerator operations. However, since creating log entries is time-consuming and complex, they are often brief, incomplete, filled with jargon, and inconsistently structured. With thousands of records spanning decades, this makes it difficult for operators to search for and interpret information. Through interviews with operators, we identified two critical gaps: the lack of automated shift summarization and the difficulty of real-time ELOG information retrieval. Therefore, we introduce ChatEED, a novel agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system that is operator-centric and addresses these two needs while also prioritizing security, modularity, efficiency, and transparency. In this paper, we analyze the operator needs and workflow that guide the system design, detail the system architecture and deployment, and outline future directions for expansion and evaluation. This ongoing work demonstrates the potential for AI systems to improve continuity, communication, and efficiency in high-performance science facilities.
items.abstract_zh: SLAC 国家加速器实验室的科学家和操作员依靠电子日志 (ELOG) 来记录和共享有关加速器运行的关键信息。然而，由于创建日志条目既耗时又复杂，因此它们通常简短、不完整、充满术语且结构不一致。由于存在跨越数十年的数千条记录，这使得操作员很难搜索和解释信息。通过与操作员的访谈，我们发现了两个关键差距：缺乏自动班次总结和实时 ELOG 信息检索的困难。因此，我们引入了 ChatEED，这是一种新颖的代理检索增强生成 (RAG) 系统，该系统以操作员为中心，满足这两个需求，同时还优先考虑安全性、模块化、效率和透明度。在本文中，我们分析了指导系统设计的运营商需求和工作流程，详细介绍了系统架构和部署，并概述了未来扩展和评估的方向。这项正在进行的工作展示了人工智能系统在提高高性能科学设施的连续性、通信和效率方面的潜力。

items.title: Stackless vs. Stackful Coroutines: A Comparative Study for RDMA-based Asynchronous Many-Task (AMT) Runtimes.
items.abstract: Asynchronous Many-Task (AMT) runtimes manage parallelism by suspending and migrating tasks between processes, with their state captured in continuations. The efficiency of suspending, migrating, and resuming these continuations is critical to application performance.
items.abstract_zh: 异步多任务 (AMT) 运行时通过在进程之间挂起和迁移任务来管理并行性，并在延续中捕获任务的状态。暂停、迁移和恢复这些延续的效率对于应用程序性能至关重要。

items.title: An MLIR pipeline for offloading Fortran to FPGAs via OpenMP.
items.abstract: With the slowing of Moore’s Law, heterogeneous computing platforms such as Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) have gained increasing interest for accelerating HPC workloads. In this work we present, to the best of our knowledge, the first implementation of selective code offloading to FPGAs via the OpenMP target directive within MLIR. Our approach combines the MLIR OpenMP dialect with a High-Level Synthesis (HLS) dialect to provide a portable compilation flow targeting FPGAs. Unlike prior OpenMP FPGA efforts that rely on custom compilers, by contrast we integrate with MLIR and so support any MLIR-compatible front end, demonstrated here with Flang. Building upon a range of existing MLIR building blocks significantly reduces the effort required and demonstrates the composability benefits of the MLIR ecosystem. Our approach supports manual optimisation of offloaded kernels through standard OpenMP directives, and this work establishes a flexible and extensible path for directive-based FPGA acceleration integrated within the MLIR ecosystem. Code available in https://github.com/xdslproject/ftn/tree/main.
items.abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的放缓，现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等异构计算平台对于加速 HPC 工作负载越来越感兴趣。在这项工作中，据我们所知，我们首次通过 MLIR 中的 OpenMP 目标指令实现选择性代码卸载到 FPGA。我们的方法将 MLIR OpenMP 方言与高级综合 (HLS) 方言相结合，提供针对 FPGA 的可移植编译流程。与之前依赖自定义编译器的 OpenMP FPGA 工作不同，相比之下，我们与 MLIR 集成，因此支持任何与 MLIR 兼容的前端，此处通过 Flang 进行了演示。基于一系列现有 MLIR 构建模块进行构建，可显着减少所需的工作量，并展示 MLIR 生态系统的可组合性优势。我们的方法支持通过标准 OpenMP 指令手动优化卸载的内核，这项工作为集成在 MLIR 生态系统中的基于指令的 FPGA 加速建立了灵活且可扩展的路径。代码可在 https://github.com/xdslproject/ftn/tree/main 中找到。

items.title: On the Compressibility of Floating-Point Data in Posit and IEEE-754 Representation.
items.abstract: The IEEE 754 floating-point standard is the most used representation for real numbers in modern computer systems, despite issues in accuracy for certain applications. The posit format, which has several advantages, has been proposed as a direct drop-in replacement for IEEE floats. Many works compare the use of posits to floats in a wide range of scientific computing domains. However, there has not been any work looking into the compressibility of posit data. In this paper, we compare the compression ratios of different algorithms when the input is encoded in IEEE format and in posit format. We evaluate 5 lossless general-purpose compressors as well as several new compression algorithms synthesized by our LC framework on 14 single-precision inputs from the SDRBench suite, encoded in float and posit format. Our results show that that 4 of the 6 compressors yield an average of 2.59% reduction in compression ratio on posit data, whereas bzip2 provides a 1.74% increase in compression ratio, with XZ providing the highest ratios for both encodings.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管某些应用程序存在精度问题，但 IEEE 754 浮点标准是现代计算机系统中最常用的实数表示形式。 posit 格式有几个优点，已被提议作为 IEEE 浮点数的直接替代品。许多著作将定点与浮点数在广泛的科学计算领域中的使用进行了比较。然而，还没有任何研究研究数据的可压缩性的工作。在本文中，我们比较了输入以 IEEE 格式和 posit 格式编码时不同算法的压缩率。我们评估了 5 个无损通用压缩器以及由我们的 LC 框架在来自 SDRBench 套件的 14 个单精度输入（以 float 和 posit 格式编码）上合成的几种新压缩算法。我们的结果表明，6 个压缩器中的 4 个压缩器对 posit 数据的压缩比平均降低了 2.59%，而 bzip2 的压缩比提高了 1.74%，其中 XZ 为两种编码提供了最高的压缩比。

items.title: Agentic AI vs ML-based Autotuning: A Comparative Study for Loop Reordering Optimization.
items.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) applications rely heavily on code optimizations to achieve good performance on modern CPU and GPU architectures. Traditional Machine Learning autotuning approaches have demonstrated success in exploring high-dimensional spaces, but they often require expensive compile-run evaluations and lack adaptability for large HPC applications. The recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Agentic AI systems raise intriguing questions about the potential of these approaches to address specific optimization methodologies. This work aims to answer an essential question for the HPC community: "How Agentic AI Systems Compare to Traditional ML Autotuning Techniques?" To address this question, we present a comparative analysis between a traditional ML-based optimization approach and an Agentic AI system, evaluating their respective capabilities and limitations for loop-level optimization. In addition, we introduced a new Agentic AI system named LoopGen-AI using three different Large Language Models: GPT-4.1, Claude 4.0, and Gemini 2.5.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序严重依赖代码优化来在现代 CPU 和 GPU 架构上实现良好的性能。传统的机器学习自动调整方法在探索高维空间方面已经取得了成功，但它们通常需要昂贵的编译运行评估，并且缺乏对大型 HPC 应用程序的适应性。大型语言模型 (LLM) 和代理人工智能系统的最新进展提出了一些有趣的问题，即这些方法解决特定优化方法的潜力。这项工作旨在回答 HPC 社区的一个基本问题：“Agentic AI 系统与传统 ML 自动调整技术相比如何？”为了解决这个问题，我们对传统的基于机器学习的优化方法和 Agentic AI 系统进行了比较分析，评估了它们各自的循环级优化能力和局限性。此外，我们还引入了一个名为 LoopGen-AI 的新 Agentic AI 系统，它使用三种不同的大型语言模型：GPT-4.1、Claude 4.0 和 Gemini 2.5。

items.title: AI Agents for Enabling Autonomous Experiments at ORNL's HPC and Manufacturing User Facilities.
items.abstract: This paper presents a modular architecture for enabling autonomous cross-facility scientific experimentation using AI agents at ORNL’s HPC and manufacturing user facilities. The proposed system integrates a natural language interface powered by an LLM, a multi-agent framework for decision making, programmable facility APIs, and a provenance-aware infrastructure to support adaptive, explainable, and reproducible workflows. We demonstrate how AI agents can orchestrate and optimize additive manufacturing experiments through near real-time coordination between experimental and HPC resources. The architecture is evaluated through a realistic end-to-end workflow that employs a simulated version of the manufacturing facility, showing that the approach reduces coordination overhead and accelerates the scientific discovery process.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种模块化架构，用于在 ORNL 的 HPC 和制造用户设施中使用 AI 代理实现自主跨设施科学实验。所提出的系统集成了由法学硕士支持的自然语言界面、用于决策的多代理框架、可编程设施 API 和来源感知基础设施，以支持自适应、可解释和可重复的工作流程。我们演示了人工智能代理如何通过实验和 HPC 资源之间的近实时协调来编排和优化增材制造实验。该架构通过真实的端到端工作流程进行评估，该工作流程采用制造设施的模拟版本，表明该方法减少了协调开销并加速了科学发现过程。

items.title: A Data-Size Adaptive Approach to I/O of Poorly Load Balanced In Situ Data Extracts.
items.abstract: Efficient parallel I/O is essential for large-scale scientific workflows, particularly in in situ visualization pipelines where output sizes and data distribution can vary significantly over time. We present a new data-size based aggregation strategy for the ADIOS2 BP5 engine, designed to improve parallel I/O performance under load imbalance. Whereas existing aggregation strategies for ADIOS group writers based on compute node assignment, our approach dynamically balances subfile sizes according to the amount of data each process will write. We evaluate this strategy using a synthetic workload under low and severe load imbalance. Results show that the data-size based aggregation matches or outperforms existing strategies. These findings highlight the potential of adaptive aggregation strategies to improve I/O performance for imbalanced scientific workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 高效的并行 I/O 对于大规模科学工作流程至关重要，特别是在输出大小和数据分布随时间变化显着的原位可视化管道中。我们为 ADIOS2 BP5 引擎提出了一种新的基于数据大小的聚合策略，旨在提高负载不平衡情况下的并行 I/O 性能。 ADIOS 组写入器的现有聚合策略基于计算节点分配，而我们的方法根据每个进程将写入的数据量动态平衡子文件大小。我们使用低负载不平衡和严重负载不平衡下的合成工作负载来评估该策略。结果表明，基于数据大小的聚合匹配或优于现有策略。这些发现凸显了自适应聚合策略在提高不平衡科学工作负载的 I/O 性能方面的潜力。

items.title: FZModules: A Heterogeneous Computing Framework for Customizable Scientific Data Compression Pipelines.
items.abstract: Modern scientific simulations and instruments generate data volumes that overwhelm memory and storage, throttling scalability. Lossy compression mitigates this by trading controlled error for reduced footprint and throughput gains, yet optimal pipelines are highly data and objective specific, demanding compression expertise. GPU compressors supply raw throughput but often hard‑code fused kernels that hinder rapid experimentation, and underperform in rate–distortion. We present FZModules, a heterogeneous framework for assembling error‑bounded custom compression pipelines from high‑performance modules through a concise extensible interface. We further utilize an asynchronous task-backed execution library that infers data dependencies, manages memory movement, and exposes branch and stage level concurrency for powerful asynchronous compression pipelines. Evaluating three pipelines built with FZModules on four representative scientific datasets, we show they can compare end‑to‑end speedup of fused‑kernel GPU compressors while achieving similar rate–distortion to higher fidelity CPU or hybrid compressors, enabling rapid, domain-tailored design.
items.abstract_zh: 现代科学模拟和仪器生成的数据量超出了内存和存储空间，限制了可扩展性。有损压缩通过用受控错误来减少占用空间和提高吞吐量来缓解这一问题，但最佳管道是高度数据和目标特定的、要求严格的压缩专业知识。 GPU 压缩器提供原始吞吐量，但通常会硬编码融合内核，这会阻碍快速实验，并且在速率失真方面表现不佳。我们提出了 FZModules，这是一个异构框架，用于通过简洁的可扩展接口从高性能模块组装误差有限的自定义压缩管道。我们进一步利用异步任务支持的执行库来推断数据依赖性、管理内存移动并为强大的异步压缩管道公开分支和阶段级并发性。通过在四个代表性科学数据集上评估使用 FZModules 构建的三个管道，我们发现它们可以比较融合内核 GPU 压缩器的端到端加速，同时实现与更高保真度 CPU 或混合压缩器类似的率失真，从而实现快速、定制的设计。

items.title: Integrating Distributed SQL Query Engines with Object-Based Computational Storage.
items.abstract: Existing object storage systems like AWS S3 and MinIO offer only limited in-storage compute capabilities, typically restricted to simple SQL WHERE-clause filtering. Consequently, high-impact operators such as aggregation and top-N are still executed entirely at the compute layer. Recent advances in Object-based Computational Storage (OCS) enable these complex operators to run natively within storage, creating opportunities for substantial reductions in data movement and query time. To demonstrate these benefits in distributed SQL engines, we used Presto as a case study and developed the Presto-OCS connector, which analyzes execution plans to identify pushdown-eligible operators and offloads them to OCS for efficient in-storage execution. Evaluations with real-world HPC analytics queries and the TPC-H benchmark show that our approach achieves up to 4.07 × speedup and 99% data movement reduction compared to filter-only pushdown. When combined with compression techniques, our approach delivers 1.39 × speedup over compressed filter-only pushdown, demonstrating that advanced query pushdown complements existing optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: AWS S3 和 MinIO 等现有对象存储系统仅提供有限的存储内计算功能，通常仅限于简单的 SQL WHERE 子句过滤。因此，聚合和 top-N 等高影响力运算符仍然完全在计算层执行。基于对象的计算存储 (OCS) 的最新进展使这些复杂的运算符能够在存储中本地运行，从而为大幅减少数据移动和查询时间创造了机会。为了展示分布式 SQL 引擎中的这些优势，我们使用 Presto 作为案例研究，并开发了 Presto-OCS 连接器，该连接器分析执行计划以识别符合下推条件的运算符，并将它们卸载到 OCS 以实现高效的存储内执行。对实际 HPC 分析查询和 TPC-H 基准的评估表明，与仅过滤器下推相比，我们的方法实现了高达 4.07 倍的加速和 99% 的数据移动减少。当与压缩技术相结合时，我们的方法比压缩的仅过滤器下推提供了 1.39 倍的加速，这表明高级查询下推补充了现有的优化。

items.title: Complex Parsing for In-Network Acceleration of High-Energy Physics Experiments.
items.abstract: This paper describes a novel application and evaluation of programmable networking in High-Energy Physics (HEP): a complete parser for the custom packet format used by Fermilab’s DUNE experiment. Notably, this parser is implemented on a Tofino programmable network switch and evaluated on the FABRIC testbed by using network traffic generated by the ICEBERG DUNE prototype. The parsed network traffic consists of Jumbo Ethernet frames that contain digitizations of sensor readings from ICEBERG’s detector.
items.abstract_zh: 本文描述了高能物理 (HEP) 中可编程网络的新颖应用和评估：费米实验室 DUNE 实验使用的自定义数据包格式的完整解析器。值得注意的是，该解析器在 Tofino 可编程网络交换机上实现，并使用 ICEBERG DUNE 原型生成的网络流量在 FABRIC 测试台上进行评估。解析后的网络流量由巨型以太网帧组成，其中包含来自 ICEBERG 探测器的传感器读数的数字化。

items.title: PerfAnalyzer: Revealing Performance Trends using Version Oriented Visual Analysis of Scientific Software.
items.abstract: Understanding the behavior of scientific software is essential in maintaining the integrity and transparency of computational research. Tracking the changes in computational parameters (input-output parameters, configuration parameters for hardware and software) across different versions of software executions helps in understanding by providing a context to correlate the outcomes with meaningful changes and to interpret the results reliably. Diverse computing environments and software platforms add complexity in tracking the evolution of computational parameters across multiple runs. We present PerfAnalyzer, an interactive dashboard to simplify the collection, management, and visual analysis of computational parameters across Git commits. We demonstrate the usefulness of the dashboard in identifying performance issues through a case study on collecting and analyzing computational parameters of the CloverLeaf mini-application. The results of the case study show PerfAnalyzer’s ability to highlight performance changes across versions and identify parameters related to the changes that are difficult to locate using isolated measurements.
