Traditional data-parallel frameworks, such as Horovod or PyTorch DDP, average gradients at every batch, which can limit scalability due to communication bottlenecks. In this work, we propose two novel data-parallel strategies that reduce synchronization by averaging weights and biases only at the end of each epoch. These methods are implemented using the PyCOMPSs task-based programming model and integrated into dislib, enabled by a new distributed tensor abstraction (ds-tensor) that supports multidimensional data structures suitable for deep learning workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 训练大型神经网络的计算要求很高，并且通常受到分布式环境中同步开销的限制。传统的数据并行框架（例如 Horovod 或 PyTorch DDP）在每个批次中平均梯度，这可能会由于通信瓶颈而限制可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种新颖的数据并行策略，通过仅在每个时期结束时平均权重和偏差来减少同步。这些方法是使用 PyCOMPS 基于任务的编程模型实现的，并集成到 dislib 中，由支持适合深度学习工作负载的多维数据结构的新分布式张量抽象 (ds-tensor) 启用。

items.title: Mixed-Precision Performance Portability of FFT-Based GPU-Accelerated Algorithms for Block-Triangular Toeplitz Matrices.
items.abstract: The hardware diversity in leadership-class computing facilities, alongside the immense performance boosts from today’s GPUs when computing in lower precision, incentivizes scientific HPC workflows to adopt mixed-precision algorithms and performance portability models. We present an on-the-fly framework using hipify for performance portability and apply it to FFTMatvec—an HPC application that computes matrix-vector products with block-triangular Toeplitz matrices. Our approach enables FFTMatvec, initially a CUDA-only application, to run seamlessly on AMD GPUs with excellent performance. Performance optimizations for AMD GPUs are integrated into the open-source rocBLAS library, keeping the application code unchanged. We then present a dynamic mixed-precision framework for FFTMatvec; a Pareto front analysis determines the optimal mixed-precision configuration for a desired error tolerance. Results are shown for AMD Instinct™ MI250X, MI300X, and the newly launched MI355X GPUs. The performance-portable, mixed-precision FFTMatvec is scaled to 4,096 GPUs on the OLCF Frontier supercomputer.
items.abstract_zh: 领先级计算设施中的硬件多样性，以及当今 GPU 在低精度计算时的巨大性能提升，激励科学 HPC 工作流程采用混合精度算法和性能可移植性模型。我们提出了一个使用 hipify 实现性能可移植性的动态框架，并将其应用于 FFTMatvec——一种使用块三角 Toeplitz 矩阵计算矩阵向量乘积的 HPC 应用程序。我们的方法使 FFTMatvec（最初是一个仅支持 CUDA 的应用程序）能够在 AMD GPU 上无缝运行，并具有出色的性能。 AMD GPU 的性能优化已集成到开源 rocBLAS 库中，保持应用程序代码不变。然后，我们提出了 FFTMatvec 的动态混合精度框架；帕累托前沿分析确定了实现所需误差容限的最佳混合精度配置。显示的是 AMD Instinct™ MI250X、MI300X 和新推出的 MI355X GPU 的结果。高性能便携式、混合精度 FFTMatvec 在 OLCF Frontier 超级计算机上扩展到 4,096 个 GPU。

items.title: Streaming X-ray Detector Data to Remote Facilities Using EJFAT.
items.abstract: Propelled by the increasing need for the near real-time feedback for user experiments on its X-ray beamlines, the Advanced Photon Source continues to investigate the use of streaming workflows, with several of those being successfully deployed on its local computing infrastructure. With ever-growing data volumes and compute resource needs, the ability to analyze beamline data at remote facilities is becoming more and more important.
items.abstract_zh: 在 X 射线光束线上的用户实验对近实时反馈的需求日益增长的推动下，高级光子源继续研究流工作流程的使用，其中一些工作流程已成功部署在其本地计算基础设施上。随着数据量和计算资源需求的不断增长，在远程设施分析光束线数据的能力变得越来越重要。

items.title: SNAcc: An Open-Source Framework for Streaming-based Network-to-Storage Accelerators.
items.abstract: Network accessible databases are a common use case in modern data centers, often paired with pre-processing before storing results for later use. However, general purpose CPUs struggle to keep up with current Ethernet line speeds. Furthermore, in such a compute pipeline, the CPU is mostly used to manage storage accesses, wasting compute resources and communication bandwidth.
items.abstract_zh: 网络可访问数据库是现代数据中心的常见用例，通常在存储结果以供以后使用之前与预处理配合使用。然而，通用 CPU 很难跟上当前的以太网线路速度。此外，在这样的计算管道中，CPU主要用于管理存储访问，浪费计算资源和通信带宽。

items.title: LLM4FP: LLM-Based Program Generation for Triggering Floating-Point Inconsistencies Across Compilers.
items.abstract: Floating-point inconsistencies across compilers can undermine the reliability of numerical software. We present LLM4FP, the first framework that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate floating-point programs specifically designed to trigger such inconsistencies. LLM4FP combines Grammar-Based Generation and Feedback-Based Mutation to produce diverse and valid programs. We evaluate LLM4FP across multiple compilers and optimization levels, measuring inconsistency rate, time cost, and program diversity. LLM4FP detects over twice as many inconsistencies compared to the state-of-the-art tool, Varity. Notably, most of the inconsistencies involve real-valued differences, rather than extreme values like NaN or infinities. LLM4FP also uncovers inconsistencies across a wider range of optimization levels, and finds the most mismatches between host and device compilers. These results show that LLM-guided program generation improves the detection of numerical inconsistencies. In practice, numerical software and HPC developers can use LLM4FP to compare compilers and select those that provide more accurate and consistent floating-point behavior, while compiler developers can use it to identify and address subtle consistency issues in their implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 编译器之间的浮点不一致可能会破坏数值软件的可靠性。我们推出了 LLM4FP，这是第一个使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 生成浮点程序的框架，专门用于触发此类不一致问题。 LLM4FP 结合了基于语法的生成和基于反馈的变异来生成多样化且有效的程序。我们跨多个编译器和优化级别评估 LLM4FP，测量不一致率、时间成本和程序多样性。与最先进的工具 Varity 相比，LLM4FP 检测到的不一致数量是其两倍多。值得注意的是，大多数不一致涉及实值差异，而不是 NaN 或无穷大等极端值。 LLM4FP 还可以发现更广泛的优化级别之间的不一致，并找到主机和设备编译器之间最不匹配的地方。这些结果表明，法学硕士指导的程序生成改进了对数值不一致的检测。在实践中，数值软件和 HPC 开发人员可以使用 LLM4FP 来比较编译器并选择那些提供更准确和一致的浮点行为的编译器，而编译器开发人员可以使用它来识别和解决其实现中微妙的一致性问题。

items.title: WAGES: Workload-Aware GPU Sharing System for Energy-Efficient Serverless LLM Serving.
items.abstract: Serverless LLM serving reduces operational costs by elastically provisioning GPUs and charging users only for actual usage. However, existing systems mainly optimize cold-start latency while overlooking two inefficiencies: (i) static, exclusive GPU allocation that over-provisions compute resources, lowering utilization and inflating hardware costs, and (ii) reliance on hardware-controlled clock frequencies, wasting energy. Our measurements show that many LLM workloads can meet SLOs with partial SM allocations and reduced clock speeds, enabling opportunities for GPU multiplexing and dynamic clock scaling to reduce energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器 LLM 服务通过弹性配置 GPU 并仅针对实际使用情况向用户收费来降低运营成本。然而，现有系统主要优化冷启动延迟，同时忽视了两个低效率问题：(i) 静态、独占 GPU 分配，过度配置计算资源，降低利用率并增加硬件成本；(ii) 依赖硬件控制的时钟频率，浪费能源。我们的测量表明，许多 LLM 工作负载可以通过部分 SM 分配和降低的时钟速度来满足 SLO，从而为 GPU 多路复用和动态时钟扩展提供机会以降低能耗。

items.title: An Optimized Generalized Multi-Color Point Implicit Solver for Intel GPUs using OneAPI ESIMD.
items.abstract: This paper presents an efficient implementation of a linear-solver kernel relevant to FUN3D, a suite of computational fluid dynamics software developed at NASA’s Langley Research Center. The linear solver is optimized for a range of block sizes commonly used in FUN3D. The implementation targets Aurora, the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility’s (ALCF) exascale machine featuring Intel Data Center Max 1550 GPUs. The linear solver’s performance is memory bandwidth-bound due to its low arithmetic intensity. The primary performance challenges stem from variable matrix row lengths and indirect memory access patterns inherent in unstructured-grid applications. Variable block sizes introduce additional complexity through differing levels of intra-block parallelism and the constraint of efficiently utilizing 512-bit vector registers. We propose an optimized implementation using ESIMD APIs that efficiently vectorize memory loads for block-sparse vector computations. We demonstrate that performance on the Intel 1550 GPU is within 10% of its bandwidth benchmark peak. We also compare the performance of the ESIMD kernels on Intel GPUs with CUDA-optimized implementations on NVIDIA GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了与 FUN3D 相关的线性求解器内核的有效实现，FUN3D 是 NASA 兰利研究中心开发的一套计算流体动力学软件。线性求解器针对 FUN3D 中常用的一系列块大小进行了优化。该实施针对 Aurora，阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 的百亿亿次计算机，配备英特尔数据中心 Max 1550 GPU。由于算术强度较低，线性求解器的性能受到内存带宽的限制。主要的性能挑战源于非结构化网格应用中固有的可变矩阵行长度和间接内存访问模式。可变块大小通过不同级别的块内并行性以及有效利用 512 位向量寄存器的限制引入了额外的复杂性。我们提出了一种使用 ESMD API 的优化实现，该 API 可以有效地矢量化内存负载以进行块稀疏矢量计算。我们证明 Intel 1550 GPU 的性能与其带宽基准峰值相差不超过 10%。我们还比较了 Intel GPU 上的 ESMD 内核与 NVIDIA GPU 上的 CUDA 优化实现的性能。

items.title: Rapid Quantum Network Simulation Design with a Path to Scalable Execution.
items.abstract: As quantum networking grows in importance, its study is of interest to an ever wider community. Several simulation frameworks allow for testing such systems on commodity hardware, but can be difficult to work with and performance-limited due to their predominantly serial nature. The SeQUeNCe simulator addresses the latter issue, though has not been proven to work well across architectures or larger scales. For the former concern, we introduce BISQIT, a block-diagramme-based framework that models in terms of distinct components and the data flows between them. This provides a simple and modular approach to experimental design that allows for rapid iteration with a library of reusable parts. We demonstrate the flexibility of its design for prototyping and show a path for how to migrate designed experiments to SeQUeNCe for production-scale testing. Our results show the simplicity of the BISQIT model and provide new insight into SeQUeNCe’s scalability behaviour using ORNL’s Frontier.
items.abstract_zh: 随着量子网络的重要性日益增强，它的研究引起了越来越广泛的社区的兴趣。一些模拟框架允许在商用硬件上测试此类系统，但由于其主要是串行性质，因此可能难以使用且性能受到限制。 SeQUeNCe 模拟器解决了后一个问题，但尚未被证明可以在跨架构或更大范围内正常工作。对于前一个问题，我们引入了 BISQIT，这是一个基于框图的框架，它根据不同的组件及其之间的数据流进行建模。这为实验设计提供了一种简单且模块化的方法，允许使用可重用部件库进行快速迭代。我们展示了其原型设计的灵活性，并展示了如何将设计的实验迁移到 SeQUeNCe 以进行生产规模测试的路径。我们的结果展示了 BISQIT 模型的简单性，并为使用 ORNL Frontier 的 SeQUeNCe 的可扩展性行为提供了新的见解。

items.title: Towards a user-centric HPC-QC environment.
items.abstract: Robust execution environments are important for addressing key challenges in quantum computing, such as application development, portability, and reproducibility, and help unlock the development of modular quantum programs, driving forward hybrid quantum workflows. In this work, we show progress towards a basic, but portable, runtime environment for developing and executing hybrid quantum-classical programs running in High Performance Computing (HPC) environments enhanced with Quantum Processing Units (QPUs). The middleware includes a second layer of scheduling after the main HPC resource manager in order to improve the utilization of the QPU, and extra functionality for observability, monitoring, and admin access. This approach enables managing multiple programming Software Development Kits (SDKs) as first-class citizens in the environment by building on a recently proposed vendor-neutral Quantum Resource Management Interface (QRMI). Lastly, we discuss and show a solution for the monitoring and observability stack, completing our description of the hybrid system architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 强大的执行环境对于解决量子计算中的关键挑战（例如应用程序开发、可移植性和可重复性）非常重要，并有助于解锁模块化量子程序的开发，推动混合量子工作流程的发展。在这项工作中，我们展示了在基本但可移植的运行时环境方面取得的进展，该环境用于开发和执行在通过量子处理单元 (QPU) 增强的高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中运行的混合量子经典程序。中间件包括主 HPC 资源管理器之后的第二层调度，以提高 QPU 的利用率，以及用于可观察性、监控和管理访问的额外功能。通过构建最近提出的供应商中立的量子资源管理接口 (QRMI)，该方法能够将多个编程软件开发套件 (SDK) 作为环境中的一等公民进行管理。最后，我们讨论并展示了监控和可观测性堆栈的解决方案，完成了对混合系统架构的描述。

items.title: Large-Message All-to-All Communication at Frontier Scale.
items.abstract: Near the full scale of exascale supercomputers, latency can dominate the cost of all-to-all communication even for very large message sizes. We describe GPU-aware all-to-all implementations designed to reduce latency for large message sizes at extreme scales, and we present their performance using 65536 tasks (8192 nodes) on the Frontier supercomputer at the Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility. Two implementations perform best for different ranges of message size, and all outperform the vendor-provided MPI_Alltoall. Our results show promising options for improving implementations of MPI_Alltoall_init.
items.abstract_zh: 在接近百亿亿级超级计算机的全部规模时，即使对于非常大的消息大小，延迟也可能会主导所有对所有通信的成本。我们描述了 GPU 感知的全对全实现，旨在减少极端规模下大消息大小的延迟，并使用橡树岭领先计算设施的 Frontier 超级计算机上的 65536 个任务（8192 个节点）来展示其性能。两种实现对于不同的消息大小范围表现最佳，并且都优于供应商提供的 MPI_Alltoall。我们的结果显示了改进 MPI_Alltoall_init 实现的有希望的选择。

items.title: Testing and Benchmarking Emerging Supercomputers via the MFC Flow Solver.
items.abstract: Deploying new supercomputers requires testing and evaluation via application codes. Portable, user-friendly tools enable evaluation, and the Multicomponent Flow Code (MFC), a computational fluid dynamics (CFD) code, addresses this need. MFC is adorned with a toolchain that automates input generation, compilation, batch job submission, regression testing, and benchmarking. The toolchain design enables users to evaluate compiler–hardware combinations for correctness and performance with limited software engineering experience. As with other PDE solvers, wall time per spatially discretized grid point serves as a figure of merit. We present MFC benchmarking results for five generations of NVIDIA GPUs, three generations of AMD GPUs, and various CPU architectures, utilizing Intel, Cray, NVIDIA, AMD, and GNU compilers. These tests have revealed compiler bugs and regressions on recent machines such as Frontier and El Capitan. MFC has benchmarked approximately 50 compute devices and 5 flagship supercomputers.
items.abstract_zh: 部署新的超级计算机需要通过应用程序代码进行测试和评估。便携式、用户友好的工具可以进行评估，而计算流体动力学 (CFD) 代码多组分流代码 (MFC) 可以满足这一需求。 MFC 配备了一个工具链，可以自动生成输入、编译、批处理作业提交、回归测试和基准测试。工具链设计使用户能够利用有限的软件工程经验来评估编译器-硬件组合的正确性和性能。与其他 PDE 求解器一样，每个空间离散网格点的墙时间用作品质因数。我们展示了使用 Intel、Cray、NVIDIA、AMD 和 GNU 编译器的五代 NVIDIA GPU、三代 AMD GPU 和各种 CPU 架构的 MFC 基准测试结果。这些测试揭示了 Frontier 和 El Capitan 等最新机器上的编译器错误和回归。 MFC 对大约 50 种计算设备和 5 种旗舰超级计算机进行了基准测试。

items.title: Network Replay and Consistency Across Testbeds.
items.abstract: Shared network testbeds are critical for systems and networking research. However, their shared hardware can introduce variability—like increased jitter or loss—that may impact experiment fidelity or reproducibility.
items.abstract_zh: 共享网络测试台对于系统和网络研究至关重要。然而，他们的共享硬件可能会引入可变性（例如抖动或丢失增加），这可能会影响实验保真度或再现性。

items.title: "Offloading" Undergraduate Research to the Graphics Processing Unit for Acceleration.
items.abstract: Traditionally, research in physics and engineering involves formulating and solving partial differential equations—a task that can take years to master. However, by rethinking these problems as N-body simulations, students can engage with them using only a freshman-level understanding of mathematics, physics, and computer science—along with a fast computer and vivid imagination. In the past, such simulations required expensive, high-performance machines. But with the power of modern GPUs, a gaming desktop can now perform meaningful N-body computations, making advanced, independent research accessible to undergraduate students.
items.abstract_zh: 传统上，物理和工程学研究涉及制定和求解偏微分方程，这项任务可能需要数年时间才能掌握。然而，通过将这些问题重新思考为 N 体模拟，学生只需使用对数学、物理和计算机科学的新生水平的理解，以及快速的计算机和生动的想象力就可以解决这些问题。过去，此类模拟需要昂贵的高性能机器。但凭借现代 GPU 的强大功能，游戏桌面现在可以执行有意义的 N 体计算，从而使本科生能够进行先进的独立研究。

items.title: Applying Surrogate Modeling to Decouple Data Collection and Analysis from Simulation for Accelerated In-Situ Analysis.
items.abstract: Effective in-situ analysis of target variables in scientific simulations is often constrained by its tight coupling with simulation timesteps, which can degrade performance and limit adaptive control of analysis quality. This work presents a surrogate modeling approach that decouples data collection and analysis from simulation execution. The surrogate models of targeted variables are trained online using early-stage simulation data, and once well-trained, replace the simulation for targeted in-situ analysis, enabling asynchronous analysis and early termination decisions without pretraining or manual tuning. We evaluate it on various applications for different data analysis tasks. Considering training processes during early stages of the simulation, we still achieve speed-ups of 1.20 × –3.51 × compared to traditional in-situ tracking. At meantime, we keep accuracies of 83.33%–99.60% comparing with original simulation.
items.abstract_zh: 科学模拟中目标变量的有效原位分析通常受到其与模拟时​​间步长紧密耦合​​的限制，这会降低性能并限制分析质量的自适应控制。这项工作提出了一种代理建模方法，将数据收集和分析与模拟执行分离。使用早期仿真数据在线训练目标变量的替代模型，一旦训练良好，就可以取代仿真进行有针对性的原位分析，从而无需预训练或手动调整即可实现异步分析和提前终止决策。我们在不同数据分析任务的各种应用程序上对其进行评估。考虑到模拟早期阶段的训练过程，与传统的原位跟踪相比，我们仍然实现了 1.20 × –3.51 × 的加速。同时，与原始模拟相比，我们保持了83.33%–99.60%的准确度。

items.title: Fast on-demand Memory Mapping for Shared Memory and Disaggregated Systems.
items.abstract: Efficient synchronization of memory mapping information is increasingly important as systems evolve toward greater resource disaggregation and heterogeneity. When memory is exported between processes, establishing shared mapping often requires costly page table walk and updates, particularly in fault-driven models. To study these costs, we implement an XPMEM-inspired shared-memory driver and evaluate techniques to reduce mapping overhead. Our approach combines parallel batched on-demand pinning, bypassing unnecessary cache-policy lookups in PFN mapping, and dynamic re-registration to expand registered regions without tearing down existing mappings. In our evaluation, these optimizations reduce cold-start memory copy by up to 13.22 × over XPMEM in multi-process workloads, with particular benefits for collective communication patterns and rapidly resizing buffers. While developed in a shared-memory context, the results highlight general strategies—avoiding redundant translation work, enabling parallel mapping operations, and preserving mapping state—that can inform the design of memory management in disaggregated systems, including GPU disaggregation and heterogeneous memory environments.
items.abstract_zh: 随着系统朝着更大的资源分解和异构性发展，内存映射信息的有效同步变得越来越重要。当在进程之间导出内存时，建立共享映射通常需要昂贵的页表遍历和更新，特别是在故障驱动模型中。为了研究这些成本，我们实现了一个受 XPMEM 启发的共享内存驱动程序，并评估了减少映射开销的技术。我们的方法结合了并行批量按需固定、绕过 PFN 映射中不必要的缓存策略查找以及动态重新注册以扩展注册区域而不破坏现有映射。在我们的评估中，这些优化在多进程工作负载中比 XPMEM 减少了高达 13.22 倍的冷启动内存复制，特别有利于集体通信模式和快速调整缓冲区大小。虽然是在共享内存环境中开发的，但结果强调了一般策略（避免冗余转换工作、启用并行映射操作和保留映射状态），这些策略可以为分解系统（包括 GPU 分解和异构内存环境）中的内存管理设计提供信息。

items.title: Classification of Three-dimensional Electron Diffraction Data with a Large Language Model.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional electron diffraction (3D ED) has become an essential technique for determining high-resolution molecular structures. It is particularly useful for extremely small crystals that cannot be analyzed using conventional X-ray diffraction. In typical 3D ED experiments, hundreds to thousands of molecular structures are reconstructed from a single sample. However, many of these structures are inaccurate due to factors such as low signal-to-noise ratios and the limited range of measurable angles in 3D ED. Traditionally, researchers have had to manually inspect each structure to identify valid ones, which is a time-consuming and labor-intensive process. We propose an LLM-centric automatic screening method to efficiently identify correct molecular structures from 3D ED outputs. The method begins by converting raw atomic coordinates into a topology-only language representation tailored to 3D ED data. Using this representation, the method proceeds through three stages: (1) rule-based filtering to eliminate clearly impossible candidates, (2) classification by a fine-tuned LLM trained on both correct and artificially-generated corrupted molecules, and (3) grouping to merge identical topologies. This combination allows diverse 3D ED datasets to be classified quickly and accurately. Experimental results obtained using seven real 3D ED datasets indicate that this method reduced the number of structures requiring manual inspection by an average of 95.8% while preserving every correct structure. This method substantially reduces the manual burden and enables efficient large-scale classification of 3D ED data.
items.abstract_zh: 三维电子衍射（3D ED）已成为确定高分辨率分子结构的重要技术。它对于无法使用传统 X 射线衍射进行分析的极小晶体特别有用。在典型的 3D ED 实验中，从单个样品中重建数百到数千个分子结构。然而，由于信噪比低以及 3D ED 中可测量角度范围有限等因素，许多这些结构都是不准确的。传统上，研究人员必须手动检查每个结构以识别有效的结构，这是一个耗时且费力的过程。我们提出了一种以法学硕士为中心的自动筛选方法，可以从 3D ED 输出中有效识别正确的分子结构。该方法首先将原始原子坐标转换为针对 3D ED 数据定制的纯拓扑语言表示。使用这种表示，该方法将经历三个阶段：(1) 基于规则的过滤，以消除明显不可能的候选者，(2) 通过在正确分子和人工生成的损坏分子上训练的微调 LLM 进行分类，以及 (3) 分组以合并相同的拓扑。这种组合可以快速准确地对不同的 3D ED 数据集进行分类。使用七个真实 3D ED 数据集获得的实验结果表明，该方法将需要手动检查的结构数量平均减少了 95.8%，同时保留了每个正确的结构。该方法大大减轻了人工负担，实现了 3D ED 数据的高效大规模分类。

items.title: Do Large Language Models Speak Scientific Workflows?
items.abstract: In this work, we conduct an experimental study to explore applicability of LLMs for configuring, annotating, and translating scientific workflows. We use three different workflow-specific experiments and evaluate several open- and closed-source language models using state-of-the-art workflow systems. Our studies reveal that LLMs often struggle due to a lack of training data for scientific workflows. We further observe that the performance of LLMs varies across experiments and workflow systems. We discuss the implications of our findings and draw attention to several approaches extending LLM capabilities for scientific workflows. Our findings can help workflow developers and users in understanding LLM capabilities in scientific workflows, and motivate further research applying LLMs to workflows.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们进行了一项实验研究，以探索法学硕士在配置、注释和翻译科学工作流程方面的适用性。我们使用三种不同的特定于工作流的实验，并使用最先进的工作流系统评估几种开源和闭源语言模型。我们的研究表明，法学硕士常常因缺乏科学工作流程的培训数据而陷入困境。我们进一步观察到法学硕士的表现因实验和工作流程系统而异。我们讨论了我们的研究结果的含义，并提请人们注意扩展法学硕士能力以实现科学工作流程的几种方法。我们的研究结果可以帮助工作流程开发人员和用户了解科学工作流程中的法学硕士功能，并推动将法学硕士应用于工作流程的进一步研究。

items.title: InferCT: An Efficient and Generalizable Framework to Enable 3D Machine Learning for Computed Tomography.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose inferCT, an efficient and generalizable framework that enables 3D deep learning for computed tomography (CT) datasets during inference designed to be independent of dataset size and imaging task. Recent approaches have shown that 3D models routinely outperform their 2D counterparts when processing CT volumes as their architectures are designed to fully capture the 3D relationships within the data. However, their use in production is limited given the large GPU memory required during inference. Our baseline approach addresses this issue by partitioning CT volumes into cubic sub-volumes that fit into GPU memory and distributing them across multiple GPUs. Building on this, we introduce further vendor-agnostic optimizations, including a lock-free shared memory data structure to reduce synchronization overhead, pipeline execution to hide data prefetching and post-processing latency, and a parallel data loader to improve I/O efficiency. To evaluate the proposed framework, we consider image denoising as a use case and generate two CT datasets of size 1024x1024x1024 and 4096x4096x4096 voxels. Results on both AMD and NVIDIA GPUs show that our optimized framework achieves speedups of 1.97× and 2.32× over the baseline for the 10243 and 40963 datasets, respectively, using AMD MI300X and NVIDIA H100 GPUs, effectively reducing energy consumption during inference. For the scalability tests, experiments demonstrate strong scaling efficiencies of 89.25% and 75.75% when scaling from 1 to 4 GPUs within a single NUMA node, and from 1 to 8 GPUs across two NUMA nodes, respectively, using the 40963 dataset. These results validate the effectiveness of our approach and establish a performance baseline. Future work will build on this by extending the framework to larger, multi-node environments.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 inferCT，这是一种高效且可泛化的框架，可在设计为独立于数据集大小和成像任务的推理过程中对计算机断层扫描 (CT) 数据集进行 3D 深度学习。最近的方法表明，在处理 CT 体积时，3D 模型通常优于 2D 模型，因为其架构旨在完全捕获数据内的 3D 关系。然而，鉴于推理过程中需要大量 GPU 内存，它们在生产中的使用受到限制。我们的基线方法通过将 CT 卷划分为适合 GPU 内存的立方体子卷并将其分布在多个 GPU 上来解决此问题。在此基础上，我们引入了进一步的与供应商无关的优化，包括用于减少同步开销的无锁共享内存数据结构、用于隐藏数据预取和后处理延迟的管道执行，以及用于提高 I/O 效率的并行数据加载器。为了评估所提出的框架，我们将图像去噪视为用例，并生成两个大小分别为 1024x1024x1024 和 4096x4096x4096 体素的 CT 数据集。 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 上的结果表明，使用 AMD MI300X 和 NVIDIA H100 GPU，我们的优化框架分别比 10243 和 40963 数据集的基准实现了 1.97 倍和 2.32 倍的加速，有效降低了推理过程中的能耗。对于可扩展性测试，实验表明，使用 40963 数据集，当单个 NUMA 节点内从 1 个 GPU 扩展到 4 个 GPU 以及跨两个 NUMA 节点从 1 个 GPU 扩展到 8 个 GPU 时，扩展效率分别为 89.25% 和 75.75%。这些结果验证了我们方法的有效性并建立了性能基线。未来的工作将在此基础上将框架扩展到更大的多节点环境。

items.title: KDRSolvers: Scalable, Flexible, Task-Oriented Krylov Solvers.
items.abstract: We present KDRSolvers, a novel framework for representing sparse linear systems and implementing Krylov subspace methods on modern heterogeneous supercomputers. KDRSolvers uses dependent partitioning to uniformly represent sparse matrix storage formats as abstract maps between a matrix’s domain, range, and set of nonzero entries. This abstraction enables KDRSolvers to define universal co-partitioning operators for matrices and vectors independent of underlying storage formats, allowing changes in data partitioning strategies to automatically propagate through an application with no code modification. KDRSolvers also introduces multi-operator systems in which matrix and vector data can be ingested and processed in multiple non-contiguous pieces without data movement. Our implementation of KDRSolvers, targeting the Legion runtime system, achieves greater flexibility and competitive performance compared to PETSc and Trilinos. In experiments with up to 1,024 GPUs on the Lassen supercomputer, our implementation achieves up to a 9.6% reduction in execution time per iteration.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KDRSolvers，这是一种新颖的框架，用于表示稀疏线性系统并在现代异构超级计算机上实现 Krylov 子空间方法。 KDRSolvers 使用相关分区将稀疏矩阵存储格式统一表示为矩阵域、范围和非零条目集之间的抽象映射。这种抽象使 KDRSolvers 能够独立于底层存储格式为矩阵和向量定义通用共同分区运算符，从而允许数据分区策略的更改自动通过应用程序传播，而无需修改代码。 KDRSolvers 还引入了多运算符系统，其中矩阵和矢量数据可以在多个不连续的片段中摄取和处理，而无需数据移动。与 PETSc 和 Trilinos 相比，我们针对 Legion 运行时系统实施的 KDRSolvers 实现了更大的灵活性和有竞争力的性能。在 Lassen 超级计算机上使用多达 1,024 个 GPU 进行的实验中，我们的实现使每次迭代的执行时间减少了 9.6%。

items.title: Secure In-Storage Execution of VTK Workloads on Modern Parallel NFS Data Servers.
items.abstract: As data volumes grow, the cost of moving large datasets increasingly limits scientific visualization performance. One promising solution is to analyze data where it is stored. This paper presents a pushdown architecture for pNFS-based storage systems that offloads early stages of a VTK pipeline—such as reading and filtering—to the pNFS data servers that hold the data. Using a FUSE-based interface, a pNFS client triggers remote processing and retrieves results by writing and reading special command and result files. Our design leverages pNFS clients’ ability to locate file-resident servers, along with a recent Linux enhancement that enables efficient local access to pNFS data without exposing filesystem internals. Offloaded code runs with the user’s credentials, preserving standard permission checks. Experiments with two real-world scientific datasets show up to 6.1× speedup in end-to-end visualization runtime and up to 7.1× in data loading, thanks to early data filtering that significantly reduces data movement.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据量的增长，移动大型数据集的成本越来越限制科学可视化性能。一种有前途的解决方案是在数据存储的地方对其进行分析。本文提出了一种基于 pNFS 的存储系统的下推架构，该架构将 VTK 管道的早期阶段（例如读取和过滤）卸载到保存数据的 pNFS 数据服务器。使用基于 FUSE 的接口，pNFS 客户端通过写入和读取特殊命令和结果文件来触发远程处理并检索结果。我们的设计利用了 pNFS 客户端定位文件驻留服务器的能力，以及最近的 Linux 增强功能，可以在不暴露文件系统内部的情况下高效地本地访问 pNFS 数据。卸载的代码使用用户的凭据运行，保留标准权限检查。对两个真实世界科学数据集的实验表明，由于早期数据过滤显着减少了数据移动，端到端可视化运行时速度提高了 6.1 倍，数据加载速度提高了 7.1 倍。

items.title: Enabling Unstructured Sparse Fine-Tuning and Inference for Foundation Models on Wafer-Scale Engine.
items.abstract: Foundation models, such as large language models, have become ubiquitous and are employed in many applications. These models are often adapted to a desired domain or downstream task through a fine-tuning stage. Cerebras, the wafer-scale AI accelerator, is a suitable platform for running foundation models. However, existing works utilizing sparse pre-training followed by dense fine-tuning result in dense models, failing to reduce the inference cost, measured in floating-point operations. This paper proposes Phoenix, a solution to enable sparse inference for downstream tasks on Cerebras. Phoenix features an innovative strategy that merges sparse weights with low-rank adapters to enable sparsity without losing accuracy, overcoming the limitations of previous approaches. Phoenix also leverages the Cerebras CS-2 wafer-scale engine to accelerate the inference process using unstructured sparsity methods. We evaluate multiple adaptation scenarios, models, and a range of sparsity levels to demonstrate the effectiveness of Phoenix. Phoenix maintains accuracy comparable to dense baselines even at 50–60% sparsity. Meanwhile, it achieves up to a near 2 × reduction in FLOPs and a 1.7 × improvement in inference throughput compared to a single NVIDIA A100 GPU during the inference stage.
items.abstract_zh: 基础模型，例如大型语言模型，已经变得无处不在，并被用于许多应用程序中。这些模型通常通过微调阶段适应所需的领域或下游任务。 Cerebras 是晶圆级人工智能加速器，是运行基础模型的合适平台。然而，现有的工作利用稀疏预训练，然后进行密集微调，导致密集模型，无法降低在浮点运算中测量的推理成本。本文提出了 Phoenix，一种为 Cerebras 上的下游任务启用稀疏推理的解决方案。 Phoenix 采用创新策略，将稀疏权重与低秩适配器相结合，在不损失准确性的情况下实现稀疏性，克服了以前方法的局限性。 Phoenix 还利用 Cerebras CS-2 晶圆级引擎，使用非结构化稀疏方法加速推理过程。我们评估了多种适应场景、模型和一系列稀疏级别，以证明 Phoenix 的有效性。即使在 50-60% 的稀疏度下，Phoenix 也能保持与密集基线相当的精度。同时，在推理阶段，与单个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，它的 FLOP 减少了近 2 倍，推理吞吐量提高了 1.7 倍。

items.title: An RDMA-First Object Storage System with SmartNIC Offload.
items.abstract: AI training and inference impose sustained, fine-grain I/O that stresses host-mediated, TCP-based storage paths. Motivated by kernel-bypass networking and user-space storage stacks, we revisit POSIX-compatible object storage for GPU-centric pipelines. We present ROS2, an RDMA-first object storage system design that offloads the DAOS client to an NVIDIA BlueField-3 SmartNIC while leaving the DAOS I/O engine unchanged on the storage server. ROS2 separates a lightweight control plane (gRPC for namespace and capability exchange) from a high-throughput data plane (UCX/libfabric over RDMA or TCP) and removes host mediation from the data path.
items.abstract_zh: AI 训练和推理施加持续的细粒度 I/O，强调主机介导的、基于 TCP 的存储路径。在内核旁路网络和用户空间存储堆栈的推动下，我们重新审视以 GPU 为中心的管道的 POSIX 兼容对象存储。我们推出了 ROS2，这是一种 RDMA 优先的对象存储系统设计，可将 DAOS 客户端卸载到 NVIDIA BlueField-3 SmartNIC，同时在存储服务器上保持 DAOS I/O 引擎不变。 ROS2 将轻量级控制平面（用于命名空间和功能交换的 gRPC）与高吞吐量数据平面（基于 RDMA 或 TCP 的 UCX/libfabric）分离，并从数据路径中删除主机中介。
